meaning: 全部の。あらゆる。
example: 我已經把問題全部解決了
english: I have solved all the problems.

meaning: 車
example: 我每天開車上班
english: I drive to work every day.

meaning: 汽車
example: 我們的火車被取消了
english: Our train was cancelled.

meaning: 船 / 特に大型のエンジン付き船
example: 我們搭輪船去澎湖玩
english: We took a ferry to Penghu for fun.

meaning: 駅
example: 從車站到我家只需要十分鐘
english: It only takes ten minutes to get from the station to my house.

meaning: 立つ
example: 我們站著聊天聊了很久
english: We stood and chatted for a long time.

meaning: 横になる / 横たわる
example: 病人躺在床上等待醫生
english: The patient lay in bed waiting for the doctor.

meaning: しゃがむ / うずくまる
example: 他蹲在花園裡種花
english: He squatted in the garden planting flowers.

meaning: 学ぶ
example: 學一門新的語言需要時間
english: Learning a new language takes time.

meaning: 学生
example: 這個班級裡有三十個學生
english: There are thirty students in this class.

meaning: 買う
example: 這個手機太貴了，我買不起
english: This phone is too expensive, I can't afford it.

meaning: 売る / 販売する
example: 我們的產品主要賣給外國客人
english: Our products are mainly sold to foreign customers.

meaning: 書く
example: 他用鋼筆寫了一張生日卡片
english: He wrote a birthday card with a fountain pen.

meaning: 文字を書く
example: 寫字可以幫助我記住新的單詞
english: Writing helps me remember new words.

meaning: 手紙を書く
example: 寫信比發短信更能表達心意
english: Writing a letter is a better way to express your feelings than sending a text message.

meaning: 言う / 話す
example: 請你再說一次，好嗎？
english: Please say it again, okay?

meaning: 走る
example: 我哥哥每天早上五點就起床去河邊跑步
english: My brother gets up at five o'clock every morning to run along the river.

meaning: 好きである / 好む / 気に入る
example: 雖然我們的興趣不一樣，但我還是很喜歡和你聊天
english: Although we have different interests, I still really enjoy chatting with you.

meaning: 疲れる
example: 如果你累了，就休息一下吧。
english: If you're tired, take a break.

meaning: 方法
example: 如果這個方法行不通，我們可以再試其他的
english: If this method doesn't work, we can try others.

meaning: 祭日
example: 春節是中國最重要的節日
english: Spring Festival is the most important festival in China

meaning: 以前
example: 我以前見過他，但不記得他的名字
english: I've seen him before, but I don't remember his name.

meaning: 腕時計
example: 這塊手表是我爸爸送給我的
english: This watch was a gift from my father.

meaning: 時を告げる（大型の）時計
example: 我們家的客廳裡有一個古老的時鍾
english: There is an old clock in our living room.

meaning: 優しい（温和）
example: 他用溫柔的聲音叫醒了我
english: He woke me up with a gentle voice.

meaning: 同じ
example: 他們的性格一點都不一樣
english: Their personalities are completely different.

meaning: （ホテルやレストランの）接客係
example: 這裡的服務員都很專業
english: The waiters here are very professional.

meaning: 集める / 収集する
example: 科學家們收集了很多數據
english: Scientists have collected a lot of data

meaning: 携帯電話
example: 我忘了帶手機出門
english: I forgot to bring my phone when I went out.

meaning: 高速
example: 這條高速公路總是擁擠不堪
english: This highway is always congested.

meaning: 知らせる / 告げる / 教える
example: 我告訴孩子們要誠實守信
english: I tell the children to be honest and trustworthy.

meaning: 試験する / テストする
example: 這款車在極端天氣條件下進行了試驗
english: This car was tested under extreme weather conditions.

meaning: 実験する
example: 科學家們通過實驗證明了這一理論的正確性
english: Scientists have proven the validity of this theory through experiments.

meaning: 試験をする（受ける）
example: 你考試考得怎麼樣？
english: How did you do on your exam?

meaning: 塩
example: 吃太多鹽對身體不好
english: Eating too much salt is bad for your health

meaning: 間食 / おやつ（スナックなども含まれる）
example: 她每天下午三點左右都會吃點零食休息一下
english: She eats a snack and rests around 3 pm every day.

meaning: デザート
example: 這家餐廳的甜點非常有名，是起司蛋糕
english: This restaurant is very famous for its desserts, especially its cheesecake.

meaning: 甘い食品（チョコなど）
example: 醫生建議我少吃甜食，控制血糖
english: The doctor advised me to eat less sweets to control my blood sugar.

meaning: ケーキ
example: 這家店的起司蛋糕非常濃郁，值得一試
english: This shop's cheesecake is very rich and flavorful; it's definitely worth a try.

meaning: 菓子 / ケーキ / クッキー / 菓子類の総称
example: 中秋節時，月餅是一種很受歡迎的傳統糕點
english: Mooncakes are a popular traditional pastry during the Mid-Autumn Festival.

meaning: 飴
example: 辦公室有人放了一罐糖果，大家經過時都會拿一顆
english: Someone left a jar of candy in the office, and everyone would take one as they passed by.

meaning: カップラーメン
example: 半夜肚子餓的時候，泡麵真的是最方便的選擇
english: When you're hungry in the middle of the night, instant noodles are definitely the most convenient option.

meaning: パンケーキ
example: 我點了一份草莓鬆餅，上面還有鮮奶油和巧克力醬
english: I ordered a strawberry pancake, topped with whipped cream and chocolate sauce.

meaning: クッキー
example: 剛剛吃的餅乾脆脆的下次還想吃
english: The cookies I just ate were crispy, I want to eat them again next time.

meaning: 海老
example: 他對蝦過敏，所以外食時都特別小心
english: He is allergic to shrimp, so he is always very careful when eating out.

meaning: 蟹
example: 市場裡賣的螃蟹看起來很新鮮，還在動呢！
english: The crabs sold at the market look very fresh; they're still moving!

meaning: グラス
example: 不小心把玻璃杯打破了，碎片到處都是
english: I accidentally broke a glass, and shards are everywhere.

meaning: 送信する / 発送する
example: 確認發送目的地的變更
english: Confirm change of destination

meaning: メール / 郵便
example: 如果你沒收到郵件，可以檢查垃圾信件夾
english: If you haven't received the email, check your spam/junk mail folder.

meaning: 郵便局
example: 我家附近就有一間郵局，非常方便
english: There's a post office near my house, which is very convenient.

meaning: 郵便配達員
example: 郵差今天送了一個大包裹到我家
english: The postman delivered a large package to my house today.

meaning: 中国語（特に“漢民族の言語”を強調）
example: 有些外國人覺得漢語的字很漂亮
english: Some foreigners think Chinese characters are beautiful.

meaning: やさしい / 容易だ / しやすい
example: 中文的發音不太容易，要多練習
english: Pronunciation in Chinese is not easy; you need to practice more.

meaning: 難しい / 困難である
example: 即使遇到困難，也不能輕易放棄
english: Even when faced with difficulties, we must not give up easily.

meaning: （値段が）高い
example: 在台北市中心租房子真的很貴
english: Renting an apartment in downtown Taipei is really expensive.

meaning: （値段が）安い
example: 你知道哪裡可以買到便宜的機票嗎？
english: Do you know where I can buy cheap plane tickets?

meaning: 地図
example: 地圖上紅點是目前的位置
english: The red dot on the map represents the current location.

meaning: 入る
example: 那裡是辦公室，一般人不能進去
english: That's the office; ordinary people aren't allowed in.

meaning: 置く / 預ける
example: 食物放冰箱就不會壞？
english: Does putting food in the refrigerator prevent it from spoiling?

meaning: のどが乾いた
example: 我很渴，想喝一杯冰水
english: I'm thirsty and want a glass of ice water.

meaning: 机
example: 可以幫我整理一下桌子嗎？
english: Could you tidy up my table for me?

meaning: 椅子
example: 這張椅子的靠背可以調整角度
english: The backrest of this chair can be adjusted.

meaning: ドア
example: 出門的時候，記得把門關好，不要忘記
english: When you leave the house, remember to close the door properly.

meaning: 窓
example: 他坐在窗子旁邊一邊喝咖啡一邊看風景
english: He sat by the window, drinking coffee and enjoying the view.

meaning: 部屋
example: 我的房間很小，所以放不了太多東西
english: My room is small, so I can't put too many things in it.

meaning: 台所 / キッチン
example: 請你幫我把盤子拿到廚房我等一下要洗
english: Please take the plate to the kitchen for me; I need to wash it later.

meaning: 応接間 / 客間
example: 他的客廳很大還有一張很舒服的沙發可以休息
english: His living room is large and has a very comfortable sofa where he can rest.

meaning: トイレ
example: 我先去上廁所
english: I'm going to the restroom first.

meaning: 庭 / 中庭
example: 小狗每天都喜歡在院子裡跑來跑去
english: The puppy loves to run around in the yard every day.

meaning: ホテル
example: 飯店提供免費早餐，種類很多很好吃
english: The hotel offers free breakfast, which has a wide variety of delicious options.

meaning: レストラン
example: 我們今天晚上要去一家很有名的餐廳吃晚餐
english: We're going to have dinner at a very famous restaurant tonight.

meaning: テレビ
example: 我們打算換一台新的電視機，因為舊的壞了
english: We're planning to get a new TV because the old one is broken.

meaning: 枕
example: 如果枕頭太硬，可能會影響睡眠品質
english: If your pillow is too firm, it may affect your sleep quality.

meaning: ペン
example: 請用筆在表格上填寫你的名字和聯絡方式
english: Please fill in your name and contact information on the form using a pen.

meaning: 本
example: 我喜歡在晚上安靜地看書，讓自己放鬆心情
english: I like to read quietly at night to relax.

meaning: タバコ
example: 我不喜歡香煙的味道，聞到會覺得不舒服
english: I don't like the smell of cigarettes; it makes me feel uncomfortable.

meaning: たばこを吸う
example: 我不喜歡別人在我旁邊抽煙，會覺得很不舒服
english: I don't like it when people smoke next to me; it makes me very uncomfortable.

meaning: 決算する / 清算する
example: 可以幫我們分開結帳嗎？
english: Could you help us pay separately?

meaning: 会計する／おごる（文脈による）
example: 我們吃完飯了，可以買單嗎？
english: We've finished eating, may we pay the bill?

meaning: 遊ぶ / いたずらする
example: 不要一直玩手機，對眼睛不好
english: Don't use your phone for too long; it's bad for your eyes.

meaning: 洗う / 写真を現像する
example: 我每天早上起床之後，第一件事就是洗臉
english: The first thing I do every morning after I get up is wash my face.

meaning: 石けん（固形石けん）
example: 洗完手之後，記得把香皂放回原來的位置
english: After washing your hands, remember to put the soap back in its original place.

meaning: シャンプー
example: 如果洗髮精用太多，可能會讓頭髮變得很油
english: Using too much shampoo can make your hair very oily.

meaning: トリートメント
example: 這款護髮乳可以修護受損的頭髮，用起來效果很好
english: This hair conditioner can repair damaged hair and works very well.

meaning: 参加する / 出席する
example: 我明天要參加一個很重要的會議，需要提前準備
english: I have a very important meeting to attend tomorrow, and I need to prepare in advance.

meaning: 大根
example: 我喜歡把蘿蔔糕煎到金黃色，再加一點醬油
english: I like to pan-fry the radish cake until golden brown, then add a little soy sauce.

meaning: 体操
example: 他從小學習體操，現在已經非常厲害了
english: He started learning gymnastics as a child and is now very skilled.

meaning: 歯医者
example: 我每半年都會去看牙醫檢查一次牙齒
english: I go to the dentist for a checkup every six months.

meaning: 歯
example: 吃太多甜食對牙齒不好，容易蛀牙
english: Eating too many sweets is bad for your teeth and can easily lead to cavities.

meaning: 歯を磨く
example: 小孩子應該從小養成每天刷牙的好習慣
english: Children should develop the good habit of brushing their teeth every day from a young age.

meaning: スプーン
example: 請給我一支湯匙
english: Please give me a spoon.

meaning: フォーク
example: 不好意思，我把叉子掉了
english: Sorry, I dropped my fork.

meaning: 箸
example: 請給我一雙筷子
english: Please give me a pair of chopsticks.

meaning: ナイフ
example: 這把刀子很鋒利，使用的時候要小心一點
english: This knife is very sharp; please handle it with care.

meaning: 大皿
example: 你可以幫我洗盤子嗎？
english: Can you help me wash the dishes?

meaning: 小皿 / 取り皿 / 浅い皿
example: 可以給我一個小碟子嗎？
english: Could I have a small plate?

meaning: ジム
example: 我每週都會去健身房運動三次，保持身體健康
english: I go to the gym three times a week to maintain my health.

meaning: 上着
example: 這件上衣很好看，顏色也很適合你
english: This top is very pretty, and the color suits you perfectly.

meaning: ズボン / パンツ
example: 這條褲子有點太長了，可能需要改一下
english: These pants are a bit too long; they might need to be altered.

meaning: スカート
example: 我想買一件新的裙子，準備週末穿出去玩
english: I want to buy a new dress to wear out this weekend.

meaning: 靴
example: 這雙鞋子有點太小了
english: These shoes are a little too small.

meaning: 帽子
example: 今天太陽很大，我戴了一頂帽子出門防曬
english: It was very sunny today, so I wore a hat to protect myself from the sun.

meaning: 財布／バッグ（特に革製）
example: 這個皮包很好看，而且質感很好
english: This leather bag is very beautiful and has a great texture.

meaning: スリッパ
example: 在台灣，很多男性冬天也會穿拖鞋出門
english: In Taiwan, many men also wear slippers out in winter.

meaning: 手提げかばん / ハンドバッグ
example: 拿出她心愛的小提包向同事們炫耀
english: She took out her beloved handbag and showed it off to her colleagues.

meaning: スタンプ（LINE） / ステッカー

meaning: 赤ちゃん
example: 嬰兒的手很小
english: A baby's hands are very small

meaning: 葬式

meaning: （形）悲しみ悼む / 悲嘆に暮れる
example: 感到悲傷
english: Feeling sad

meaning: （動）悲しむ
example: 我不想讓你傷心
english: I don't want to hurt you.

meaning: 安心する
example: 我很想知道為什麼這麼放心
english: I'd really like to know why you're so at ease.

meaning: 妻の母（義理の母）
example: 我岳母對我很好，像自己的媽媽一樣
english: My mother-in-law treats me very well, like my own mother.

meaning: 妻の父（義理の父）
example: 我第一次見岳父的時候非常緊張
english: I was very nervous when I first met my father-in-law.

meaning: 夫の母（義理の母）
example: 婆婆有時候會來家裡住幾天幫忙帶小孩
english: My mother-in-law sometimes comes to stay with us for a few days to help take care of the children.

meaning: 夫の父（義理の父）
example: 公公常常帶孫子去公園散步
english: My father-in-law often takes his grandson for a walk in the park.

meaning: 解脱する / 抜け出す / 逃れる
example: 解脱痛苦
english: Relief from suffering

meaning: 治療する
english: #VALUE!

meaning: 排斥する / 排除する退ける
english: #VALUE!

meaning: （多く否定の形で用い）互いに相手を受け入れる
example: 水火不相容
english: Water and fire are incompatible

meaning: 寂しい / 静かである
example: 不能見面很寂寞
english: It's lonely not being able to meet.

meaning: 禁煙する
example: 我放棄了戒煙
english: I gave up on quitting smoking.

meaning: 禁酒する
example: 醫生命令父親戒酒
english: The doctor ordered the father to quit drinking.

meaning: 続く / 持続する
english: #VALUE!

meaning: ～のために
example: 為了準備考試，我每天熬夜唸書
english: To prepare for the exam, I stayed up all night studying.

meaning: 祝日
english: #VALUE!

meaning: 粉がらし（黄色）
english: #VALUE!

meaning: カード
example: 母親節卡片內容寫什麼？
english: What should you write on a Mother's Day card?

meaning: 影響する / 感化する / 差し支える
example: 這件事對我有很大的影響
english: This matter had a great impact on me.

meaning: 印象 / イメージ
example: 我對這件事沒什麼印象
english: I have no recollection of this.

meaning:
（動）信頼する / 信用して任せる
（名）信頼
example: 他失去了大家的信任
english: He lost everyone's trust.

meaning: 同業（者）
example: 同業間競爭很激烈
english: Competition among peers is fierce

meaning: （n）教育 （v）教育する
example: 教育孩子要遵守交通規則
english: Teach children to obey traffic rules

meaning: 弁償する / 賠賞する
english: #VALUE!

meaning: 歯磨き粉
english: #VALUE!

meaning: リモコン
english: #VALUE!

meaning: 企業を買収・合併する / M&Aを行う
example: Uber宣布併購Foodpanda
english: Uber announces acquisition of Foodpanda

meaning: 探し求める
example: 捜尋方式
english: Search methods

meaning: 扇風機
english: #VALUE!

meaning: 株主 / 出資者
example: 股東出席股東大會可以行使參與管理權
english: Shareholders attending the shareholders' meeting can exercise their right to participate in management.

meaning: 施工する / 工事をする
example: 公園正在施工
english: The park is under construction

meaning: 対象 / 相手
example: 問卷調查對象
english: Questionnaire respondents

meaning: 社会
english: #VALUE!

meaning: 予測する / 予想する
example: 預測颱風
english: Typhoon forecast

meaning: 借金する / 負債を負う
example: 應該儘早償還負債
english: Debts should be repaid as soon as possible.

meaning: 料金を取る / 有料である
example: 這個是免費的還是收費的？
english: Is this free or paid?

meaning: 年齢
example: 這個活動有年齡限制，未滿十八歲不能參加
english: This activity has an age restriction; those under the age of 18 are not eligible to participate.

meaning:
①心の狭い人 / 陰口を言う人 / 意地悪な人
②（古典的表現）徳のない人 / 人格の低い人
english: #VALUE!

meaning: 機構 / 組織 / 施設
example: 學校最近更新了圖書館的設施，學生可以使用電腦查資料，非常方便
english: The school recently upgraded the library facilities, and students can now use computers to search for information, which is very convenient.

meaning: 炊飯器
example: 雖然現在有各種高科技電器，但很多臺灣人還是習慣用傳統的電鍋
english: Although there are various high-tech appliances available now, many Taiwanese people still prefer to use traditional electric rice cookers.

meaning: 冷蔵庫
example: 放冰箱
english: Put in the refrigerator

meaning: 重要・主要な部分
example: 重點加強語言訓練,有助於提高口語水平
english: Focusing on language training will help improve spoken language skills.

meaning: 映画 / 動画
example: 我喜歡在YouTube上看影片
english: I like watching videos on YouTube.

meaning: スターバックス
example: 我們在中山站附近的星巴克等一下吧
english: Let's wait at the Starbucks near Zhongshan Station.

meaning: 節約する
example: 節約能源
english: Energy conservation

meaning: ペットボトル
example: 我們應該重複利用寶特瓶，減少塑料廢棄物對環境的影響
english: We should reuse PET bottles to reduce the environmental impact of plastic waste.

meaning: 周囲の状況・条件 / 環境
example: 環境破壞
english: Environmental damage

meaning: 環境保護
example: 自己帶環保杯買咖啡可以便宜5塊錢
english: Bring your own reusable cup and you can get a 5 yuan discount on coffee.

meaning: 口座を開設する
example: 父母建議我在畢業後馬上開戶，開始管理自己的財務
english: My parents suggested that I open an account immediately after graduation and start managing my own finances.

meaning: 給与口座
example: 在新的公司工作，我需要去銀行開戶並設立一個薪資帳戶
english: For my new job, I need to open a bank account and set up a salary account.

meaning: 期限
example: 你的護照快要到期了，記得在期限前更新
english: Your passport is about to expire, remember to renew it before the deadline.

meaning: 印章 / 判
example: 在合同上簽字時，我使用了印章
english: I used my seal when signing the contract.

meaning: 署名する / サインする
example: 我每天早上孩子的聯絡簿上簽名
english: I sign my child's communication book every morning.

meaning: 外国人労働者
example: 為了改善外勞的工作條件，新的法律已經頒布
english: New laws have been enacted to improve working conditions for foreign workers.

meaning: 契約書
example: 我昨天剛與房東更新了我們的租房契約
english: I just updated our rental agreement with the landlord yesterday.

meaning: 契約 / 契約書
example: 如果對合約有疑問，可以詢問律師
english: If you have any questions about the contract, you can consult a lawyer.

meaning: 愚痴を言う / 文句を言う
example: 老婆向老公抱怨
english: Wife complains to husband

meaning: 気ままな / わがままな
example: 他的任性行為讓周圍的人感到困擾
english: His willful behavior bothered those around him.

meaning: 違約金
example: 如果合約提前終止，你必須支付違約金
english: If the contract is terminated early, you must pay a penalty.

meaning: むだに費やす / むだにする
example: 不要白費時間去做無意義的事情
english: Don't waste time doing meaningless things.

meaning: 売れ行きがよい
example: 這款新產品在市場上非常熱銷
english: This new product is selling very well in the market.

meaning: 時間を制限する /
example: 網路上的限時商品很快就賣完了
english: Limited-time offers online sold out quickly.

meaning: 書斎
example: 爸爸在書房裡工作，不要打擾他
english: Dad is working in his study, don't disturb him.

meaning: 選ぶ / 選択する
example: 這是一個困難的選擇，但我已經決定了
english: This was a difficult choice, but I've made my decision.

meaning: 緊張する
example: 第一次見面時，我們都感到有點緊張
english: We were both a little nervous when we first met.

meaning: 信じられない（驚いたり / 予想外のことが起きたりしたとき）
example: 她說的話讓我不敢相信
english: What she said made me unable to believe it.

meaning: 貯金
example: 我每個月都會存款一部分的薪水
english: I save a portion of my salary every month.

meaning: 貯金する
example: 孩子存錢買他喜歡的玩具
english: The child saves money to buy the toy he likes.

meaning: 預金などを引き出す
example: 在自動提款機上提款時，一定要注意安全
english: When withdrawing money from an ATM, always be mindful of safety.

meaning: キャッシュカード
example: 我的提款卡被非法使用了，所以我已經聯絡銀行停用了
english: My debit card was used illegally, so I have contacted the bank to deactivate it.

meaning: 投資する
example: 投資股票需要謹慎選擇公司
english: Investing in stocks requires careful company selection.

meaning: 税金
example: 進口商品需要繳納關稅
english: Imported goods are subject to tariffs.

meaning: 年俸 / 年収
example: 他的年薪大約是一百萬新台幣
english: His annual salary is approximately one million New Taiwan Dollars.

meaning: 責任 / 責務
example: 我有責任向大家說明清楚
english: I have a responsibility to explain this clearly to everyone.

meaning: 直接的な / じかに
example: 他說話比直接,有時候我覺得不太舒服
english: He speaks very directly, which sometimes makes me uncomfortable.

meaning: 間接的な / 間接的に
example: 間接聽到
english: Heard indirectly

meaning: 解決する
example: 網頁的問題已經解決了嗎？
english: Has the problem with the webpage been resolved?

meaning: （接）そこで / それで
example: 昨天我看到這件衣服特別符合我心意,於是就買了下來
english: I saw this dress yesterday and it really suited my taste, so I bought it.

meaning: （接）…なので / …だから（…である）
example: 因為下雨，所以我沒出門
english: I didn't go out because of the rain.

meaning: 平均する
example: 我們班的數學考試平均分數是85分
english: The average score of our class in the math exam was 85.

meaning: 薬局
example: 我媽媽常常去藥局買保健食品，像是維他命或鈣片
english: My mother often goes to the pharmacy to buy health supplements, such as vitamins or calcium tablets.

meaning: 整形
example: 她最近去做了整形手術，現在看起來年輕多了
english: She recently had plastic surgery and now looks much younger.

meaning: 解放される / 抜け出す / 解き放たれる / 脱却する
example: 終於從壓力中解脫了
english: Finally free from the pressure

meaning: 和らげる / 緩和する / 解消する（主にストレスや感情 / 緊張などの心理的なもの）
example: 她最近壓力很大，所以常去做瑜伽來紓解心情
english: She's been under a lot of stress lately, so she often does yoga to relieve her stress.

meaning: 寄宿舎 / 寮
example: 宿舍裡有很多便利設施，包括圖書館 / 健身房和自習室
english: The dormitory has many convenient facilities, including a library/gym and study rooms.

meaning: 自意識過剰
example: 自我感覺良好的同事總是認為自己不會犯錯
english: A colleague with a high opinion of himself always believes he will never make a mistake.

meaning:
（動）料金を取る / 有料である
（名）料金徴収 / 料金
example: 我們的課程每堂課收費五百元，包含教材和指導費用
english: Our courses cost 500 yuan per lesson, which includes textbooks and instruction fees.

meaning: 酔っ払う / 酒に酔う
example: 他喝醉的時候會變得很愛說話，什麼事情都想分享
english: When he's drunk, he becomes very talkative and wants to share everything.

meaning: 酒癖
example: 他的酒品不太好，喝醉常常亂說話
english: He has a bad temper when drunk; he often talks nonsense.

meaning: 酒飲み / 酒好き / アル中
example: 她男朋友以前是個酒鬼，後來為了健康開始戒酒了
english: Her boyfriend used to be an alcoholic, but he quit drinking for his health.

meaning: 状況 / 事態 / 事情 / 様子
example: 現在的經濟情況不太穩定，很多公司都開始控制預算
english: The current economic situation is unstable, and many companies have begun to control their budgets.

meaning: セクハラ
example: 在公司裡，如果遇到性騷擾的情況，應該立刻向主管或人資反映
english: If you experience sexual harassment at work, you should immediately report it to your supervisor or HR.

meaning: 壊れない / 丈夫である / 頑丈である
example: 他的信念非常堅固，從未動搖
english: His belief was very firm and never wavered.

meaning:
（動）受ける / 感じる
（名）印象 / 感じ取ること
example: 我理解你的感受
english: I understand how you feel.

meaning: 反省する
example: 反省自己的錯誤是成長的重要步驟
english: Reflecting on one's own mistakes is an important step in growth.

meaning: 交際費
example: 老闆要求我們節省交際費，減少不必要的支出
english: Our boss asked us to save on entertainment expenses and reduce unnecessary expenditures.

meaning: 芸能人
example: 藝人動態經常成為新聞的頭條，吸引了大量的讀者
english: Celebrity news frequently makes headlines, attracting a large readership.

meaning: 依存症
example: 重大網路成癮症需要專業的心理治療和家庭支持
english: Severe internet addiction requires professional psychological treatment and family support.

meaning: 模造して本物に見せかける
example: 市場上有很多仿冒品，購買時要特別小心
english: There are many counterfeit products on the market, so be extra careful when buying them.

meaning: 夢中になる / 魅了される / ハマる
example: 她對韓劇非常著迷，一口氣看了好幾集
english: She was fascinated by Korean dramas and watched several episodes in one go.

meaning: 夢中になる
example: 我來台灣以後,對重訓著迷
english: After I came to Taiwan, I became fascinated with weight training.

meaning: 調査する
example: 信用卡的不正使用情況，目前銀行正在調查中
english: The bank is currently investigating the misuse of the credit card.

meaning: 詐欺を働く
example: 最近有很多詐騙電話
english: There have been many scam calls recently.

meaning: 終止する
example: 因安全問題，建設工程被終止了
english: The construction project was terminated due to safety concerns.

meaning: 手荷物の送付を委託する / 託送する
example: 你有没有要托運的行李？
english: Do you have any luggage to check in?

meaning: 納める / 納付する
example: 繳納稅款是每個公民的義務
english: Paying taxes is the duty of every citizen.

meaning: 受け取る / 手に入る
example: 他收到包裹時非常高興
english: He was very happy when he received the package.

meaning: 筋肉痛
example: 做完重訓後，我的手臂肌肉痠痛無法抬起來
english: After finishing my weight training, my arm muscles were sore that I couldn't lift them.

meaning: 階段
example: 這個樓梯很陡，走的時候要注意
english: This staircase is very steep, please be careful when you go up it.

meaning: 階段 / はしご
example: 他一步一步地爬上了階梯
english: He climbed the stairs step by step.

meaning: ぶるぶる震える / 身震いする
example: 病人因發燒而不停地發抖
english: The patient was shivering uncontrollably due to a fever.

meaning: （副）…する方法がない
example: 我無法接受這個決定
english: I cannot accept this decision.

meaning: 貢献する / 捧げる
example: 他的努力對公司有很大的貢獻
english: His efforts have made a great contribution to the company.

meaning: （名）同時 （接）それと同時に
example: 我打掃的時候同時洗衣服
english: I do laundry while cleaning.

meaning: パスワード
example: 銀行建議客戶設置強密碼來保護帳戶，並定期檢查安全設定
english: Banks recommend that customers set strong passwords to protect their accounts and regularly review their security settings.

meaning: 設定する / 構成する / 組み立てる
example: 他忘記了無線網路的設定，所以無法連接網路
english: He forgot his Wi-Fi settings, so he couldn't connect to the internet.

meaning: 雷雨
example: 昨天晚上有一場猛烈的雷雨，令人無法入睡
english: There was a violent thunderstorm last night, making it impossible to sleep.

meaning: 避暑をする / 暑さをしのぐ
example: 夏天到了，我們一家人決定去海邊消暑
english: Summer is here, and our family has decided to go to the beach to escape the heat.

meaning: （n）保証 （v）保証する
example: 我保證你的幸福
english: I guarantee your happiness.

meaning: 保障する
example: 我們的產品利潤不錯，但我們需要找到方法來保障長期的市場需求
english: Our products are profitable, but we need to find ways to ensure long-term market demand.

meaning: 落ちる / 失う / 取り除く
example: 他的手机掉在地上了
english: His phone fell to the ground.

meaning: 失う / 紛失する / 投げ捨てる
example: 我丢了钱包
english: I lost my wallet.

meaning: 投げ捨てる
example: 我丢掉了旧的手机
english: I lost my old phone

meaning: 回転率
example: 我們公司為了改善庫存周轉率，重新檢討了庫存管理
english: In order to improve inventory turnover, our company has re-examined its inventory management.

meaning: プロモーション
example: 便利商店正在進行促銷活動，吸引更多顧客
english: Convenience stores are running promotions to attract more customers.

meaning: スポンサー / 寄付
example: 感謝大家的抖內，我會繼續努力創作更好的內容
english: Thank you everyone for your support on Douyin. I will continue to work hard to create better content.

meaning: 診察費
example: 請問這家医院的掛號費要多少？
english: How much is the registration fee at this hospital?

meaning: 専門 / 専門学校
example: 我需要預約心臟專科的門診
english: I need to make an appointment with a cardiologist.

meaning: 診療所
example: 診所裡的護士很友善，讓人感到安心
english: The nurses at the clinic were very friendly, which made me feel at ease.

meaning: 内科
example: 內科診所的等待時間通常比較長，特別是冬天感冒流行的時候
english: Waiting times at internal medicine clinics are usually quite long, especially during the winter flu season.

meaning: 運転免許証
example: 如果你遺失了駕照，需要儘快向當地的交通管理局報告
english: If you lose your driver's license, you need to report it to your local traffic management authority as soon as possible.

meaning: 料金を支払う（固定費・公共料金）
example: 你可以告訴我在線上怎麼繳手機費嗎？
english: Can you tell me how to pay my phone bill online?

meaning: 税金
example: 我們每年都需要在五月底前完成所得稅的繳納
english: We are required to pay our income tax by the end of May each year.

meaning: 政府
example: 面對少子化問題，政府正在考慮提供更多育兒補助
english: In response to the declining birth rate, the government is considering providing more childcare subsidies.

meaning: 振込
example: 每個月的房租我都設置了自動轉帳，這樣就不會忘記支付
english: I've set up automatic transfers for my monthly rent so I won't forget to pay.

meaning: 設立する，設置する
example: 設置自動付款後，每月的水電費再也不會逾期
english: After setting up automatic payment, your monthly utility bills will never be overdue.

meaning: モバイル決済 / キャッシュレス決済
example: 108年行動支付交易金額可望突破千億元
english: Mobile payment transaction volume is expected to exceed NT$100 billion in 2019.

meaning: 保存期限
example: 冰箱裡的肉類保存期限已經過了，應該丟掉
english: The meat in the refrigerator has expired and should be thrown away.

meaning: 展示する / 明らかに示す
example: 新的鞋子到貨後，馬上被展示出來
english: The new shoes were displayed immediately after they arrived.

meaning: 規定する / 制限する / 限定する
example: 我在網路上訂購了一些日本限定的化妝品
english: I ordered some Japanese-exclusive cosmetics online.

meaning: 数量・範囲を限定する
example: 這款鞋子是限量版，全世界只有一百雙
english: These shoes are a limited edition; only one hundred pairs exist worldwide.

meaning: 保護する / 大事にする
example: 保護自己的身體才是最重要的
english: Protecting your own body is the most important thing.

meaning: 料理を作る
example: 他每天都在家做菜
english: He cooks at home every day.

meaning: 料理する
example: 他們學習如何用不同的食材來烹飪
english: They learned how to cook with different ingredients.

meaning: データ
example: 他使用數據來支持他的研究結論
english: He used data to support his research conclusions.

meaning: …に郵送する
example: 我會把禮物寄給你
english: I will send you the gift.

meaning: クレーンゲーム
example: 雖然夾娃娃機看起來很簡單，但實際上要夾中獎品並不容易
english: Although claw machines look simple, winning a prize is actually not easy.

meaning: サボる
example: 他總是能巧妙地摸魚
english: He always manages to cleverly slip away.

meaning: 閑散期
example: 這款商品在夏天是淡季，需求減少
english: This product is in its off-season during the summer, so demand decreases.

meaning: 繁忙期
example: 旺季時，機票和飯店的價格都會上漲
english: During peak season, airfares and hotel prices will increase.

meaning: 値下げ
example: 降價促銷使得這款商品的銷售量大幅增加
english: The price reduction and promotion led to a significant increase in sales of this product.

meaning: モザイク
example: 為了保護當事人的隱私，我們將他的臉部用馬賽克遮住了
english: To protect the privacy of the person involved, we have blurred his face.

meaning: 切る / 途切れる / 断つ
example: 醫生建議他斷了所有不健康的飲食習慣
english: The doctor advised him to give up all unhealthy eating habits.

meaning: 食器用洗剤
example: 媽媽買了一瓶新款的洗碗精，說這個去油效果特別好
english: Mom bought a new bottle of dish soap, saying it's especially good at removing grease.

meaning: リスク
example: 在創業過程中，每個決定都需要承擔風險
english: In the process of starting a business, every decision involves taking risks.

meaning: くしゃみ
example: 當他聞到花粉時，會不停地打噴嚏
english: He sneezes incessantly when he smells pollen.

meaning: 輸入する / 入港する
example: 政府對進口產品的關稅有所調整
english: The government has adjusted tariffs on imported products.

meaning: 輸出する / 出港する
example: 政府鼓勵企業擴大出口，增加國外收入
english: The government encourages businesses to expand exports and increase foreign income.

meaning: 強制する
example: 他們的老闆強迫員工參加每週的聚餐
english: Their boss forced employees to attend weekly dinners.

meaning: 団体 / チーム
example: 團隊的每個人都在為共同的目標而努力
english: Everyone on the team is working towards a common goal.

meaning: 同業
example: 我們的公司在同業中具有競爭優勢，產品質量優秀
english: Our company has a competitive advantage in the industry, and our products are of excellent quality.

meaning: 同鄉人
example: 我們是同鄉，所以特別有共同話題
english: We're from the same hometown, so we have a lot in common.

meaning: 成長する・伸びる
example: 政府採取了一系列措施來促進經濟增長
english: The government has taken a series of measures to promote economic growth.

meaning: 増える / 増やす
example: 為了應對旺季，我們需要增加人手
english: To cope with the peak season, we need to increase manpower.

meaning: 促進する / 高める / 増進する / 深める
example: 運動有助於增進健康
english: Exercise helps improve health

meaning: 減る / 減らす
example: 公司的員工數量減少了
english: The company's number of employees has decreased.

meaning: 約束する / 前もって取り決める
example: 她在會議上強調了遵守約定的重要性
english: She emphasized the importance of keeping promises at the meeting.

meaning: 予定する / あらかじめ定める
example: 我預定七月帶孩子們去小人國
english: I've planned to take the kids to Lilliput in July.

meaning: 予約する / 注文する
example: 我已經預訂了兩張今晚的電影票
english: I've already booked two movie tickets for tonight.

meaning: （助） …するつもりだ
example: 我們打算這個週末去爬山
english: We're planning to go hiking this weekend.

meaning: 夫婦
example: 夫妻都要為家庭的幸福共同努力
english: Both husband and wife should work together for the happiness of the family.

meaning: 極限 / 限界
example: 我的專注時間極限是一個半小時
english: My maximum concentration time is one and a half hours.

meaning: 配布する / 配る / 渡す / 下ろす
example: 第一次薪水發下來的時候你怎麼用
english: How do you use your first paycheck?

meaning: アラーム / 警報
example: 我的手機收到警報，提醒我們要注意即將到來的地震
english: My phone received an alert, reminding us to be aware of an impending earthquake.

meaning: 洪水
example: 昨天晚上的雷雨讓市內部分地區發生了淹水
english: Last night's thunderstorms caused flooding in parts of the city.

meaning: 蕎麦
example: 昨天午餐吃了美味的蕎麥
english: I had delicious buckwheat for lunch yesterday.

meaning: 口論する / 言い争う
example: 他們昨天因為一點小事吵架了
english: They had a fight yesterday over something trivial.

meaning: 口論する / 言い争う
example: 他們總是為了一些小事而争吵
english: They always argue over trivial things.

meaning: 論争する / 議論しあう
example: 他們在會議上對這個問題展開了激烈的争論
english: They engaged in a heated debate on this issue at the meeting.

meaning: （形） 客で満員である
example: 這家餐廳每天晚上都客滿，建議提前預約
english: This restaurant is always full every night, so reservations are highly recommended.

meaning: 強調する / 強く主張する
example: 公司會議上，經理強調了團隊合作的重要性
english: During the company meeting, the manager emphasized the importance of teamwork.

meaning: 情報 / ニュース
example: 新聞報導了那場事故的最新消息
english: News reports provided the latest updates on the accident.

meaning: 殺す
example: 她因涉嫌殺人而被起訴
english: She was charged with murder.

meaning: 勇気
example: 面對困難時，我們需要勇氣來克服它們
english: When faced with difficulties, we need courage to overcome them.

meaning: 胸部
example: 運動後，他感覺胸部肌肉有點酸痛
english: After exercising, he felt a little soreness in his chest muscles.

meaning: 靴下
example: 因為襪子破了個洞，所以扔掉了
english: I threw away the socks because they had a hole in them.

meaning: しっかり身につける
example: 他花了很多時間來熟練掌握這項技能
english: He spent a lot of time mastering this skill.

meaning: ビーチ
example: 我們計劃週末去海灘露營
english: We plan to go camping at the beach this weekend.

meaning: 絆創膏
example: 割到手指後，我貼了一個OK繃來止血
english: After cutting my finger, I put on a band-aid to stop the bleeding.

meaning: 厚くてふかふかしている / 手厚い
example: 這家公司提供的福利非常豐厚，吸引了許多優秀人才
english: This company offers very generous benefits, attracting many outstanding talents.

meaning: 呼吸する
example: 每天早上做幾次深呼吸，對身體很有幫助
english: Taking a few deep breaths every morning is very beneficial to your health.

meaning: ついに / とうとう
example: 我花了一個月，終於找到了適合的工作
english: It took me a month to finally find a suitable job.

meaning: （動）上手く合う / 合致する / 似合う
example: 這件衣服適合你
english: This outfit suits you.

meaning: （形）適切な / 都合のよい / ぴったりな
example: 這是一個合適的選擇
english: This is a suitable choice.

meaning: （前）…として / …の身として
example: 作為一名父親，他感到有責任教育好自己的孩子
english: As a father, he felt it was his responsibility to educate his children well.

meaning: 責任 / 責務
example: 我有責任向大家說明清楚
english: I have a responsibility to explain this clearly to everyone.

meaning: ～に夢中になる
example: 我最近迷上做麵包，你要不要吃吃看？
english: I've recently become obsessed with baking bread. Would you like to try some?

meaning: 衝動買い
example: 衝動購買常常會讓人後悔
english: Impulsive purchases often lead to regret.

meaning: （動）引っ張る / 伸ばす （副）とても
example: 你覺得這個方法如何？我覺得學習挺快的，效果也不錯
english: What do you think of this method? I think it's quite fast for learning and the results are good.

meaning: ゆったりしている / ゆとりがある
example: 這件衣服非常寬鬆，穿起來很舒服
english: This garment is very loose and comfortable to wear.

meaning: 心配り / 気遣い / 親密な
example: 這個貼心的設計讓使用者感到非常方便
english: This thoughtful design makes it very convenient for users.

meaning: 設計する / デザインする
example: 他正在學習室內設計，並希望成為一名專業的設計師
english: He is studying interior design and hopes to become a professional designer.

meaning: 鉄板焼
example: 我最喜歡的鐵板燒料理是牛排和蝦
english: My favorite teppanyaki dishes are steak and shrimp.

meaning: オムライス
example: 孩子們非常喜歡蛋包飯，因為他們可以用番茄醬在上面畫畫
english: Kids love omelet rice because they can draw on it with ketchup.

meaning: 中止する / 中止となる
example: 由於颱風的影響，學校決定中止今天的課程
english: Due to the impact of the typhoon, the school has decided to suspend classes today.

meaning: ピクニック
example: 在陽光下和朋友們野餐是最愉快的事情之一
english: Having a picnic with friends in the sunshine is one of the most enjoyable things.

meaning: 世代 / 代々
example: Z世代的年輕人喜歡通過社交媒體分享他們的生活
english: Gen Z young people like to share their lives through social media.

meaning: （酒食などで客を）もてなす
example: 公司在高級餐廳招待客戶
english: The company entertains clients at upscale restaurants.

meaning: 滞在する
example: 他因公事在台北逗留了幾天
english: He stayed in Taipei for a few days on business.

meaning: 座席 / 地位 / ポスト
example: 公司正在尋找合適的人選來填補這個位子
english: The company is looking for a suitable candidate to fill this position.

meaning: 上限 / 最大限
example: 國外出差旅費的上限是一天多少錢？
english: What is the maximum daily travel expense limit for overseas business trips?

meaning: 割り勘
example: 晚餐時和朋友去吃火鍋，結帳時我們平均分攤了費用
english: I went out for hot pot with friends for dinner, and we split the bill equally.

meaning: （皮などを）むく / はぐ
example: 雖然蝦子很好吃，但要剝殼有點麻煩
english: Although the shrimp were delicious, peeling them was a bit of a hassle.

meaning: ミツバチ
example: 小朋友們在農場裡觀察蜜蜂的生活習性
english: Children observe the living habits of bees at the farm.

meaning: ハチミツ
example: 我喜歡在麵包上抹上一層蜂蜜當早餐
english: I like to spread a layer of honey on my bread for breakfast.

meaning: 批判する
example: 他不怕別人的批判，勇敢地表達自己的意見
english: He is not afraid of criticism and bravely expresses his opinions.

meaning: 社交
example: 在商業世界中，良好的社交技巧是非常重要的
english: In the business world, good social skills are very important.

meaning: 心配する / 安心できない
example: 請不要擔心，一切都會好起來的
english: Please don't worry, everything will be alright.

meaning: 事 / 事柄 / 仕事 / 職務 / 用 / 用事
example: 他總是能夠冷靜地面對困難的事情
english: He is always able to calmly face difficult situations.

meaning: つり合いがとれている / バランスがとれている
example: 健康的飲食應該注重營養的均衡
english: A healthy diet should focus on a balanced intake of nutrients.

meaning: 将来 / 未来
example: 將來我希望能夠環遊世界
english: In the future, I hope to travel around the world.

meaning: 俳優
example: 這個男演員好高好帥喔
english: This actor is so tall and handsome!

meaning: プロジェクト
example: 為了完成這個項目，我們必須分工合作
english: To complete this project, we must divide the work and cooperate.

meaning: 注意深い / 綿密である / 用心深い
example: 老師在課堂上解釋得非常仔細，所有同學都了解了
english: The teacher explained it very carefully in class, and all the students understood.

meaning: 誇張する / 半端ない
example: 他的故事聽起來太誇張，不太可信
english: His story sounds too exaggerated and unbelievable.

meaning: （名）才能 / 能力 （助）〜して初めて〜できる
example: 只有通過這次考試，你才能進入下一個階段
english: Only by passing this exam can you advance to the next stage.

meaning: 関与する / 巻き込む
example: 他的行為牽扯了很多人，大家都很不滿
english: His actions have implicated many people, and everyone is very dissatisfied.

meaning: 改正する / 改訂する / 修正する
example: 他們正在修改合同的條款
english: They are revising the terms of the contract.

meaning: 大笑いする / 腹を抱えて笑う
example: 他講的笑話太好笑了，大家都捧腹大笑
english: His jokes were so funny that everyone burst into laughter.

meaning: （副）これまで一度も～ない / 全く～ない
example: 他從不抱怨工作
english: He never complained about his work.

meaning: 批判する / 批評する
example: 批評應該是建設性的，而不是破壞性的
english: Criticism should be constructive, not destructive.

meaning: 証明写真
example: 我需要拍一張新的證件照
english: I need to take a new ID photo.

meaning: 擦る / 拭く / かする
example: 兩輛車差點而擦碰
english: The two cars almost collided.

meaning: 言い訳する / 口実にする
example: 你不要再找借口了，趕快開始工作吧
english: Stop making excuses and get to work!

meaning: 出会う。ぶつかる
example: 我昨天在公園遇到了一個老朋友
english: I ran into an old friend in the park yesterday.

meaning: お詫びとして～する
example: 我請你喝咖啡當作賠罪
english: I'll buy you coffee as an apology.

meaning: 先ほど / 今しがた
example: 我剛才看到了一隻可愛的小貓
english: I just saw a cute little kitten.

meaning: 水に浸す
example: 接連幾天下大雨，許多農作物因泡水過久而腐爛
english: After several days of heavy rain, many crops rotted due to prolonged waterlogging.

meaning: 発表する / 公表する / 宣言する
example: 政府宣布了疫情的最新情況
english: The government announced the latest situation regarding the epidemic.

meaning: 計画
example: 我們計劃開公司並提供創新的服務
english: We plan to start a company and provide innovative services.

meaning: 突然
example: 天氣突然變冷了，我得多穿件衣服
english: The weather suddenly turned cold; I need to wear an extra layer.

meaning: 報告する / 伝える
example: 我們得在明天之前提交報告
english: We need to submit the report by tomorrow.

meaning: 一日中
example: 今天我一整天都在家
english: I stayed home all day today.

meaning: 法律
example: 這個國家的法律非常嚴格，違反者會受到嚴懲
english: This country has very strict laws, and violators will be severely punished.

meaning: 困惑している / とまどっている
example: 他解釋得不清楚，讓大家更加困惑
english: His explanation was unclear, which only made everyone more confused.

meaning: 環境
example: 良好的工作環境能提高效率
english: A good working environment can improve efficiency.

meaning: 信じる / 信用する
example: 你應該相信自己的能力
english: You should believe in your abilities

meaning: 速さ / スピード
example: 車子的速度不能超過每小時六十公里
english: The vehicle's speed must not exceed 60 kilometers per hour.

meaning: 手続き
example: 辦理護照的手續非常繁瑣
english: The process of applying for a passport is very complicated.

meaning: ライセンス / 許可書 / 免許証
example: 沒有執照就不能經營餐廳
english: You can't operate a restaurant without a license.

meaning: ビジネスチャンス
example: 在這個領域，有許多潛在的商機
english: There are many potential business opportunities in this field.

meaning: やる気
example: 她的衝勁讓我們團隊達成了目標
english: Her drive helped our team achieve our goals.

meaning: （動）戦略・方策を決定する （名） 決定された策略
example: 公司的長期決策包括市場擴展和技術創新
english: The company's long-term decisions include market expansion and technological innovation.

meaning: 年末ボーナス
example: 公司宣布今年的年終獎金將增加20%
english: The company announced that this year's year-end bonus will increase by 20%.

meaning: タイミング
example: 選擇正確的時機是成功的關鍵
english: Choosing the right timing is key to success.

meaning: 後悔する
example: 我後悔沒有早點開始學習中文
english: I regret not starting to learn Chinese sooner.

meaning: （名）永遠 （副）永久に / 永遠に
example: 這份友情將永遠不變
english: This friendship will last forever.

meaning: 財産 / 資産 / 産業
example: 新的技術對產業有很大的影響
english: New technologies have a significant impact on industries.

meaning: 正しい
example: 請按照正確的步驟操作
english: Please follow the correct steps.

meaning: 申請書
example: 你可以在網上下載申請書
english: You can download the application form online.

meaning: 記入する / 書き込む
example: 填寫完畢後，請將表格交給櫃台
english: After you have finished filling out the form, please hand it to the counter.

meaning: 営業日
example: 簽證申請處理時間需要三個工作天
english: Visa application processing time is three business days.

meaning: 罰金
example: 在禁煙區吸煙會被罰金
english: Smoking in a no-smoking area will result in a fine.

meaning: 永住権
example: 居住在台灣滿五年後，就可以申請永住權
english: After residing in Taiwan for five years, one can apply for permanent residency.

meaning: （動）コメントする （名）コメント
example: 這段影片的YouTube留言數量非常多
english: This video has a lot of comments on YouTube.

meaning: 半導体
example: 半導體在現代電子產品中起著重要作用
english: Semiconductors play a vital role in modern electronic products.

meaning: 品質
example: 品質檢測是生產過程中的重要環節
english: Quality inspection is a crucial part of the production process.

meaning: イノベーション
example: 他們的產品設計非常創新
english: Their product designs are highly innovative.

meaning: 現実
example: 你需要面對現實，接受這個事實
english: You need to face reality and accept this fact.

meaning: 定年退職する
example: 退休後，他計劃去環遊世界
english: After retiring, he plans to travel around the world.

meaning: 建設する
example: 中國大陸的一家大型建設公司最近倒閉了
english: A large construction company in mainland China recently went bankrupt.

meaning: 誠実である / 約束を守る
example: 誠信能夠建立長久的合作關係
english: Integrity can build long-term cooperative relationships.

meaning: （v）ストックする （n） 在庫品 / ストック
example: 由於庫存不足，我們無法立即發貨
english: Due to insufficient stock, we are unable to ship immediately.

meaning: 原価 / コスト
example: 我們需要降低生產成本
english: We need to reduce production costs

meaning: 共有する
example: 謝謝你的分享，這對我很有幫助
english: Thank you for sharing, it was very helpful to me.

meaning: ソーシャルメディア
example: 她在社交媒體上分享了旅行照片
english: She shared travel photos on social media.

meaning: 紹介する
example: 我把我最好的朋友介紹給她了
english: I introduced my best friend to her.

meaning: 推測する / 当てる
example: 你猜這個包包多少錢？
english: How much do you think this bag costs?

meaning: （副）いつも / 常に
example: 我總是忘記帶鑰匙
english: I always forget to bring my keys.

meaning: （副）しばしば / 頻繁に
example: 我經常去那家咖啡廳
english: I often go to that coffee shop

meaning: （副）ずっと / いつも / 絶えず
example: 他一直在工作，沒有休息
english: He kept working without rest.

meaning: 獲得する
example: 通過努力工作，他獲得了升職機會
english: Through hard work, he earned a promotion.

meaning: オリンピック
example: 每個國家都期待在奧運上獲得金牌
english: Every country hopes to win gold medals at the Olympics.

meaning: 嫉妬
example: 妹妹嫉妒姐姐的美貌
english: The younger sister was jealous of her older sister's beauty.

meaning: 責める / 非難する
example: 媒體責備政府對言論自由的限制
english: The media criticized the government for restricting freedom of speech.

meaning: 反省する
example: 我們需要反省這次失敗的原因
english: We need to reflect on the reasons for this failure.

meaning: 光栄である / 栄誉ある
example: 能夠成為這個團隊的一員，我感到非常光榮
english: I feel very honored to be a member of this team.

meaning: 延期する
example: 比賽因天氣原因被延期了
english: The match was postponed due to weather conditions.

meaning: 炎上する
example: 這部影片發布後迅速炎上
english: The film quickly went viral after its release.

meaning: 皮肉
example: 他經常用幽默的方式諷刺別人
english: He often uses humor to satirize others.

meaning: （形）誇らしい
example: 她自豪地參加了奧運會，並為國家奪得了金牌
english: She proudly participated in the Olympics and won a gold medal for her country.

meaning: ワーキングホリデー
example: 我在台灣度假打工時認識了很多朋友
english: I made many friends while working and vacationing in Taiwan.

meaning: 指輪
example: 他買了一枚鑽石戒指送給她
english: He bought her a diamond ring.

meaning: 面接
example: 面試新人時，我會特別注意他們的溝通能力
english: When interviewing new candidates, I pay special attention to their communication skills.

meaning: （名） 経歴 / 体験 / 経験 （動） 体験する，経験する
example: 經歷了創業的自由，他再也不想回到公司工作的環境
english: Having experienced the freedom of entrepreneurship, he never wanted to return to the environment of working in a company.

meaning: 克服する
example: 每次克服困難，我都會變得更強
english: Every time I overcome a difficulty, I become stronger.

meaning: コミュニケーション
example: 溝通技巧在職場上非常重要
english: Communication skills are very important in the workplace.

meaning: （成）単独である分野の責任者となる / ある分野の仕事を任せられる．
example: 在這家公司工作了五年後，他終於可以獨當一面了
english: After working at this company for five years, he was finally able to work independently.

meaning: 新卒
example: 這家公司正在招聘應屆畢業生
english: This company is hiring recent graduates.

meaning: 双子（同性）
example: 她生了一對雙胞胎
english: She gave birth to twins.

meaning: 男女の双子（男の子＋女の子の双子）
example: 我朋友家有一對龍鳳胎，很可愛
english: My friend has a pair of adorable twins, a boy and a girl.

meaning: 細かいことにこだわる / 気が小さい / 心が狭い
example: 他很小心眼，無法容忍別人的錯誤
english: He is petty and cannot tolerate other people's mistakes.

meaning: 明るい / 朗らかである
example: 他開朗的性格讓工作環境更加愉快
english: His cheerful personality made the work environment more pleasant.

meaning: 暗い / 重苦しい
example: 他的陰沉性格讓人難以親近
english: His gloomy personality made him difficult to approach.

meaning: 労働する
example: 工廠裡的勞動環境需要改善
english: The working conditions in the factory need to be improved.

meaning: 解雇する（クビ）
example: 她因為違反公司規定被開除了
english: She was fired for violating company rules.

meaning: リストラする
example: 裁員消息讓很多員工感到不安
english: The news of layoffs has made many employees uneasy.

meaning: 解雇される
example: 被離職的員工可以申請失業救濟
english: Employees who are laid off can apply for unemployment benefits.

meaning: 水準 / レベル
example: 他們的技術水準在業界內首屈一指
english: Their technical level is second to none in the industry.

meaning: 改善する
example: 定期運動可以有效改善健康狀況
english: Regular exercise can effectively improve health.

meaning: 生まれる
example: 我在東京出生並長大
english: I was born and raised in Tokyo.

meaning: 取り消す / 取りやめる / 廃止する
example: 如果你需要取消訂房，請提前通知我們
english: If you need to cancel your reservation, please notify us in advance.

meaning: （通貨の）価値が下がる
example: 日幣貶值的影響讓很多外國人更喜歡來日本旅遊
english: The depreciation of the Japanese yen has made Japan a more attractive tourist destination for many foreigners.

meaning: （通貨の）価値が上がる
example: 他投資的股票在短時間內升值了
english: The stocks he invested in appreciated in a short period of time.

meaning: 残酷である / むごい
example: 戰爭帶來了殘酷的現實
english: War brought about a cruel reality.

meaning:
（動）脅す
（名）脅威 / 脅迫
example: 公司內部資料外洩後，許多員工感覺受到個資威脅
english: After the company's internal data was leaked, many employees felt threatened by their personal information.

meaning: 炒める
example: 他最愛吃媽媽做的豬肉炒麵
english: His favorite food is pork fried noodles made by his mother.

meaning: 古い / 時代遅れの
example: 他們住在一棟非常舊的房子裡
english: They lived in a very old house.

meaning: こする / 拭（ふ）く / 磨く
example: 請用乾布擦乾餐具
english: Please wipe the tableware dry with a clean cloth.

meaning: （名）通勤 （動）通勤する
example: 我每天花一個小時通勤到公司
english: I spend an hour commuting to the company every day.

meaning: 真似する
example: 許多公司開始仿效這個成功的商業模式
english: Many companies began to emulate this successful business model.

meaning: ロト型宝くじ
example: 樂透彩的中獎號碼會在今晚公佈
english: The winning numbers for the Lotto will be announced tonight.

meaning: 宝くじ
example: 他在路邊的小店買了一張彩卷
english: He bought a lottery ticket from a roadside shop.

meaning: ウィンカー
example: 變換車道時一定要先打方向燈
english: Always use your turn signal before changing lanes.

meaning: 狭い
example: 這條小巷非常窄，只能通過一輛車
english: This alley is very narrow, only wide enough for one car to pass at a time.

meaning: 広い
example: 這間房間的窗戶很寬，可以看到整個城市
english: The room has a large window that offers a panoramic view of the city.

meaning: 肩
example: 他的肩膀很寬，看起來很有力量
english: He has broad shoulders and looks very powerful.

meaning: 罰金
example: 違反交通規則會被罰金
english: Violating traffic rules will result in a fine.

meaning: 事故
example: 因為事故，這條道路暫時封閉
english: This road is temporarily closed due to the accident.

meaning: 瞬間
example: 意外的爆炸是瞬間發生的事件，嚇壞了所有人
english: The unexpected explosion happened in an instant, terrifying everyone.

meaning: 階 / フロア
example: 我的辦公室在大樓的第十三樓層
english: My office is on the thirteenth floor of the building.

meaning: 足
example: 他跑步時不小心扭傷了腿
english: He twisted his leg while running.

meaning: 脚
example: 她的腳被新鞋磨破了
english: Her feet were blistered by the new shoes.

meaning: 互いの / 相互に / 互いに
example: 相互尊重是維持良好關係的基礎
english: Mutual respect is the foundation for maintaining a good relationship.

meaning: （感情が）深い / （基盤・基礎が）しっかりしている
example: 多年來，他對藝術的熱情一直很深厚
english: His passion for art has remained profound for many years.

meaning: 友情
example: 他們之間的友情非常深厚
english: Their friendship is very deep.

meaning: 方向音痴
example: 我朋友沒有方向感，開車時必須使用導航。
english: My friend has no sense of direction and has to use navigation when driving.

meaning: 誠実である / まじめである
example: 他誠實地承認了自己的錯誤
english: He honestly admitted his mistake.

meaning: 耐えられない
example: 她的傷痛不堪忍受，需要立即就醫
english: Her pain was unbearable and she needed immediate medical attention.

meaning: とてもかっこいい / とてもクール
example: 他的音樂風格蠻酷，吸引了很多年輕人
english: His music style is pretty cool, attracting many young people.

meaning: 採光する
example: 這間房子的採光非常好，白天不需要開燈
english: This house has excellent natural light; you don't need to turn on the lights during the day.

meaning: さっぱりしている / てきぱきしている
example: 他乾脆辭職，開始自己的事業
english: He simply resigned and started his own business.

meaning: IT業界 / テクノロジー業界
example: 他在科技業工作已經十年了
english: He has been working in the technology industry for ten years.

meaning: 安定している / 落ち着いている
example: 他的收入很穩定，所以生活無憂無慮
english: His income is stable, so he lives a carefree life.

meaning: 会食する
example: 為了慶祝他的生日，我們計劃了一場驚喜聚餐
english: To celebrate his birthday, we planned a surprise dinner party.

meaning: ドラマシリーズ / 写真アルバム
example: 他向我推薦了一部非常好看的影集
english: He recommended a really good TV series to me.

meaning: 精巧な / きめ細かい / 上品で丁寧な
example: 這個蛋糕看起來太精緻了，我捨不得吃
english: This cake looks so exquisite, I can't bear to eat it.

meaning: バナナ
example: 我早餐吃了一根香蕉
english: I ate a banana for breakfast.

meaning: オレンジ
example: 橙子富含維生素C
english: Oranges are rich in vitamin C

meaning: カメラ
example: 我喜歡用相機拍攝風景照片
english: I enjoy taking landscape photos with my camera.

meaning: 探す
example: 他花了很多時間來尋找合適的工作
english: He spent a lot of time looking for a suitable job.

meaning: 柔軟性
example: 靈活性是現代工作者的重要素質
english: Flexibility is an important quality for modern workers

meaning: 生涯
example: 生涯規劃對每個人都很重要
english: Career planning is important for everyone.

meaning: サラダ
example: 他為晚餐準備了一道海鮮沙拉
english: He prepared a seafood salad for dinner.

meaning: ためらう
example: 她對要不要換工作感到好猶豫
english: She's really hesitant about whether or not to change jobs.

meaning: （形）優遇した
example: 優惠活動期間內購物可以享受免費運費
english: Free shipping is available for purchases made during the promotional period.

meaning: （副）～する予定である / ～しようとしている
example: 他將參加明天的會議
english: He will attend tomorrow's meeting.

meaning: （副）まもなく…する
example: 會議即將開始，請大家準備好
english: The meeting is about to begin, please get ready.

meaning: 家具
example: 這張沙發是我最喜歡的傢俱
english: This sofa is my favorite piece of furniture.

meaning: 何回も / 何度も
example: 我們好幾次討論過這個計劃的細節
english: We've discussed the details of this plan several times.

meaning: エスカレーター
example: 請站在手扶梯的右側，左側保持通道
english: Please stand on the right side of the escalator, keeping the passageway open on the left.

meaning: 検査する / 調査する
example: 醫生建議我每年做一次健康檢查
english: My doctor recommended that I have a health check-up once a year.

meaning: （名）故障 （動）故障する
example: 這台電腦昨天突然故障了
english: This computer suddenly broke down yesterday.

meaning: ごみ
example: 請把廚房裡的垃圾丟掉
english: Please dispose of the kitchen trash.

meaning: 乗客
example: 巴士上已經沒有空位，還有很多乘客在排隊
english: There were no empty seats on the bus, and many passengers were still in line.

meaning: ベッド
example: 請把床鋪整理好再出門
english: Please make your bed before leaving the house.

meaning: （形）気ままな / いい加減な / 適当な （動）勝手にする / 好きなようにする
example: 今天好累,就在外面隨便吃吧
english: I'm so tired today, I'll just eat out.

meaning: 快適 / 心地よい / 気持ちが良い
example: 這間旅館的房間很舒適
english: The hotel room was very comfortable.

meaning: 心地よい / 気持ちが良い / 体調が良い
example: 我今天覺得不太舒服
english: I'm not feeling well today.

meaning: ホームレス / 浮浪者
example: 流浪者經常面臨健康和安全的問題
english: Homeless people often face health and safety issues.

meaning: 集中している
example: 專注於目標可以幫助你達成成功
english: Focusing on your goals can help you achieve success.

meaning: 激励する / 奨励する
example: 在困難的時候，朋友們的鼓勵讓我堅持下去
english: During difficult times, the encouragement from my friends helped me persevere.

meaning: 外販する / 輸出する
example: 政府鼓勵企業外銷，提高國際競爭力
english: The government encourages enterprises to export and enhance their international competitiveness.

meaning: 熟している / 慣れている / 親しい
example: 他對這個工作已經很熟了
english: He is already very familiar with this job.

meaning: 入院する
example: 我的奶奶最近住院了，我們都很擔心
english: My grandmother was recently hospitalized, and we are all very worried.

meaning: 月
example: 今晚的月亮很圓，也很亮
english: The moon is very round and bright tonight.

meaning: 焦る / 慌てる
example: 看到孩子還沒回家，媽媽很著急
english: The mother was very anxious when she saw that her child hadn't come home yet.

meaning: マクドナルド
example: 麥當勞的薯條非常好吃
english: McDonald's fries are delicious.

meaning: フライドポテト
example: 自己在家做炸薯條沒有外面賣的好吃
english: Homemade French fries don't taste as good as the ones sold outside.

meaning: 続いての
example: 接下來的幾天，天氣都會很熱
english: The weather will be very hot for the next few days.

meaning: 今度
example: 你可以等到下一次特賣再買，會比較便宜
english: You can wait until the next sale to buy it; it will be cheaper then.

meaning: 進級する / 等級が上がる / バージョンアップする
example: 他剛剛被升級為經理，大家都很替他開心
english: He was just promoted to manager, and everyone is very happy for him.

meaning: 人を募集する
example: 由於業務擴展，我們部門正在徵人
english: Due to business expansion, our department is currently recruiting.

meaning: 警察
example: 警察正在調查這起案件
english: Police are investigating the case.

meaning: しばらく / 一時的な / 臨時の
example: 可以暫時寄放一下行李嗎？
english: Can I leave my luggage there temporarily?

meaning: （名）経験 （動）経験する
example: 她對這個領域的專業知識和經驗都讓我們非常佩服
english: We greatly admire her expertise and experience in this field.

meaning: 諦める / 断念する
example: 為了健康，他最終選擇放棄吸菸
english: For his health, he ultimately chose to give up smoking.

meaning: やる気
example: 他年輕有衝勁，敢於挑戰困難
english: He is young and energetic, and dares to take on challenges.

meaning: やる気
example: 他工作很有幹勁，總是能達到目標
english: He is very motivated at work and always manages to achieve his goals.

meaning: 基本
example: 這本書介紹了投資理財的基本原則
english: This book introduces the basic principles of investment and financial management.

meaning: 客 / 消費者（B to c）
example: 客人對我們的服務給予了很高的評價
english: The guests gave our service very high praise.

meaning: 取引先（B to B）
example: 我們的銷售團隊正積極開發新客戶
english: Our sales team is actively developing new clients.

meaning: 仲間 / 同僚 / 相棒 / パートナー
example: 我們需要尋找更多的合作夥伴
english: We need to find more partners.

meaning: 信用して任せる / 信任する
example: 建立信任需要時間，但失去信任只需一瞬間
english: Building trust takes time, but losing it can happen in an instant.

meaning: 信頼する
example: 我非常信賴這個系統的穩定性
english: I have great confidence in the stability of this system.

meaning: （形）気の向くままに
example: 在這個藝術展上，參觀者可以隨意拍照
english: Visitors are free to take photos at this art exhibition.

meaning: 取引高 / 売上高
example: 由於疫情的影響，很多企業的營業額大幅下降
english: Due to the impact of the pandemic, many businesses have experienced a significant drop in revenue.

meaning: （金銭・費用を）差し引く / 天引きする
example: 政府的規定是颱風假的話是扣薪水的
english: Government regulations state that taking a typhoon day off results in a deduction of salary.

meaning: やっぱり / 思った通り / 案の定
example: 天氣預報說今天會下雨，果然下午就開始下了
english: The weather forecast said it would rain today, and sure enough, it started raining this afternoon.

meaning: 宣言する / 公布する / 発表する
example: 台北市政府宣布明天停止上班及上課
english: Taipei City Government announces suspension of work and school tomorrow

meaning: 下がる / 低下する
example: 採用外包的話可以降低人事費
english: Outsourcing can reduce personnel costs.

meaning: （名）上司 / PM （動）責任を持って管理する
example: 新來的主管非常有經驗，帶領團隊取得了顯著的成績
english: The new manager is very experienced and has led the team to remarkable achievements.

meaning: 覆い隠す
example: 戴口罩可以有效遮口，防止病毒傳播
english: Wearing a mask can effectively cover the mouth and prevent the spread of viruses.

meaning: 強制する
example: 強制加班讓員工感到不滿
english: Forced overtime work causes employee dissatisfaction

meaning: 理論
example: 他的理論非常有說服力
english: His theory is very convincing.

meaning: 相当 / かなり
example: 他對公司的待遇相當不滿，因為薪水很久沒上漲了
english: He was quite dissatisfied with the company's treatment because his salary hadn't increased in a long time.

meaning: 成績 / 記録
example: 他為了提升成績，每天都努力學習
english: He studied hard every day in order to improve his grades.

meaning: 詐欺を働く
example: 網路詐騙的手法越來越複雜
english: Online scams are becoming increasingly sophisticated.

meaning: 拉致する
example: 綁架案件發生後，學校加強了安全措施
english: Following the kidnapping incident, the school strengthened its security measures.

meaning: 逮捕する
example: 嫌犯在逃亡途中被逮捕
english: The suspect was arrested while on the run.

meaning: 死刑
example: 許多國家已經廢除死刑
english: Many countries have abolished the death penalty.

meaning: 宝くじや賞に当たる
example: 中獎的人可以選擇一次性領取獎金或分期領取
english: Winners can choose to receive the prize money in a lump sum or in installments.

meaning: くじなどに当たっているかどうかを調べる
example: 統一發票對獎結果已經公布了
english: The results of the unified invoice prize draw have been announced.

meaning: 運 / 運命
example: 他一直覺得自己運氣不好，什麼事情都不順利
english: He always felt he was unlucky and that nothing went smoothly for him.

meaning: 確率
example: 他希望贏得比賽的機率能高一點
english: He hoped to have a higher chance of winning the game.

meaning: 折り返し電話をする
example: 我剛才沒接到你的電話，請回撥給我
english: I missed your call, please call me back.

meaning: 印章を押す / 捺印する
example: 合同簽署後，還需要蓋章確認
english: After the contract is signed, it also needs to be stamped for confirmation.

meaning: 分析する / 解明する
example: 我們需要仔細分析這次市場調查的結果
english: We need to carefully analyze the results of this market survey.

meaning: はやい / 迅速な
example: 警方迅速展開行動，成功解救了被綁架的人質
english: Police quickly launched an operation and successfully rescued the kidnapped hostages.

meaning: 手当を支給する
example: 公司為員工提供交通津貼
english: The company provides transportation allowances for its employees.

meaning: ルームメイト
example: 我今天忘記帶鑰匙，還好我的室友在家
english: I forgot my keys today, but luckily my roommate is home.

meaning: 寝室
example: 我的臥室牆上掛著一幅畫
english: There is a painting hanging on my bedroom wall.

meaning: カメラ
example: 我正在學習如何使用新的照相機
english: I am learning how to use a new camera

meaning: 共同の
example: 他們有共同的興趣，所以很快成為了好朋友
english: They shared common interests, so they quickly became good friends.

meaning: 家具
example: 我昨天買了一些新家具，把客廳重新佈置了一下
english: I bought some new furniture yesterday and rearranged the living room.

meaning: ソファー
example: 沙發是我們這次搬家新買的家具，大小正合適
english: The sofa is a new piece of furniture we bought for this move, and it's the perfect size.

meaning: シェアハウス
example: 我們合租的房子裡有三個房間，每人一間
english: Our shared apartment has three rooms, one for each person.

meaning: 市街地
example: 住在市區的好處是交通便利，去哪裡都很方便
english: The advantage of living in the city center is the convenient transportation; it's easy to go anywhere.

meaning: 市内
example: 市內的房價較高，因此很多人選擇住在郊區
english: Housing prices are high in the city, so many people choose to live in the suburbs.

meaning: スーパー
example: 商場裡有一個很大的美食區
english: There is a large food court in the mall.

meaning: ショッピングモール
example: 購物中心裡有超市 / 餐廳和電影院，非常方便
english: The shopping center has a supermarket, restaurants, and a cinema, which is very convenient.

meaning: 百貨店
example: 百貨公司裡賣的商品品質很好，但價格比較高
english: The goods sold in the department store are of very good quality, but the prices are relatively high.

meaning: 有利な点 / 利益
example: 多運動對身體有很多好處
english: Regular exercise has many benefits for the body.

meaning: 玄関
example: 我習慣把鑰匙放在玄關的櫃子上，這樣出門時不會忘記
english: I usually leave my keys on the cabinet in the entryway so I don't forget them when I leave the house.

meaning: さもなければ / あるいは / じゃなければ
example: 你要早點睡覺，要不然明天會遲到喔
english: You should go to bed early, or you'll be late tomorrow!

meaning: （名）迷信 （動）盲信する
example: 有些人非常迷信，相信星座可以決定命運
english: Some people are very superstitious and believe that horoscopes can determine their fate.

meaning: 予約購入をする / 予約注文をする
example: 你可以預購這個遊戲，並在發售當天直接下載
english: You can pre-order the game and download it directly on release day.

meaning: 権限を与える
example: 他們通過使用日本的授權技術，大幅降低了生產成本
english: They significantly reduced production costs by using licensed technology from Japan.

meaning: 占いをする / 運勢を占う
example: 有人相信算命可以幫助他們做重要決定
english: Some people believe that fortune telling can help them make important decisions.

meaning: （v）外注する （n）外注業務
example: 為了降低成本，公司決定把客戶服務外包給第三方公司
english: In order to reduce costs, the company decided to outsource customer service to a third-party company.

meaning: （v）発注する
example: 發包方需要確保承包方有能力完成項目
english: The client needs to ensure that the contractor is capable of completing the project.

meaning: パートナー
example: 與合夥人保持良好的溝通非常重要
english: Maintaining good communication with your partners is very important.

meaning: 極限 / 限界
example: 在極限的壓力下，他還是成功地完成了任務
english: Despite the extreme pressure, he still managed to complete the mission.

meaning: 禁止する
example: 飛機起飛時禁止使用電子設備
english: The use of electronic devices is prohibited during aircraft takeoff.

meaning: やむ / 停止する
example: 他們的爭吵終於停息了
english: Their argument finally stopped.

meaning: 爆竹
example: 農曆新年時，我們會放鞭炮來慶祝
english: During the Lunar New Year, we set off firecrackers to celebrate.

meaning: 逆である / （挿入的に用いて）逆に
example: 我們對這個問題的看法完全相反
english: We have completely opposite views on this issue.

meaning: 焦る / いらいらする / 気をもむ
example: 别着急，慢慢来
english: Don't rush, take your time.

meaning: 肉だんごスープ
example: 這家餐廳的肉羹特別美味，裡面還加了蝦仁
english: The meat soup at this restaurant is especially delicious; it even has shrimp in it.

meaning: ワンタン
example: 餛飩湯裡的餛飩皮特別薄，吃起來口感很好
english: The wonton wrappers in the wonton soup are very thin, making them taste great.

meaning: メゾネット
example: 很多年輕人喜歡買樓中樓，因為比較有設計感
english: Many young people like to buy duplex apartments because they are more stylish.

meaning: （文章や建物の）組み立て / 構成
example: 房東說這間房子的格局是按照風水設計的
english: The landlord said the layout of the house was designed according to feng shui principles.

meaning: （v）家を借りる （n）賃貸住宅
example: 我們打算在市中心租屋
english: We plan to rent a place in the city center.

meaning: 回り / 外周 / 周囲
example: 警察已經封鎖了建築物的外圍
english: Police have cordoned off the area around the building.

meaning: サンプル / 見本品
example: 你可以先參觀樣品屋再決定要不要購買房子
english: You can visit the show flats first before deciding whether to buy the house.

meaning: アパート / マンション
example: 我最近搬到了市中心的一間公寓
english: I recently moved to an apartment downtown.

meaning: 間に合う
example: 你現在出門的話，還來得及搭車
english: If you leave now, you can still catch a ride.

meaning: 間に合わない
example: 我起床太晚了，來不及搭公車
english: I woke up too late and missed the bus.

meaning: （n）錠 / 錠前 （v）錠を掛ける
example: 不要忘記鎖門喔
english: Don't forget to lock the door!

meaning: 無駄遣いする
example: 錢不要亂花
english: Don't waste money

meaning: まとめる / 戻す
example: 東西用完請歸位
english: Please put things back in their place after use.

meaning: 不倫 / 浮気（結婚している人の）
example: 她發現老公有外遇
english: She discovered her husband was having an affair.

meaning: 損失を出す / 損をする
example: 損失的時間是無法挽回的
english: Lost time cannot be recovered.

meaning: 角度 / 観点
example: 從我的角度看，這個計劃還不夠完善
english: From my perspective, this plan is not yet perfect.

meaning: （名）速達郵便 / （動）時間を制限する
example: 限時6折優惠只到今晚12點，請把握機會！
english: This limited-time 60% off offer ends tonight at midnight, so don't miss out!

meaning: デジタルマーケティング
example: 好的數位行銷策略可以大幅提升品牌知名度。
english: A good digital marketing strategy can significantly increase brand awareness.

meaning: 柔らかい / 経験が浅い
example: 這道菜的雞肉很嫩
english: The chicken in this dish is very tender.

meaning: 無視する / 見落とす / 気に留めない
example: 他總是忙於工作，常常忽略家人的感受
english: He was always busy with work and often neglected his family's feelings.

meaning: リスク
example: 從公司的立場來說，這次投資風險很高
english: From the company's perspective, this investment is very risky.

meaning: 好意
example: 這次的活動成功地提升了品牌的好感度
english: This event successfully enhanced brand favorability.

meaning: 敷居
example: 這間大學的入學門檻比較低，很多學生都能符合資格
english: This university has relatively low admission requirements, and many students are eligible.

meaning: （業務や店舗を）閉じる / 終了する
example: 老闆決定收掉這個分店，集中資源在主要市場
english: The owner decided to close this branch and concentrate resources on the main market.

meaning: 倒産する / 破産する
example: 由於經濟不景氣，許多小型企業面臨倒閉的危機
english: Due to the economic downturn, many small businesses are facing the risk of bankruptcy.

meaning: 手当
example: 公司為外派員工提供住宿津貼
english: The company provides accommodation allowances for its expatriate employees.

meaning: ～する意志がある / ～を喜んで受け入れる
example: 我不願意參加這個活動
english: I don't want to participate in this activity.

meaning: （動）～を望む / 希望する （名）希望 / 願望
example: 希望你這次出差一切順利
english: I hope your business trip goes smoothly.

meaning: 判定する / 判断する
example: 這件事情太複雜了，我真的不知如何判斷
english: This matter is too complicated; I really don't know how to judge it.

meaning: 真心 / 誠意
example: 如果你誠心想學習，我願意幫助你
english: If you are truly eager to learn, I am willing to help you.

meaning: 伝言する / 伝える
example: 老闆請我轉告大家，明天的會議改到下午三點
english: The boss asked me to tell everyone that tomorrow's meeting has been moved to 3 PM.

meaning: 再度手続きを行う / もう一度申請・発行する
example: 我的護照掉了，只好去重辦護照
english: I lost my passport, so I had to go and apply for a new one.

meaning: 高所恐怖症
example: 他有懼高症，所以不敢坐摩天輪
english: He has a fear of heights, so he doesn't dare to ride the Ferris wheel.

meaning: カロリー
example: 你知道一碗白飯大概有多少熱量嗎？
english: Do you know how many calories are in a bowl of white rice?

meaning: お餅
example: 台灣的麻糬有很多種口味，比如花生 / 紅豆和芝麻
english: Taiwanese mochi comes in many flavors, such as peanut, red bean, and sesame.

meaning: 契約書
example: 在簽署合約書之前，一定要仔細閱讀內容
english: Before signing a contract, be sure to read the contents carefully.

meaning: びっくりする / 驚く
example: 這部電影的恐怖場面太真實了，看得我嚇一跳
english: The horror scenes in this movie were so realistic, they scared me half to death.

meaning: あいさつする
example: 我去日本出差，向客戶的董事長問候
english: I went to Japan on a business trip and sent my greetings to the chairman of the client's company.

meaning: にぎやかである / 活気にあふれている
example: 台北的夜市非常熱鬧，總是人山人海
english: Taipei's night markets are very lively and always packed with people.

meaning: 部屋番号 / 住所番号 / 番地
example: 請問你的門牌號碼是多少？
english: What is your house number?

meaning: 誇り高い / プライドを持っている
example: 他自尊心強，不容易接受別人的批評
english: He has a strong sense of self-esteem and doesn't easily accept criticism from others.

meaning: 夕日
example: 我們坐在海邊欣賞美麗的夕陽
english: We sat by the sea and admired the beautiful sunset.

meaning: 太陽
example: 夏天的時候，我總是戴太陽眼鏡出門
english: In the summer, I always wear sunglasses when I go out.

meaning: （名）距離 / 間隔 （動）離れる / 距離を置く
example: 我家到學校的距離大約是五公里
english: The distance from my home to the school is about five kilometers.

meaning: 計算する / 思案する
example: 我們需要計算一下這次旅行的預算
english: We need to calculate the budget for this trip.

meaning: 範囲 / エリア / 領域
example: 這次考試的範圍包括第一到第五課
english: The scope of this exam includes lessons one through five.

meaning: 地域 / 区域
example: 這個區域的房價很高
english: Property prices in this area are very high.

meaning: 魅力
example: 她的微笑非常魅力的，讓人感到溫暖和安心
english: Her smile is very charming, making people feel warm and at ease.

meaning: 遠くても気にしない / 遠くても構わない
example: 只要能見到你，我不嫌遠，一定會去
english: As long as I can see you, I won't mind the distance; I will definitely go.

meaning: 移住する
example: 我們一家人決定移居台中，因為那裡的環境很好
english: Our family decided to move to Taichung because the environment there is very good.

meaning: 歩く
example: 你走路來的嗎？還是搭車來的？
english: Did you come on foot or by car?

meaning: 徒歩で行く
example: 這條街禁止車輛通行，只能步行
english: This street is closed to vehicles and is for pedestrians only.

meaning: 気にしない / どうでもいい / 大したことではない
example: 他表面上說無所謂，但其實心裡很在意
english: He said he didn't care on the surface, but he actually cared a lot about it.

meaning: 事故物件
example: 日本國家規定，房東必須告知租客房子是否為凶宅
english: Japanese national regulations require landlords to inform tenants whether the property is a haunted house.

meaning: 芸能人 / 芸人
example: 許多藝人都會利用社群媒體與粉絲互動
english: Many celebrities use social media to interact with their fans.

meaning: 敷金 / 保証金 / 手付金
example: 租房子的時候，房東通常會要求先付押金
english: When renting a house, landlords usually require a deposit in advance.

meaning: 屋上 / 屋根
example: 我們晚上可以到屋頂看星星
english: We can go to the rooftop to see the stars at night.

meaning: 鏡
example: 鏡子裡的自己看起來好像變瘦了
english: I look thinner in the mirror

meaning: 霊魂 / 魂
example: 音樂是我的靈魂，它讓我感到快樂
english: Music is my soul; it makes me happy.

meaning: 軍隊
example: 軍隊的訓練非常嚴格，需要高度的紀律
english: Military training is extremely rigorous and requires a high degree of discipline.

meaning: 正しい心 / 正義感
example: 堅守正氣，不可以向惡勢力低頭
english: Uphold righteousness and never bow to evil forces.

meaning: 透明である / 情報が公開されている / オープンである
example: 在這家公司，所有的決策過程都是透明的，員工可以自由查閱相關資訊
english: At this company, all decision-making processes are transparent, and employees can freely access relevant information.

meaning: 建築物
example: 如果喜歡歷史建築物的話，一定要去京都
english: If you like historical buildings, you must go to Kyoto.

meaning: コミュニティ
example: 這個住宅區有自己的社羣活動，每個月都會舉辦聚會
english: This residential area has its own community activities, and gatherings are held every month.

meaning: （副）早く / 急いで
example: 趕快買票，電影快要開始了
english: Hurry and buy your tickets, the movie is about to start!

meaning: （動）リフォームする / 改修をする （名）リフォーム / 改修
example: 我們計劃明年裝修房子，換新的地板和牆壁顏色
english: We plan to renovate the house next year, and change the flooring and wall color.

meaning: チャンネル
example: 這個YouTube頻道專門介紹台灣的美食和旅遊景點
english: This YouTube channel is dedicated to showcasing Taiwanese food and tourist attractions.

meaning: 話す / 語る / 説明する / 講義する / 話し合う
example: 我們來講一下這個問題
english: Let's discuss this issue.

meaning: つかむ / 捕まえる / 引っ掻く
example: 抓住繩子，不要掉下去！
english: Hold on to the rope, don't fall!

meaning: 捕まえる / 捕獲する
example: 警察捉住了小偷
english: The police caught the thief

meaning: ロープ
example: 他用繩子把帳篷固定好，避免被風吹走
english: He secured the tent with ropes to prevent it from being blown away by the wind.

meaning: カーテン
example: 這間房間的窗簾是遮光的，睡覺時不會被光線影響
english: The curtains in this room are blackout curtains, so you won't be disturbed by light while sleeping.

meaning: ロッククライミング
example: 攀岩時一定要確保安全裝備正確無誤
english: Always ensure that your safety equipment is in the correct condition when rock climbing.

meaning: 抗議する
example: 他對公司的決定表示強烈抗議
english: He strongly protested the company's decision.

meaning: 裁判所
example: 他被法院判處五年徒刑
english: He was sentenced to five years in prison by the court.

meaning: 転ぶ / 倒れる
example: 剛才被人撞了一下，我差點跌倒
english: I was bumped into just now and almost fell.

meaning: 寝坊する / 寝過ごす
example: 今天早上我睡過頭了，差點遲到
english: I overslept this morning and almost missed my class.

meaning: 壊す / 割る / 記録を更新する
example: 他不小心打破了一個杯子
english: He accidentally broke a cup.

meaning: 首
example: 因為一整天都坐著工作，所以脖子和腰很痛
english: My neck and back hurt because I sit at work all day.

meaning: 価値がある
example: 這塊手錶很值錢，是我爺爺留給我的
english: This watch is very valuable; it was left to me by my grandfather.

meaning: （慣）まさか〜じゃないよね？
example: 該不會你忘記今天要開會吧？
english: You haven't forgotten that you had a meeting today, have you?

meaning: 出して見せる
example: 請你出示身分證
english: Please show your ID card.

meaning: ぼーっとする / ぼんやりする
example: 她站在窗邊發呆，看著外面的風景
english: She stood by the window, lost in thought, gazing at the scenery outside.

meaning: 転職する
example: 跳槽有風險，一定要先做好準備
english: Changing jobs carries risks, so be sure to prepare beforehand.

meaning: （動）運営する / 事業を運営・経営する （名）営業 / 運行
example: 營運成本太高，讓很多小企業無法生存
english: High operating costs make it impossible for many small businesses to survive.

meaning: 束縛や苦しみから解き放たれること / 悩みや困難から自由になる
example: 經過這次的談話，他終於從痛苦中解脫出來了
english: After this conversation, he was finally freed from his suffering.

meaning: 制度
example: 台灣的健保制度被認為是世界上最有效率的之一
english: Taiwan's national health insurance system is considered one of the most efficient in the world.

meaning: 交際費
example: 公司的交際費主要用在招待客戶和合作夥伴
english: The company's entertainment expenses are mainly used to entertain clients and partners.

meaning: （使った費用の）請求書を出す / （計算書を出して）費用の支払いを求める
example: 報帳的時候一定要附上發票，不然公司不會核銷
english: When submitting an expense report, be sure to attach the invoice; otherwise, the company will not process the claim.

meaning: 一定の数量や額
example: 這張信用卡的額度是五十萬元
english: This credit card has a credit limit of 500,000 yuan.

meaning: 限度 / 定額
example: 報名人數有限，扣打滿了就不能參加了
english: Registration is limited; once the limit is reached, no one can participate.

meaning: 法規
example: 所有員工都必須遵守公司內部的法規
english: All employees must comply with the company's internal regulations.

meaning: 気分転換
example: 聽音樂可以幫助我轉換心情
english: Listening to music helps me change my mood.

meaning: （形）主な / 最も重要な （副）主に / 中心的に
example: 你們公司主要幫客戶採用什麼行銷方法？
english: What marketing methods does your company primarily use for your clients?

meaning: （動）販売を促進する （名）販売促進
example: 百貨公司週年慶正在大力促銷，吸引了很多顧客
english: The department store's anniversary sale is currently underway with major promotions, attracting many customers.

meaning: 上げる / 高める
example: 打折促銷是一種常見的提高營業額方法
english: Discount promotions are a common method to increase sales.

meaning: 生長 / 生まれ育つ
example: 聽說按摩頭皮可以讓頭髮生長更好
english: I've heard that massaging the scalp can improve hair growth.

meaning: あいまいな / はっきりしない
example: 他們之間的關係很曖昧，朋友們都看不懂
english: Their relationship was ambiguous, and their friends couldn't understand it.

meaning: 諮問する / 情報提供する / コンサルティングをする
example: 如果有法律問題，可以找律師諮詢
english: If you have any legal questions, you can consult a lawyer.

meaning: 家 / 建物 / 住宅
example: 這區的房屋價格一直在上漲
english: House prices in this area have been rising.

meaning: クリニック / 診療所
example: 她去美容診所做了雷射除斑，效果很好
english: She went to a beauty clinic for laser treatment to remove her freckles, and the results were excellent.

meaning: 文章 / エッセイ / 作文
example: 請幫我修改這篇文章的文法錯誤
english: Please help me correct the grammatical errors in this article.

meaning: 店を閉める / 閉店する
example: 我們店晚上十點打烊
english: Our store closes at 10 PM.

meaning: 掃く / 掃除する / スキャンする
example: 桌上有QRCode,請掃QRCode點餐
english: There is a QR code on the table. Please scan the QR code to order.

meaning: ワックス
example: 需要幫你抹一些髮蠟嗎？
english: Do you need me to apply some hair wax for you?

meaning: 改める / 変える / 修正する
example: 我想改一下我的預約
english: I'd like to change my appointment.

meaning: コンセント / 電源ソケット
example: 這裡有插座可以充電嗎？
english: Are there any outlets here where I can charge my devices?

meaning: まく / 散らす / ばらまく
example: 我把飲料撒了
english: I spilled the drink.

meaning: 委託する / 依頼する
example: 這個設計專案是委託給外包公司的
english: This design project was outsourced to a company.

meaning: 投入する / （広告などを）掲載・配信する
example: 這支影片的投放對象是年輕族群
english: This video is targeted at young people.

meaning: 自転車
example: 我每天騎腳踏車上學
english: I ride my bicycle to school every day.

meaning: 沖縄
example: 我們計劃明年暑假去沖繩旅行
english: We plan to travel to Okinawa next summer.

meaning: 論理 / ロジック
example: 他說的話完全沒有邏輯
english: What he said made no sense at all.

meaning: ファストフード店
example: 這家速食店的薯條很好吃
english: The fries at this fast food restaurant are delicious.

meaning: 生活利便性（生活機能）
example: 我想找生活機能方便的地方租房子
english: I'm looking for a place to rent that's conveniently located.

meaning: 息切れする / 喘ぐ
example: 一爬樓梯我就開始喘了
english: I started panting as soon as I climbed the stairs.

meaning: 田舎 / 郊外 / 地方
example: 鄉下的空氣很新鮮
english: The air in the countryside is very fresh.

meaning: 都市 / 都会 / 街
example: 城市的生活節奏很快
english: The pace of life in the city is very fast

meaning: 内臓 / 臓器
example: 內臟是維持生命的重要器官
english: Internal organs are vital organs for maintaining life.

meaning: 揺れる / 揺らす / 振る
example: 喝的時候再搖一下
english: Shake it again before drinking.

meaning: 募集する / 採用する / 求人する
example: 這個網站上有很多招聘資訊
english: This website has a lot of job postings.

meaning: めったに見ない
example: 台北冬天很少見下雪
english: It rarely snows in Taipei in winter.

meaning: 珍しい / 変わっている
example: 台北竟然下雪，真稀奇
english: It's snowing in Taipei, that's really rare!

meaning: 乾いている / 湿気がない / 乾燥している
example: 我的皮膚冬天很容易乾燥
english: My skin gets dry easily in winter.

meaning: 祖先
example: 我們要感謝祖先留下的智慧和文化
english: We should be grateful for the wisdom and culture left by our ancestors.

meaning: 結婚式
example: 參加婚禮時要穿正式的服裝
english: You should wear formal attire when attending a wedding.

meaning: 海沿い / 沿岸部
example: 台灣的西部有許多沿海城市
english: Western Taiwan has many coastal cities

meaning: 陶磁器
example: 鶯歌是台灣有名的陶瓷產地
english: Yingge is a famous ceramics production area in Taiwan.

meaning: 食器
example: 這套餐具是陶瓷做的，很有質感
english: This tableware set is made of ceramic and has a very high-quality feel.

meaning: 暖かい / ぽかぽかしている
example: 春天的天氣很暖和
english: The weather in spring is very warm.

meaning: 帳簿に記帳する
example: 入帳金額與發票不一致，請再確認
english: The amount recorded does not match the invoice; please confirm again.

meaning: 手続き / 手順 / 必要な手間
example: 辦理護照需要哪些手續？
english: What are the procedures for applying for a passport?

meaning: 通貨の価値が下がる / 人・物をけなす / 低く評価する
example: 最近台幣大幅貶值
english: The New Taiwan Dollar has recently depreciated significantly.

meaning: 税金を申告する / 納税手続きをする
example: 台灣的報稅季是每年五月
english: The tax filing season in Taiwan is in May each year.

meaning: 通帳
example: 我每個月都會記錄存摺上的變化
english: I record the changes in my bank account every month.

meaning: モデル
example: 她是一位專業的模特兒，常常參加時裝秀
english: She is a professional model who frequently participates in fashion shows.

meaning: 〜のように見える / 〜な容姿をしている / 似ている
example: 妹妹和我長得差不多
english: My sister and I look almost the same

meaning: 欠けている / 不足している / 足りない
example: 這個地區缺乏乾淨的飲用水
english: This region lacks clean drinking water.

meaning: （接）…と / …に  （動）与える / 授ける
example: 我想與你一起去旅行
english: I want to travel with you.

meaning: 蜘蛛
example: 我在房間裡看到一隻蜘蛛
english: I saw a spider in my room.

meaning: 目覚める / 自覚する / 意識がはっきりする（比喩的にも使う）
example: 經歷那場意外後，我突然覺醒了人生的意義
english: After experiencing that accident, I suddenly realized the meaning of life.

meaning: 比べる / 比較すると / 〜に比べて
example: 跟去年的表現相比，今年明顯進步了
english: Compared to last year's performance, there has been significant improvement this year.

meaning: （動） 表現する （名） 振る舞い / パフォーマンス
example: 他在考試中的表現非常好，得了第一名
english: He performed exceptionally well in the exam and came in first place.

meaning: 受け入れる / 引き受ける / 受け取る
example: 她無法接受別人的批評
english: She cannot accept criticism from others.

meaning: ピクニック
example: 我們明天要去公園野餐
english: We're going on a picnic in the park tomorrow.

meaning: 花見をする
example: 我最喜歡春天去賞櫻
english: My favorite time to go cherry blossom viewing is in spring.

meaning: 布 / 生地 / ファブリック
example: 野餐時我們帶了一塊大布墊在草地上
english: We brought a large cloth to lay on the grass during our picnic.

meaning: おにぎり / 台湾風のライスロール
example: 台灣的飯糰裡面會包油條和肉鬆
english: Taiwanese rice balls usually contain fried dough sticks and pork floss.

meaning: 桃色 / ピンク色
example: 那朵桃色的櫻花真的好美
english: That pink cherry blossom is so beautiful.

meaning: 漬け物 / キムチ
example: 我很喜歡吃泡菜，酸酸辣辣的很開胃
english: I really like kimchi; its sour and spicy flavor is very appetizing.

meaning: 協力パートナー / 提携相手
example: 我們正在尋找新的協力夥伴拓展市場
english: We are looking for new partners to expand our market.

meaning: 蒸す / 蒸し器で調理する
example: 我媽媽常常用電鍋蒸地瓜
english: My mom often steams sweet potatoes in an electric cooker.

meaning: 手順 / ステップ / プロセス
example: 學習語言的第一個步驟是學習發音
english: The first step in learning a language is learning pronunciation.

meaning: すっきりする
example: 睡了一個好覺後，我感到神清氣爽
english: After a good night's sleep, I felt refreshed.

meaning: 身につける / 着用する
example: 戴上眼罩後，我比較容易入睡
english: I find it easier to fall asleep after putting on an eye mask.

meaning: 直行する
example: 這班高鐵是直達台中的，不會停其他站
english: This high-speed train goes directly to Taichung and doesn't stop at other stations.

meaning: 区間
example: 這列火車是區間車，只停靠附近的站
english: This train is a local train, stopping only at nearby stations.

meaning: 汗臭い
example: 運動完後要換衣服，不然會有汗臭
english: You should change your clothes after exercising, otherwise you'll have body odor.

meaning: 注意を促す / 思い出させる / リマインドする
example: 謝謝你的提醒，不然我真的會忘記
english: Thank you for reminding me, otherwise I really would have forgotten.

meaning: 酔っ払い
example: 昨天晚上街上到處都是醉鬼，好吵啊！
english: Last night the streets were full of drunks, it was so noisy!

meaning: 気が短い / 怒りっぽい
example: 他脾氣不好，常常因為小事生氣
english: He has a bad temper and often gets angry over trivial matters.

meaning: 引きずる / 引っぱる / （時間を）引き延ばす / 遅らせる
example: 地板很髒，要用拖把拖一拖
english: The floor is dirty, it needs to be mopped.

meaning: （名）記憶 / 覚えること （動）覚える
example: 我的記憶力不好
english: I have a bad memory.
