meaning: まとめて言うと / 総合的に言うと / 要するに
example: 總的來說，這次的經驗讓我學到了很多
english: Overall, I learned a lot from this experience.

meaning: ネズミ
example: 他怕老鼠，看到就尖叫
english: He's afraid of mice; he screams whenever he sees one.

meaning: 気持ち悪い / 吐き気がする / 不快だ / 嫌悪感を感じる
example: 我覺得有點噁心，想吐
english: I feel a bit nauseous and want to vomit.

meaning: ちょうど～しているところだ / ～中だ
example: 我們正在準備明天的活動
english: We are preparing for tomorrow's event.

meaning: 本音
example: 我想聽你的真心話
english: I want to hear your true feelings.

meaning: 観察する / 注意深く見る
example: 醫生仔細地觀察病人的症狀
english: The doctor carefully observed the patient's symptoms.

meaning: 泥棒 / スリ
example: 警察抓到了那個小偷
english: The police caught the thief.

meaning: トラック
example: 小心！前面有一輛超速的卡車
english: Watch out! There's a speeding truck ahead!

meaning: 加える / 追加する / 付け足す
example: 不好意思，給你添麻煩了
english: I'm sorry to have troubled you.

meaning: 流暢である / 滑らかである
example: 你的日文說得很流利
english: Your Japanese is very fluent.

meaning: 季節を過ぎた / シーズンオフの
example: 這雙鞋是過季商品，所以打了很大的折扣
english: These shoes are from an out-of-season item, so they were heavily discounted.

meaning: 引き継ぐ / 引き渡す / 受け渡す
example: 他即將離職，正在和新同事進行工作交接
english: He is about to leave the company and is currently handing over his work to his new colleagues.

meaning: 分ける / 割り当てる / 配分する
example: 公司分配年終獎金給所有員工
english: The company distributes year-end bonuses to all employees.

meaning: 交渉する / やり取りする
example: 我們需要和他們交涉
english: We need to negotiate with them.

meaning: 交渉する / 話し合いをする
example: 我們明天要跟客戶談判價格
english: We need to negotiate prices with our clients tomorrow.

meaning: 戦争
example: 現代戰爭使用各種高科技武器
english: Modern warfare utilizes a variety of high-tech weapons.

meaning: 保護する / 守る
example: 保護自己的隱私也很重要
english: Protecting your privacy is also important.

meaning: ひどい / 悲惨な / みじめな
example: 這場交通事故造成了慘劇
english: This traffic accident resulted in tragedy.

meaning: 関税
example: 關稅提高了商品的價格
english: Tariffs increase the price of goods

meaning: 首相 / 総理大臣
example: 首相強調了外交關係的重要性
english: The Prime Minister emphasized the importance of diplomatic relations.

meaning: 代わりになる / 代替する
example: 這種新材料可以代替塑膠
english: This new material can replace plastic.

meaning: 撤退する / 撤収する / 立ち退く / 引き上げる
example: 活動結束後，大家很快地撤走了設備
english: After the event, everyone quickly removed the equipment.

meaning: 政治
example: 我對政治非常感興趣
english: I am very interested in politics.

meaning: 政府
example: 面對少子化問題，政府正在考慮提供更多育兒補助
english: In response to the declining birth rate, the government is considering providing more childcare subsidies.

meaning: 協力して助ける / 支援する
example: 如果需要，我可以協助你完成報告
english: If needed, I can assist you in completing the report.

meaning: 設備 / 機器 / インフラ
example: 這座醫院配備了最新的醫療設備
english: This hospital is equipped with the latest medical equipment.

meaning: （名）議席 （動）犠牲にする / 犠牲となる
example: 為了家庭，他犧牲了自己的夢想
english: He sacrificed his dreams for his family.

meaning: 人員削減をする / リストラする
example: 由於經濟不景氣，公司決定裁員一百人
english: Due to the economic downturn, the company has decided to lay off 100 employees.

meaning: 解雇する / クビにする
example: 因為嚴重違反公司規定，他被開除了
english: He was fired for serious violations of company rules.

meaning: （資金・物資・人材などを）集める / 準備する
example: 為了這次活動，我們正在籌錢
english: We are raising money for this event.

meaning: （名）恐怖 （形）恐ろしいこと（または / 恐ろしい状態）
example: 那場地震帶來了極大的恐怖
english: That earthquake brought immense terror.

meaning: （動）怖がる / 恐れる
example: 我從小就害怕高的地方
english: I've been afraid of heights since I was a child.

meaning: （形）怖い / 恐ろしい
example: 那部鬼片真的很可怕
english: That horror movie was really scary.

meaning: 万が一 / もしもの場合に
example: 萬一發生意外，保險可以幫助我們
english: In case of an accident, insurance can help us.

meaning: パスポート
example: 我的護照快到期了，需要去辦理更新
english: My passport is about to expire and I need to renew it.

meaning: 兆 / 前兆 / サイン
example: 這家公司市值達到兩兆台幣
english: This company has a market capitalization of NT$2 trillion.

meaning: 上がる / 値上がりする
example: 今年農產品的價格漲得很厲害
english: Agricultural product prices have risen sharply this year.

meaning: 下がる / 値下がりする / 転ぶ
example: 股市今天大跌，很多投資人都很緊張
english: The stock market plunged today, making many investors very nervous.

meaning: 熱が出る / 発熱する
example: 我今天有點發燒，可能是感冒了
english: I have a slight fever today; I think I've caught a cold.

meaning: 体温
example: 正常的體溫大約是三十六到三十七度之間
english: Normal body temperature is between 36 and 37 degrees Celsius.

meaning: 正常である
example: 糖度冰塊正常嗎?
english: Is the sugar content of these ice cubes normal?

meaning:
（形）傲慢な / うぬぼれた / 偉そうな（ネガティブ寄り）
（動）誇りに思う / 自慢に思う（ポジティブ寄り）
example: 驕傲的態度容易讓人反感
english: An arrogant attitude is easy to make people dislike you.

meaning: 持ち上げる / 提案する / 持ち出す / 言及する / 提出する
example: 她提著一個很重的行李箱
english: She was carrying a very heavy suitcase.

meaning: 提出する / 提示する / 申し出る
example: 我們已經向主管提出改善建議
english: We have already submitted improvement suggestions to our supervisor.

meaning: 予定より早くする / 繰り上げる / 前倒しにする
example: 我可以提早去你家嗎？
english: Can I come to your house earlier?

meaning: 討論する / 議論する / 話し合う
example: 我們今天要討論下個月的活動計畫
english: We're going to discuss next month's activity plan today.

meaning: 会議を開く / 会議を始める / 会議に出席する
example: 我們下午三點要開會
english: We have a meeting at 3 PM.

meaning: 遅れる / 遅延する
example: 會議延遲了十五分鐘才開始
english: The meeting was delayed by fifteen minutes.

meaning: 記者 / ジャーナリスト
example: 記者會明天下午三點舉行
english: The press conference will be held at 3 p.m. tomorrow.

meaning: 行う / 開催する
example: 每年夏天這裡都會舉行煙火大會
english: A fireworks festival is held here every summer.

meaning: 宴会・フォーマルな食事会
example: 他穿著正式的西裝參加宴會
english: He attended the banquet in a formal suit.

meaning: 正式な / フォーマルな
example: 這是一份正式的文件
english: This is a formal document.

meaning: 情報交換する
example: 這場活動的目的就是讓大家交換資訊 / 建立人脈
english: The purpose of this event is to allow everyone to exchange information and build connections.

meaning: グループ
example: 我來創一個新的line群組喔
english: I'm going to create a new Line group.

meaning: 協力する / 助け合う
example: 感謝大家的協力，活動非常成功
english: Thank you all for your cooperation, the event was a great success.

meaning: とても少ない / あまり～ない
example: 台北的居酒屋很少有包廂
english: Private rooms are rare in Taipei's izakayas.

meaning: 占める / 占領する / 占有する
example: 這家公司佔了市場的大部分
english: This company occupies a large portion of the market.

meaning: 原動力 / やる気 / 推進力
example: 我最近缺乏學習的動力
english: I've been lacking motivation to study lately.

meaning: 割合 / 比率
example: 男女人數的比例是3比2
english: The ratio of men to women is 3 to 2.

meaning: 占める割合 / 占有率
example: 男性在全體學生中佔比六成
english: Males make up 60% of all students

meaning: 外国為替 / 外貨
example: 最近外匯市場波動很大，要小心投資風險
english: The foreign exchange market has been very volatile lately, so be careful about investment risks.

meaning: （形）恥ずかしい / 照れる / シャイな
example: 我第一次演講的時候，非常害羞
english: I was very shy during my first speech.

meaning: （動）恥をかく / 面目を失う / 恥ずかしい思いをする
example: 你不要在外面大吵大鬧，會讓我丟臉
english: Don't make a scene in public, it will embarrass me.

meaning: 何倍にも / 数倍も / ずっと多い
example: 他的薪水是我的好幾倍
english: His salary is several times mine.

meaning: （欲しい物が）買えない / 手に入らない
example: 限量商品太搶手，我買不到
english: Limited edition items are too popular, I can't buy them.

meaning: 事柄 / 出来事 / 都合 / 用事
example: 你有自己公司以後，最高興的是什麼事情？
english: What makes you happiest after you own your own company?

meaning: 処理する / 対応する / 扱う / 解決する
example: 你不用擔心，我會幫你把事情處理好的
english: Don't worry, I'll take care of everything for you.

meaning: 外に出る / 出かける
example: 你什麼時候要出去？
english: When are you going out?

meaning: ギャンブル / 賭け事
example: 他因為賭博債務很多
english: He had a lot of gambling debts.

meaning: 細胞
example: 科學家發現了一種新的免疫細胞
english: Scientists have discovered a new type of immune cell.

meaning: 時間をつぶす / 暇をつぶす
example: 我在咖啡廳殺時間等朋友
english: I'm killing time at the coffee shop while waiting for my friend.

meaning: （時間・気力・忍耐などを）つぶす / やり過ごす / 消耗させる
example: 我在咖啡廳看書消磨時間
english: I kill time reading in the coffee shop.

meaning: 明け方 / 早朝
example: 地震發生在今天凌晨兩點
english: The earthquake occurred at 2:00 AM today.

meaning: あとで / しばらくしてから / 後ほど
example: 我現在很忙，待會再打給你
english: I'm busy right now, I'll call you back later.

meaning: 保留する / 取っておく / 保ち続ける
example: 這台手機目前缺貨，但可以幫你保留一台
english: This phone is currently out of stock, but we can reserve one for you.

meaning: 誕生日の主役（誕生日を迎える人）
example: 壽星收到很多禮物，高興得不得了
english: The birthday person received many gifts and was overjoyed.

meaning: 呼吸する / 息をする
example: 空氣很新鮮，我忍不住深呼吸了一下
english: The air was so fresh, I couldn't help but take a deep breath.

meaning: 抑える / コントロールする / 支配する
example: 公司正在努力控制成本
english: The company is working hard to control costs.

meaning: 監視カメラ / 防犯カメラ
example: 我們公司的監視器是正對著電梯門口的
english: Our company's surveillance cameras are positioned directly opposite the elevator entrance.

meaning: うんちをする
example: 我肚子痛，可能要去拉屎了
english: My stomach hurts, I probably need to poop.

meaning: 緊張している / 気を張っている
example: 他今天好像皮繃得蠻緊，可能是因為有重要會議
english: He seemed quite tense today, probably because of an important meeting.

meaning: …ならば / せっかく…だから
example: 既然你不想去，那我們就別勉強了
english: Since you don't want to go, let's not force you.

meaning: 体格 / 骨格
example: 我昨天搬重物，今天筋骨有點痠痛
english: I lifted heavy things yesterday, and my muscles and bones are a bit sore today.

meaning: コンタクトレンズ
example: 我每天早上都戴隱形眼鏡
english: I wear contact lenses every morning.

meaning: 老眼
example: 老花眼什麽時候開始？
english: When does presbyopia begin?

meaning: プライベート / 個人的なこと
example: 不要干涉別人的私人生活
english: Do not interfere in other people's private lives.

meaning: 切符を再発行する / 追加で購入する
example: 如果你的票不夠到終點站，就要補票
english: If your ticket isn't enough to get you to your final destination, you'll need to buy a new ticket.

meaning: アップロード
example: 上傳速度好像很慢
english: The upload speed seems very slow.

meaning: ダウンロード
example: 我需要下載新的軟體
english: I need to download new software.

meaning: クラウド
example: 我把照片存到雲端了
english: I've saved the photos to the cloud.

meaning: ファイル / ドキュメント / 資料
example: 如果檔案太大，可能上傳不了
english: If the file is too large, it may not be able to be uploaded.

meaning: ソフトウェア
example: 我們公司開發了一款新的軟體
english: Our company has developed a new software.

meaning: ハードウェア
example: 手機的硬體設計越來越輕薄
english: Mobile phone hardware designs are becoming increasingly thinner and lighter.

meaning: 開く / 始める / 起動する
example: 開啟檔案時發生了錯誤
english: An error occurred while opening the file.

meaning: タケノコ
example: 市場裡賣的竹筍很新鮮
english: The bamboo shoots sold in the market are very fresh.

meaning: 起業家 / 創業者
example: 許多創業者在創業初期會面臨資金的壓力
english: Many entrepreneurs face financial pressure in the early stages of starting a business.

meaning: 栗
example: 剝栗子的殼有點麻煩
english: Peeling chestnuts is a bit of a hassle

meaning: シイタケ
example: 煮湯時加一點香菇，味道會更香
english: Adding a few shiitake mushrooms when making soup will make it more fragrant.

meaning: 胃腸
example: 我腸胃不好，不能吃太油的食物
english: I have a sensitive stomach and can't eat oily food.

meaning: 起こす / 目を覚まさせる
example: 每天早上我都要叫弟弟起床
english: I have to wake my younger brother up every morning.

meaning: 目覚まし時計
example: 鬧鐘響了，可是我還是不想起床
english: The alarm clock rang, but I still didn't want to get out of bed.

meaning: 寝坊する
example: 忘記設鬧鐘，結果睡過頭了
english: I forgot to set my alarm and overslept.

meaning: ゴロゴロする / 布団からでられない
example: 我今天早上賴床了，差點遲到
english: I overslept this morning and almost missed my class.

meaning: 気分が悪い / 憂鬱である / 気持ちが沈んでいる
example: 她因為考試沒考好，心情不好
english: She was in a bad mood because she didn't do well on her exam.

meaning: 切迫している / 余裕がない / 緊張している
example: 最近公司的資金有點吃緊
english: The company is experiencing some financial difficulties recently.

meaning: 信頼できる / 頼れる / 信用に値する
example: 他做事一向很可靠，大家都很放心
english: He is always very reliable, and everyone trusts him.

meaning: とてもお利口 / とてもいい子
example: 你今天好乖喔，自己把功課寫完了
english: You were so good today, you finished your homework all by yourself.

meaning: ああ神様！ / なんてこと！
example: 老天爺啊，我的手機掉到水裡了！
english: Oh my god, my phone fell into the water!

meaning: 考え方 / 観念 / 意識 / 価値観 / 思想
example: 年輕人和長輩在金錢觀念上常常不一樣
english: Young people and elders often have different views on money.

meaning: しし座
example: 聽說獅子座的人很有自信，也很有領導能力
english: I've heard that Leos are very confident and have great leadership skills.

meaning: さそり座
example: 大兒子是天蠍座的，做事很有計畫性也很冷靜
english: The eldest son is a Scorpio; he is very methodical and calm in his actions.

meaning: おうし座
example: 金牛座的人很務實，做事一步一步來
english: Taureans are very practical and take things one step at a time.

meaning:
（動）団結する / まとまる / 協力し合う
（名）団結 / チームワーク / 一体感
example: 我們只有團結，才能戰勝困難
english: Only by uniting can we overcome difficulties.

meaning: 戦争
example: 戰爭帶來了無數的痛苦和破壞
english: War brings countless suffering and destruction.

meaning: 敵 / 敵対者 / 敵軍 / ライバル
example: 我們不怕敵人多，就怕自己不夠團結
english: We are not afraid of having many enemies, but we are afraid of not being united enough.

meaning: 証拠 / 証明になる事実・資料・物品など
example: 有沒有照片或影片當作證據？
english: Are there any photos or videos as evidence?

meaning: 非難する / 告発する
example: 你不能只是根據傳聞就指控他
english: You can't accuse him based on rumors alone.

meaning: 逮捕する / 身柄を拘束する
example: 他因為詐騙被逮捕，目前正在偵訊中
english: He was arrested for fraud and is currently under interrogation.

meaning: 批判する
example: 批判政府的政策是一種公民的權利
english: Criticizing government policies is a citizen's right.

meaning:
1.単純である / シンプル
2.純粋で複雑でない（性格・気持ち・行動）
example: 她個性很單純，對人沒有戒心
english: She has a very simple personality and is not wary of people.

meaning: 複雑である / 入り組んでいる / 分かりにくい
example: 這個申請流程太複雜了，一般人很難懂
english: This application process is too complicated; it's difficult for the average person to understand.

meaning: 腹を立てる / 怒る
example: 老婆對小事很容易生氣
english: My wife gets angry easily over trivial things.

meaning: ブロッコリー
example: 花椰菜富含維生素C和纖維
english: Cauliflower is rich in vitamin C and fiber.

meaning:
1.（食べ物を）漬ける / 漬け込む
2.調味料（塩・醤油・酢など）で味をしみ込ませること
example: 我媽媽很會醃漬蘿蔔，酸酸甜甜的很好吃
english: My mom is really good at pickling radishes; they're sweet and sour and taste delicious.

meaning: ハードル / 壁 / 基準 / 条件
example: 學中文對我來說是一個很高的門檻
english: Learning Chinese is a very high hurdle for me.

meaning: 実際に決済する / 本当にカードを通す
example: 你確定已經實刷了嗎？我這邊沒看到付款紀錄
english: Are you sure you've actually made the payment? I haven't seen any payment record on my end.

meaning: 分割払い / 分割にする
example: 我們需要做刷卡分期嗎？
english: Do we need to pay in installments by credit card?

meaning:
（動）アップグレードする / 昇格する
（名）アップグレード / 昇進 / 等級向上
example: 這款手機系統可以免費升級到最新版
english: This phone's operating system can be upgraded to the latest version for free.

meaning: ゼリー
example: 小朋友都很喜歡吃果凍，因為口感QQ的
english: Kids love jelly because of its chewy texture.

meaning: 引退する / 退く
example: 他已經決定從演藝圈引退了
english: He has decided to retire from the entertainment industry.

meaning: 浮気相手 / 愛人 / 不倫関係
example: 他老婆發現他有外遇，現在鬧離婚
english: His wife discovered he was having an affair and is now divorcing him.

meaning: 不倫・浮気する
example: 她一直懷疑老公出軌，但沒有證據
english: She had always suspected her husband of cheating, but had no proof.

meaning: ゴシップ / 噂話
example: 八卦傳得很快，一下子全公司都知道了
english: The gossip spread quickly, and soon the whole company knew about it.

meaning: 色気で誘う
example: 她用美色色誘那位有錢的老闆
english: She used her beauty to seduce the wealthy boss.

meaning: スタイル / 様式 / 特徴
example: 她的穿搭風格很好看
english: Her fashion sense is great.

meaning:
（形）乱れている / 散らかっている / 整っていない
（副）むやみに / 勝手に / いいかげんに / 無秩序に
（動）混乱する / 乱れる
example: 你的房間怎麼那麼亂？
english: Why is your room so messy?

meaning: 乱れてしまった / ぐちゃぐちゃになってしまった
example: 手機更新後，原本的設定都亂掉了
english: After the phone update, all the original settings were messed up.

meaning: カップル
example: 這家餐廳很適合情侶約會
english: This restaurant is perfect for couples' dates.

meaning: ペット
example: 養寵物需要不少費用
english: Keeping a pet requires a lot of money.

meaning: 犬用のリード / 犬の首輪付きの鎖
example: 我每天都用狗鍊帶狗去公園散步
english: I take my dog ​​for a walk in the park every day on a leash.

meaning: オレンジジュース
example: 你要喝柳橙汁還是蘋果汁？
english: Would you like orange juice or apple juice?

meaning: 意志 / 願望 / 〜したいという気持ち
example: 她對學習中文有很高的意願
english: She has a strong desire to learn Chinese.

meaning: 甘える
example: 不要對我撒嬌，這次我不會讓你出去玩
english: Don't try to be cute with me; I won't let you go out to play this time.

meaning: やる気 / 気力 /  / 根気
example: 最近天氣太熱，我整天都沒幹勁
english: It's been so hot lately, I've been feeling listless all day.

meaning: キャンディー / 飴
example: 小朋友最喜歡吃糖果了
english: Kids love candy the most.

meaning: 判断する / 見極める / 判定する
example: 你要仔細觀察，才能做出正確的判斷
english: You need to observe carefully to make the right judgment.

meaning: 自分で行う / セルフサービス
example: 台灣有很多好吃的自助餐店
english: Taiwan has many delicious buffet restaurants.

meaning: 懐かしむ / 懐かしく思う / 恋しく思う
example: 我很懷念小時候在鄉下的日子
english: I miss my childhood days in the countryside.

meaning: カビが生える / カビる
example: 衣櫃裡的衣服發黴了，好像是太潮濕了
english: The clothes in the closet are moldy; it seems to be because it's too damp.

meaning: ジャケット
example: 他穿著一件黑色的皮夾克，看起來很帥
english: He was wearing a black leather jacket and looked very handsome.

meaning: 保存する
example: 記得保存文件，避免突然關機導致資料遺失
english: Remember to save your files to avoid data loss due to sudden shutdown.

meaning: 乾燥剤
example: 放幾包乾燥劑在鞋櫃裡，可以防止發霉
english: Placing a few packets of desiccant in the shoe cabinet can prevent mold growth.

meaning: ダウンジャケット / ダウンコート
example: 我不喜歡太厚的羽絨衣，感覺行動不方便
english: I don't like thick down jackets; they feel restrictive.

meaning: 機能 / 機能性 / 働き
example: 這款手機的拍照功能非常強大
english: This phone has a very powerful camera.

meaning: 綿の掛け布団 / 綿入り布団
example: 冬天睡覺時，我喜歡蓋棉被，覺得特別溫暖
english: I like to sleep under a quilt in winter; it feels especially warm.

meaning: うつ伏せになる / 伏せる
example: 我想趴在你的胸前
english: I want to lie on your chest

meaning: アレルギーがある / 過剰に反応する
example: 我對花生過敏，不能吃
english: I am allergic to peanuts and cannot eat them.

meaning: 優越感
example: 他總是帶著一種優越感說話，讓人覺得不舒服
english: He always speaks with an air of superiority, which makes people uncomfortable.

meaning: 疑う / 疑念を持つ / 不信に思う
example: 我開始懷疑他的話是不是真的
english: I began to doubt whether what he said was true.

meaning: 家庭内の用事 / 家事 / 家族間の私事・問題
example: 我每天都要做很多家事，真的很累
english: I have so many housework to do every day, it's really tiring.

meaning:
（動）監視し / 指導する
（名）管理者としての「監督者」
example: 這個工程需要有人來監督施工品質
english: This project needs someone to supervise the construction quality.

meaning: どうせ～ / いずれにせよ～ / とにかく
example: 我會試試看，反正沒什麼損失
english: I'll give it a try; there's nothing to lose anyway.

meaning: 責任感
example: 很多人認為現代的年輕人缺乏責任感
english: Many people believe that modern young people lack a sense of responsibility.

meaning: 意志の力 / 意思の強さ / やり抜く力
example: 減肥需要很強的意志力
english: Losing weight requires a lot of willpower.

meaning: （名）通勤 （動）通勤する
example: 你通勤是搭捷運還是公車？
english: Do you commute by subway or bus?

meaning: オフィス
example: 我在考慮明年要不要租辦公室
english: I'm considering whether to rent an office next year.

meaning: 賃貸する
example: 這份租賃合約有效期是一年
english: This lease agreement is valid for one year.

meaning: 有効期限
example: 這個身分證已經過了有效期，需要更新
english: This ID card has expired and needs to be renewed.

meaning: 案件 / プロジェクト / 計画
example: 我們正在做一個新的行銷案子
english: We are working on a new marketing case.

meaning: 警察 / 警官 / 警察機関
example: 如果發生危險，要馬上打電話給警察
english: If danger occurs, call the police immediately.

meaning: 価値が上昇する
example: 最近美元對台幣升值了
english: The US dollar has recently appreciated against the Taiwan dollar.

meaning: 予測する / 予想する
example: 氣象局預測明天會下大雨
english: The weather bureau predicts heavy rain tomorrow.

meaning: 重大である / 深刻である
example: 最近小吃店倒閉得很嚴重
english: Recently, many snack shops have been closing down.

meaning: 製造業
example: 製造業的工廠也開始導入自動化機器來提高效率
english: Manufacturing plants are also beginning to introduce automated machines to improve efficiency.

meaning: 空き家 / 空室 / 使われていない家
example: 這棟房子已經變成空屋好多年了
english: This house has been empty for many years.

meaning: 忠告する / すすめる
example: 我勸你不要太相信網路上的訊息
english: I advise you not to trust information on the internet too much.

meaning: めちゃくちゃ叩かれる / 非難が殺到する
example: 你有看到那個明星昨天被罵爆嗎？
english: Did you see which celebrity was getting a lot of flak yesterday?

meaning: 泡 / （比喩）バブル / 実体のないもの
example: 很多人認為現在的房市是一場泡沫
english: Many people believe that the current housing market is a bubble.

meaning: 破裂する / 爆発する / （比喩的に）関係が壊れる
example: 泡沫經濟終於破裂，股市大跌
english: The economic bubble finally burst, and the stock market plummeted.

meaning:
（名）負担 
（動）負担する / 背負う
example: 他一個人負擔全家的生活費
english: He single-handedly supports the entire family.

meaning: 取締役会長 / 会長 / 企業のトップ
example: 董事長今天不在公司，請改天再來
english: The chairman is not in the office today. Please come another day.

meaning: 欲望 / 欲求 / 願望
example: 人都有慾望，重點是怎麼控制它
english: Everyone has desires; the key is how to control them.

meaning: 生活をする / 暮らす
example: 我不知道很多臺灣人是怎麼過生活的
english: I don't know how many Taiwanese people live their lives.

meaning: お金を借りる
example: 你可以借我一點錢嗎？我下週還你
english: Can you lend me some money? I'll pay you back next week.

meaning: 負債 / 借金 / 借りているお金
example: 這家公司負債超過資產，面臨倒閉危機
english: This company has liabilities exceeding assets and faces bankruptcy.

meaning:
（名）ランキング / 順位
（動）順位づけする
example: 根據最新的排名，台灣護照全球排名第34
english: According to the latest rankings, the Taiwan passport ranks 34th globally.

meaning: 生まれて育つ
example: 我是在東京出生長大的
english: I was born and raised in Tokyo.

meaning: 廟の中で / お寺の中に
example: 我昨天去廟裡拜拜
english: I went to the temple to pray yesterday.

meaning: 労働者
example: 很多外籍勞工在台灣工作
english: Many foreign workers work in Taiwan

meaning: 優位 / アドバンテージ / 優勢
example: 我們必須找到自己的優勢，才能在市場中立足
english: We must find our own strengths in order to gain a foothold in the market.

meaning: 身のまわり / そば
example: 不管什麼發生，我都會在你身邊
english: No matter what happens, I will be by your side.

meaning: 後悔する / 悔やむ
example: 後悔也來不及了，事情已經發生了
english: It's too late for regrets; what's done is done.

meaning: 財産 / 富 / 資産
example: 家庭和健康也是一種財富
english: Family and health are also forms of wealth.

meaning: 取り出す / 出す / 出して見せる
example: 他從書包裡拿出來一本書
english: He took a book out of his schoolbag.

meaning: 冷たい態度や無視などによる精神的な暴力
example: 他在吵架後常用冷暴力來對待我
english: He often uses the silent treatment on me after arguments.

meaning: どちらも大差ない / 似たり寄ったり / お互い五分五分
example: 他們兩個常常吵架，其實半斤八兩啦
english: They often argue, but they're actually pretty much the same.

meaning: 意見を述べる / 意見を出す
example: 如果你有更好的想法，歡迎提意見
english: If you have any better ideas, please feel free to share them.

meaning: 長時間待たされた / けっこう長く待った
example: 我們等了半天，結果他沒來
english: We waited for ages, but he never came.

meaning: 鍵
example: 我找了半天，終於找到鑰匙了
english: I searched for ages and finally found the key.

meaning:
（動）販売する
（名）販売
example: 這個品牌的化妝品已經連續6年銷售No.1
english: This brand of cosmetics has been the No.1 seller for six consecutive years.

meaning:
（動）販売する
（名）突破
example: 這家公司去年突破了營收一億元的紀錄
english: This company broke its revenue record of 100 million yuan last year.

meaning: 宇宙 / コスモス
example: 宇宙中可能存在其他生命
english: There may be other life in the universe.

meaning: 撮影する
example: 我喜歡拍攝自然風景
english: I enjoy photographing natural landscapes.

meaning: メーカー / 業者 / サプライヤー / 企業
example: 我們正在找新的軟體廠商合作
english: We are looking for new software vendors to partner with.

meaning: 偏る / 〜に傾いている
example: 這種風格比較偏向歐美市場的口味
english: This style is more suited to the tastes of the European and American markets.

meaning: 検出する / 探知する / 検知する
example: 系統能夠自動偵測異常
english: The system can automatically detect anomalies.

meaning: 方針 / 戦略 / 計画 / 構想
example: 一個成功的行銷方略需要明確的市場定位
english: A successful marketing strategy requires a clear market positioning.

meaning: 角 / 隅 / コーナー
example: 這家咖啡店有個很安靜的角落，適合讀書
english: This coffee shop has a very quiet corner, perfect for reading.

meaning: 副菜 / 付け合わせ
example: 這家便當店的配菜每天都不一樣
english: The side dishes at this bento shop are different every day.

meaning: 明細 / 詳細なリストや内訳
example: 你可以寄電子明細給我嗎？
english: Can you send me an electronic statement?

meaning:
（動）積み重ねる / 蓄積する
（名）累積
example: 您點數要扣嗎？還是繼續累積？
english: Do you want your points deducted, or should they continue to accumulate?

meaning: 差し引く / 控除する / 引き去る
example: 扣掉優惠後，這件衣服只要八百塊
english: After the discount, this dress only costs 800 yuan.

meaning: 残る / 余る / 残しておく
example: 剩下的時間不多了，我們快點吧
english: We don't have much time left, let's hurry!

meaning: ビタミン
example: 醫生建議我補充維他命C
english: The doctor recommended that I take vitamin C supplements.

meaning: 信頼できる / 当てになる / 頼りになる
example: 我現在在辦公室見到靠譜的前輩
english: I'm now meeting reliable senior colleagues in the office.

meaning: 中止する / 中断する
example: 如果中斷學中文，以後可能會後悔
english: You might regret it later if you stop learning Chinese.

meaning: 知らせ / ニュース / 情報
example: 根據最新消息，颱風明天會登陸
english: According to the latest news, the typhoon will make landfall tomorrow.

meaning: 整理する / 整える / かたづける
example: 你可以整理一下桌子嗎？
english: Could you tidy up the table?

meaning: 向こう岸 / 対岸
example: 最近對岸的經濟情況也受到很多關注
english: The economic situation on the other side of the strait has also recently attracted much attention.

meaning: 団体 / グループ / 組織
example: 參加團體活動可以認識很多新朋友
english: Participating in group activities can help you meet many new friends.

meaning: （成）応用する
example: 他學東西很快，常常可以舉一反三
english: He learns things very quickly and can often apply what he has learned to other situations.

meaning: にぎやかで活気がある / 盛り上がっている
example: 每次過年，家裡都很熱鬧
english: My home is always very lively during Chinese New Year.

meaning: ある～ / 特定の～
example: 我在某個網站上看到這個消息的
english: I saw this message on a website.

meaning: 流暢である / スムーズである / なめらかである
example: 你的日文說得很流暢
english: Your Japanese is very fluent.

meaning: 年長者
example: 我們要尊重長輩
english: We must respect our elders

meaning: 先輩 / 経験豊富な人
example: 他是我們公司的前輩，做這行已經十年了
english: He's a senior colleague in our company; he's been in this industry for ten years.

meaning: 親戚 / 親類
example: 我有一個親戚在國外工作
english: I have a relative who works abroad.

meaning: 言い伝えられている / 伝承によれば / 伝説によると
example: 這座古廟，相傳已有三百年歷史
english: This ancient temple is said to be three hundred years old.

meaning: 海を越える / 海をまたぐ
example: 跨海大橋已經完工了
english: The cross-sea bridge has been completed.

meaning: 特有の / 独自の / 独特の
example: 他有一種獨有的幽默感
english: He has a unique sense of humor.

meaning: 結婚した女性の実家
example: 我媽媽說她很久沒回娘家了
english: My mom said she hasn't been back to her parents' home in a long time.

meaning: 〜の傾向がある / 〜しがちである / 〜に傾く
example: 我通常會先來一杯啤酒，之後傾向於喝烏龍茶燒酒
english: I usually start with a beer, then tend to drink oolong tea and soju.

meaning: 一日中 / 終日
example: 他整天都在打電動
english: He plays video games all day.

pinyin: jī dàn lǐ tiāo gǔ tóu
meaning: 無理に欠点を探す / あら探しをする / 揚げ足を取る / 重箱の隅をつつく
example: 主管有時候只是想雞蛋裡挑骨頭，別太放在心上
english: Sometimes supervisors are just nitpicking; don't take it too seriously.

meaning: 〜なのに / 〜のはずなのに / はっきりと〜しているのに
example: 他明明說過要來，卻沒出現
english: He clearly said he would come, but he didn't show up.

meaning:
（動）協力する / 連携する / 合わせる
（名）組み合わせ / 協力の関係
example: 為了完成這個任務，我們需要密切配合
english: To accomplish this task, we need to cooperate closely.

meaning: 業界 / 職種 / 業種
example: 他在科技行業工作了十年
english: He worked in the technology industry for ten years.

meaning: 残念に思う / 心残り / 遺憾
example: 我對這次的結果感到非常遺憾
english: I am very disappointed with this result.

meaning: 含む / 含める / 含まれている
example: 價格已經包含稅金和運費
english: The price includes taxes and shipping.

meaning: 思いやりがある / 気が利く / 心配りができる / 優しい
example: 你寫的卡片好貼心，看了讓我想哭
english: The card you wrote was so thoughtful, it made me want to cry.

meaning: 調整する
example: 最近公司有很多變化，我不知道該怎麼調整自己
english: There have been many changes at the company recently, and I don't know how to adjust myself.

meaning: 頑固な / 意見を変えない / こだわる
example: 他個性很固執，不容易接受別人的建議
english: He is very stubborn and doesn't easily accept other people's suggestions.

meaning: 柔軟に対応する / 臨機応変に考える / 融通を利かせる
example: 遇到困難的時候，要學會變通
english: When encountering difficulties, learn to be flexible.

meaning: （形）混乱している / 秩序がない / めちゃくちゃな状態
example: 因為資訊太多，我感到很混亂
english: I feel overwhelmed by the sheer volume of information.

meaning:
（名）基準 / 規格 / スタンダード
（形）標準的な / 正確な / 模範的な
example: 每個人對「成功」的標準都不一樣
english: Everyone has a different standard for "success".

meaning: 潜在意識の中で / 無意識のうちに
example: 潛意識當中，我其實一直害怕失敗
english: Subconsciously, I've always been afraid of failure.

meaning:
（動）嫌う / 嫌がる
（形）嫌な / うっとうしい
example: 討厭的天氣，又濕又熱！
english: Ugh, this weather is awful, so humid and hot!

meaning: 区別する / 分類する / 見分ける
example: 我常常搞不清楚怎麼區分這兩種語法
english: I often get confused about how to distinguish between these two types of grammar.

meaning: まわり / 周囲 / 身のまわり
example: 學校附近的周遭的環境很安靜，適合讀書
english: The area around the school is quiet, making it a good place to study.

meaning: めちゃくちゃ / 乱れている / 散らかっている
example: 他的房間總是亂七八糟，找東西很困難
english: His room was always a mess, making it difficult to find things.

meaning: やはり / なんといっても / 結局のところ / そもそも
example: 他畢竟是公司裡最有經驗的人，處理這種事情很拿手
english: He was, after all, the most experienced person in the company, and he was very adept at handling these kinds of things.

meaning: シャワーを浴びる
example: 我每天早上起床都會沖澡
english: I take a shower every morning when I get up.

meaning: 湿っている / 湿気が多い / じめじめしている
example: 台灣的夏天很潮濕，有時候讓人很不舒服
english: Summers in Taiwan are very humid, which can sometimes be quite uncomfortable.

meaning: 除湿する / 湿気を取り除く
example: 衣櫃裡我會放除濕包，防止發霉
english: I put dehumidifier packets in my wardrobe to prevent mold.

meaning: 近づく / 接近する
example: 颱風正在接近台灣，大家要做好準備
english: A typhoon is approaching Taiwan; everyone should be prepared.

meaning: 似ている / （距離・数値・性質が）近い
example: 他們的年齡相近，很容易聊得來
english: They were close in age and got along very well.

meaning: 消える / なくなる / 姿を消す
example: 手機突然消失了，我找不到它
english: My phone suddenly disappeared, and I can't find it.

meaning: アルバム（音楽アルバム・写真集など）
example: 她的新專輯已經在網路上發行了
english: Her new album has already been released online.

meaning: 勉強する / 読書する
example: 我明天有考試，今天要好好念書
english: I have an exam tomorrow, so I need to study hard today.

meaning: 脅迫して金品をゆすり取る / 恐喝する
example: 父母用愛來要求孩子服從，這是一種情緒勒索
english: Using love to demand obedience from children is a form of emotional blackmail.

meaning: イコールで結ぶ / 同一視する
example: 不能把愛跟控制畫上等號
english: Love should not be equated with control.

meaning: 道徳 / モラル / 倫理
example: 這樣做雖然合法，但在道德上可能會被批評
english: While this is legal, it may be morally objectionable.

meaning:
（名）脅し / 脅迫
（動）脅す / 威圧する
example:
A：你不答應我，我就把事情說出去！
B：你這樣是在威脅我嗎？
english:
A: If you don't agree, I'll tell everyone!

B: Are you threatening me?

meaning: ～に詰まる / ～に引っかかる / ～で止まってしまう
example: 很多初級往中級的學生都卡在用詞不自然這一關
english: Many beginner to intermediate students get stuck on the issue of unnatural word choice.

meaning: 過程 / プロセス / 途中の段階
example: 學習語言是一個長期的過程，需要耐心
english: Learning a language is a long-term process that requires patience.

meaning: ノートを取る / メモを書く
example: 上課的時候，我習慣用電腦寫筆記
english: I usually take notes on my computer during class.

meaning: ためらう / 迷う / 決めかねる
example: 我在猶豫要不要買iPhone 17
english: I'm hesitating about whether to buy an iPhone 17.

meaning: システム / 体系 / 仕組み
example: 導入AI相關的系統後，生產過程變得更加自動化
english: After implementing AI-related systems, the production process became more automated.

meaning: 引き延ばす / 長くする
example: 因為專案遇到困難，我們決定把截止日期拉長一個月
english: Because the project encountered difficulties, we decided to extend the deadline by one month.

meaning: 開通する / つながる / 通じる / 導入する
example: 我們還沒開通行動支付
english: We haven't enabled mobile payments yet.

meaning: 乗る / 利用する（例：バス / 電車 / 飛行機など）
example: 請問去台北車站要搭幾號公車？
english: Which bus number should I take to get to Taipei Main Station?

meaning: ～に変える / 変更する / 改める
example: 我剛剛點的是紅茶，但我可以改成綠茶嗎？
english: I just ordered black tea, but can I change it to green tea?

meaning: 差し引く / 控除する / 引き落とす
example: 扣除成本後，公司的利潤還是不多
english: After deducting costs, the company's profit is still not much.

meaning: ～を考慮に入れる / ～を考えに含める
example: 我考量到每個月的成本
english: I considered the monthly costs

meaning: 雇う / 招く / スカウトする / 招聘する
example: 公司計畫聘請一位有經驗的會計師
english: The company plans to hire an experienced accountant.

meaning: 委託する / 依頼する
example: 我們公司將物流業務委託給專業的快遞公司
english: Our company outsources its logistics operations to professional courier companies.

meaning: 順番に / 交代で / 交替する
example: 我們輪流打掃教室
english: We took turns cleaning the classroom.

meaning: 外向的である / 社交的である
example: 他是一個外向的人，喜歡交朋友
english: He is an extroverted person who enjoys making friends.

meaning: 内向的である / 控えめ
example: 他是一個內向的人，不喜歡在人多的場合說話
english: He is an introverted person and doesn't like to speak in crowded places.

meaning: 共通点
example: 我們之間有很多共通點，比如都喜歡旅行
english: We have a lot in common, for example, we both love to travel.

meaning: （成）ちゃっかり得をする / こっそり得を取る / ずるい小さな利益を得ようとする
example: 有些人習慣攤小便宜，但其實最後得不償失
english: Some people are used to trying to get small advantages, but in the end, they often lose more than they gain.

meaning: かつて / 以前 / 過去に
example: 我們曾經是好朋友，但現在已經沒有聯絡了
english: We used to be good friends, but we've lost touch.

meaning: 悲しみ / 哀しみ / 哀れみ / 悲しい
example: 失去親人帶來無盡的悲哀
english: Losing a loved one brings endless sorrow

meaning: 贈り物 / プレゼント
example: 聖誕節快到了，我打算準備一些贈品送給朋友們
english: Christmas is coming soon, and I plan to prepare some gifts for my friends.

meaning: 役 / キャラクター / 役割
example: 我最喜歡的遊戲角色是那個勇敢的戰士
english: My favorite game character is that brave warrior.

meaning: 低迷する / 停滞する
example: 最近市場表現低迷，投資人很擔心
english: The recent sluggish market performance has investors very worried.

meaning: 遅れさせる / 遅延させる / 引き延ばす / （人の時間や進行を）妨げる
example: 不好意思，事情耽誤了，讓你久等了
english: I'm sorry for the delay; I've kept you waiting.

meaning: 起こる / 発生する / 生じる
example: 你心情很好喔！發生什麼事情嗎？
english: You seem to be in a good mood! Did something happen?

meaning: コーディネート
example: 你今天的穿搭很好看欸
english: Your outfit looks great today!

meaning: 組み合わせる / コーディネートする
example: 她很會搭配顏色，穿衣風格很有品味
english: She has a great sense of color matching and her clothing style is very tasteful.

meaning: 忠誠 / 忠実 / 誠実 / 誠意
example: 員工的忠誠度直接影響公司的發展
english: Employee loyalty directly impacts a company's development.

meaning: しもべ / 召使い / 家僕
example: 我願意當你ㄧ輩子的僕人
english: I am willing to be your servant for life.

meaning: 繰り返す / 重なる / ダブる
example: 請不要重複同樣的錯誤
english: Please do not repeat the same mistake.

meaning: ドラマを追いかけて見る / ドラマをハマって観る
example: 我週末都用來追劇了
english: I spent my weekend binge-watching TV series.

meaning: 姿勢 / ポーズ / 態度
example: 保持良好的姿勢對健康很重要
english: Maintaining good posture is important for health.

meaning: 増やす / 添える / 付け加える
example: 花瓶裡的花為房間增添了溫暖感
english: The flowers in the vase added warmth to the room.

meaning: 沈黙 / 黙る / 無言
example: 他在會議中保持沈默
english: He remained silent during the meeting.

meaning: どうしてこんなに～なの？ / なんでこんなに～？
example: 怎麼這麼多人排隊？
english: Why are there so many people in line?

meaning: 体験 / 体験する / 経験する
example: 體驗不同文化是一件很有趣的事
english: Experiencing different cultures is a very interesting thing.

meaning: 交通事故 / 車の事故
example: 這條路常常發生車禍
english: Car accidents often happen on this road.

meaning: 遠距離
example: 公司允許員工遠距工作
english: The company allows employees to work remotely.

meaning: 画面 / スクリーンの映像
example: 電視畫面突然黑了
english: The TV screen suddenly went black.

meaning: スクリーン / モニター / ディスプレイ
example: 我的手機螢幕突然黑掉了，什麼都看不到
english: My phone screen suddenly went black, and I can't see anything.

meaning: 語順
example: 中文的語序和日文不一樣
english: The word order in Chinese is different from that in Japanese.

meaning: 残す / 残しておく / 残る / 置いていく
example: 桌上留下了一封信
english: A letter was left on the table

meaning: 行政 / 行政機関 / マネジメント
example: 行政部門負責政策執行
english: The administrative department is responsible for policy implementation.

meaning: 正社員
example: 我想找一份正職工作
english: I want to find a full-time job.

meaning: 副業
example: 有些公司禁止員工做副業
english: Some companies prohibit employees from having side jobs.

meaning: 大まかに言って / おおむね
example: 大致上內容都看過了
english: I've read most of the content.

meaning: まるで～のようだ / ちょうど～のようだ
example: 他就像哥哥一樣照顧我
english: He took care of me like an older brother.

meaning: 疑問 / 質問
example: 你有什麼疑問嗎？
english: Do you have any questions?

meaning: 代表性 / 代表的な性質 / 典型性
example: 這位歌手的音樂很有時代的代表性
english: This singer's music is very representative of its era.

meaning: 都市と農村の格差
example: 臺灣還不至於說城鄉差距很大
english: Taiwan is not quite at the point where the urban-rural gap is so large.

meaning: メッセージ
example: 我剛到家，還沒來得及看訊息
english: I just got home and haven't had time to check my messages yet.

meaning: まだ〜というほどではない / そこまでではない
example: 公司財務出現問題，但還不至於會倒閉
english: The company is experiencing financial problems, but it's not enough to cause it to go bankrupt.

meaning: （荷物などを）一時的に預ける / 預かる
example: 可以幫我寄放行李嗎？
english: Can you store my luggage for me?

meaning: 風習 / 習わし
example: 結婚有很多傳統習俗
english: There are many traditional customs associated with marriage.

meaning:
（名）感覚 / 感じ / 受け取った感情や印象
（動）感じる / 体験する / 心に響く
example: 每個人對事情的感受不同
english: Everyone feels things differently.

meaning: 要因 / 要素 / 原因 / ファクター
example: 我們需要分析影響結果的因素
english: We need to analyze the factors that influence the results.

meaning:
（動）認める / 賛同する / 同意する
（名）認同感 / 共感 / アイデンティティの確認
example: 他們需要時間來認同彼此的想法
english: They need time to come to terms with each other's ideas.

meaning: お互いに / 双方 / 互いに
example: 我們需要彼此信任
english: We need to trust each other

meaning: 崩れる / 潰れる / 精神的に限界になる / パニックになる
example: 最近工作太多，感覺快要崩潰
english: I've been working too much lately and I feel like I'm about to break down.

meaning: 赤ちゃんを預ける / 保育施設に預ける
example: 我每天早上把孩子託嬰
english: I take my child to the baby care center every morning.

meaning: 過激な / 急進的な
example: 他的想法太激進了，大家都無法接受
english: His ideas were too radical; no one could accept them.

meaning: （感情が）激しく動く / 興奮する / 感動する
example: 激動的人有時候需要學會控制情緒
english: Excited people sometimes need to learn to control their emotions.

meaning: 回復する / 元に戻る / 復旧する / リカバリーする
example: 請問刪除的檔案可以恢復嗎？
english: Can deleted files be recovered?

meaning: モード / パターン / 方式 / モジュール
example: 請將手機調整到飛航模式
english: Please switch your phone to airplane mode.

meaning: 実行する / 施行する / 実施する
example: 為了改善交通，政府開始實施新的交通規則
english: In order to improve traffic, the government began implementing new traffic rules.

meaning: 会う / 顔を合わせる（偶然・一時的）
example: 我們好久沒碰面了，你最近怎麼樣？
english: We haven't seen each other in a long time. How have you been?

meaning: 実行する / 遂行する / 執行する
example: 法院已經開始執行判決
english: The court has begun enforcing the judgment.

meaning: 懐かしく思う / 恋しい
example: 我懷念日本的食物
english: I miss Japanese food.

meaning: 思考 / 思考方法 / 考え方
example: 他有很靈活的思維，總是能想到新方法
english: He has a very flexible mind and can always come up with new methods.

meaning: カレンダー / 日めくり
example: 我每天早上會看一下日曆安排行程
english: I check the calendar every morning to plan my schedule.

meaning: スケジュール表 / 予定表
example: 請你確認一下明天的行程表
english: Please check tomorrow's schedule.

meaning: 一生 / 一生涯
example: 我想跟你在一起一輩子
english: I want to be with you for the rest of my life.

meaning: ベジタリアン料理
example: 我吃素，所以每天都吃素食
english: I'm vegetarian, so I eat vegetarian food every day.

meaning: 一粒一粒がはっきりしている / パラパラしてる
example: 這盤炒飯粒粒分明，看起來就很好吃
english: This fried rice looks delicious, with each grain separate.

meaning: 並ぶ
example: 那家雞排店排隊的人很多，但其實很快就排到了
english: There was a long line at that chicken cutlet shop, but you actually get to the front of the line very quickly.

meaning: 生クリーム
example: 我想加一點鮮奶油在咖啡裡
english: I want to add some whipped cream to my coffee.

meaning: しつこくない / 飽きない / 脂っこくない
example: 這杯珍奶甜度剛好，喝起來不膩，很順口
english: This bubble tea has just the right amount of sweetness; it's not cloying and tastes very smooth.

meaning: チェーン（店）
example: 這是一家全台都有分店的連鎖咖啡店
english: This is a chain coffee shop with branches all over Taiwan.

meaning: 外見 / 見た目
example: 不要只看一個人的外貌，更重要的是內在
english: Don't judge a person by their appearance; inner qualities are more important.

meaning: リュックサック / バックパック
example: 這個揹包很輕，裝很多東西也不會重
english: This backpack is very light; it won't feel heavy even if you put a lot of things in it.

meaning: カプセルトイ / ガチャガチャ
example: 我昨天花了三百塊去玩扭蛋，結果還是沒轉到想要的角色
english: I spent 300 yuan playing the gacha game yesterday, but I still didn't get the character I wanted.

word: 就膩了 副詞＋形容詞＋了
meaning: すぐ飽きた / すぐうんざりした
example: 孩子們扭完扭蛋，很快就膩了
english: The kids got bored of the gashapon toys very quickly.

meaning: 無能で役に立たない / 価値がない
example: 我今天什麼事都沒做，好像一個小廢物
english: I didn't do anything today, I feel like a complete waste.

meaning: バスタブ / 浴槽
example: 孩子在浴缸裡玩水玩得不想起來
english: The child played in the bathtub so much that he didn't want to get out.

meaning: 湯船に浸かる / お風呂に入る
example: 我工作一天很累，最喜歡回家泡澡放鬆
english: After a long day at work, I love nothing more than taking a relaxing bath when I get home.

meaning: 英雄 / ヒーロー / 勇敢で立派な人
example: 歷史上的英雄大多都有堅強的意志和信念
english: Most heroes in history possessed strong will and beliefs.

meaning: 壁紙 / 背景画像（スマホ・PCなどデジタル機器で）
example: 我換了新的手機桌布，是我家的狗狗
english: I changed my phone wallpaper to one featuring my dog.

meaning: （電話が）かかってくる
example: 客戶的電話打進來了，我先接一下
english: The customer called, I'll answer it first.

meaning: 真剣に / まじめに / 丁寧に / 本気で
example: 她上課的時候總是很認真，老師對她印象很好
english: She is always very attentive in class, and her teachers have a very good impression of her.

meaning: 歩きながら食べる
example: 我們在夜市邊走邊吃，好開心！
english: We strolled through the night market, eating as we went, and it was so much fun!

meaning: 特に〜だ / とりわけ〜は…
example: 我喜歡吃甜點，是巧克力蛋糕
english: I like desserts, especially chocolate cake.

meaning: ぎっしり詰まっている / いっぱいになっている
example: 捷運車廂擠滿了人，連站的空間都沒有
english: The subway cars were packed with people; there wasn't even room to stand.

meaning: 申請する / 申し込む / 申請手続き
example: 我申請學校的交換留學
english: I applied for the school's exchange program.

meaning: 皮がむける
example: 冬天太乾燥，我的腳也開始脫皮
english: Winter is so dry, my feet are starting to peel.

meaning: リップクリーム・リップバーム
example: 冬天很乾燥，一定要擦護唇膏
english: Winter is very dry, so you must use lip balm.

meaning: 内臓
example: 他不敢吃內臟類的食物
english: He dares not eat offal.

meaning: 虫 / 昆虫
example: 我最怕會飛的蟲，像是蟑螂
english: I'm most afraid of flying insects, like cockroaches.

meaning: アカウント（例：SNSアカウントなど）
example: 請輸入您的帳號和密碼
english: Please enter your account and password.

meaning:
（名）公式 / オフィシャル
（形）公的な
example: 這是遊戲的官方網站
english: This is the game's official website.

meaning: とても面白い / 興味深い
example: 這部電影很有意思
english: This movie is very interesting

meaning: 二日酔い
example: 每次清酒我都會宿醉
english: I always get a hangover from drinking sake.

meaning: 文章 / 文
example: 你的文章語法有一些錯誤
english: Your article contains some grammatical errors.

meaning: 推し活
example: 她從國中就開始追星，收集很多明星的周邊商品
english: She started following celebrities in junior high school and collected a lot of celebrity merchandise.

meaning: だから / そのために / したがって
example: 公司最近經營不善，因此的話，有些員工可能會被裁員
english: The company has been experiencing poor performance recently, therefore, some employees may be laid off.

meaning: 「投稿する
example: 我剛剛在IG上PO文了，你有看到嗎？
english: I just posted on Instagram, did you see it?

meaning: Webページ
example: 你可以把那個網頁的連結傳給我嗎？
english: Could you send me the link to that webpage?

meaning: スマートフォン
example: 我剛換了一支新的智慧型手機
english: I just got a new smartphone.

meaning: カスタマーサービス / 顧客対応担当者
example: 我想聯絡客服解決我的問題
english: I want to contact customer service to resolve my issue.

meaning: びっくりした / 驚いた（驚いてドキッとした）
example: 門突然打開，大家都嚇了一跳
english: The door suddenly opened, startling everyone.

meaning: 年を取った / 年配になった / 年を取ると
example: 年紀大了，酒量就越來越不好了
english: As you get older, your alcohol tolerance decreases.

meaning: 串焼き
example: 我們去居酒屋吃串燒配啤酒吧
english: Let's go to an izakaya for yakitori and beer!

meaning: よく合う / 相性が良い / ぴったり
example: 毛豆和啤酒很搭
english: Edamame and beer go well together.

meaning: 偏食する
example: 我弟弟以前挑食，現在什麼都敢吃了
english: My younger brother used to be a picky eater, but now he'll eat anything.

meaning: いじめる / からかう / 虐げる
example: 哥哥總是喜歡欺負弟弟
english: The older brother always likes to bully the younger brother.

meaning:
（動）いじめる
（名）いじめ
example: 學校應該正視校園霸凌的問題
english: Schools should take the issue of school bullying seriously.

meaning: ちょうど / ぴったり / たまたま
example: 我太太剛好在家，所以我們一起出去吃飯了
english: My wife happened to be home, so we went out to eat together.

meaning: たまたま / 偶然に
example: 我碰巧遇見了老朋友
english: I happened to run into an old friend.

meaning:
（動）手配する / 段取りをする / スケジュールを立てる
（名）計画 / 手配 / アレンジ
example: 我每天可以自己安排時間，所以想工作的時候就可以工作，感覺很自在
english: I can manage my own time each day, so I can work whenever I want, which makes me feel very comfortable.

meaning:
（名）バランス
（動）バランスを取る / 釣り合いを保つ
（形）バランスが取れている（状態の説明）
example: 保持生活與工作的平衡很重要
english: Maintaining a work-life balance is important

meaning: サラリーマン
example: 創業以後，我就不想再回去當上班族了
english: After starting my own business, I don't want to go back to being an office worker.

meaning: 金をもうける / 金がもうかる
example: 上班族雖然很努力，但是賺的錢不多
english: Office workers work very hard, but they don't earn much money.

meaning: 共有する / 共に分かち合う
example: 我們公司最近搬到一間新的共享辦公室，設施很齊全
english: Our company recently moved to a new shared office space with very complete facilities.

meaning: 領域 / 分野 / エリア / 専門範囲
example: 我對這個領域不太熟悉
english: I'm not very familiar with this field.

meaning: 不確実性 / 不安定さ / 予測不可能な性質
example: 我不知道未來會發生什麼，因為有太多不確定性
english: I don't know what the future holds because there are too many uncertainties.

meaning: 順調にいく / スムーズに進む / うまくいく
example: 專案的進度比預期還要更順利
english: The project is progressing even more smoothly than expected.

meaning:
（動）資金を募る / 募金する
（名）資金調達
example: 創業初期的募款真的不容易，需要很多人脈與說服力
english: Fundraising in the early stages of a startup is really difficult; it requires a lot of connections and persuasive skills.

meaning:
（動）貢献する
（名）貢献
example: 這份工作讓我覺得自己真的在貢獻社會
english: This job makes me feel like I'm truly contributing to society.

meaning:
（動）お金を寄付する
（名）寄付金 / 募金
example: 我們公司每年都會定期捐款給慈善機構
english: Our company regularly donates to charities every year.

meaning: 寂しい / 孤独な
example: 在異國生活，有時候真的很寂寞
english: Living in a foreign country can be really lonely sometimes.

meaning: 手続き / 手続き上の作業 / プロセス
example: 辦理簽證需要哪些手續？
english: What are the procedures for applying for a visa?

meaning: 慎重である / 注意深い
example: 他是一個做事很慎重的人
english: He is a very cautious person.

meaning: シャワーを浴びる
example: 我每天早上起床後都會先沖澡
english: I take a shower every morning after I get up.

meaning: 説得する
example: 我花了很長時間才說服他接受這個提案
english: It took me a long time to convince him to accept the proposal.

meaning: 互いに補い合う / 補完し合う
example: 我們的性格很互補，他外向，我內向
english: Our personalities complement each other well; he's extroverted, and I'm introverted.

meaning: ちょっと見る / 少し見てみる
example: 請你看一看看這份文件有沒有錯
english: Please take a look at this document and see if there are any errors.

meaning: 含む / カバーする / 範囲に及ぶ
example: 課程內容涵蓋文法 / 聽力 / 口說與寫作
english: The course content covers grammar, listening, speaking, and writing.

meaning: 広める / 普及させる / プロモートする
example: 這家公司花了很多錢推廣新產品
english: This company spent a lot of money promoting its new products.

meaning: よく知っている / 親しい / 慣れている
example: 我跟他很熟，常常一起吃飯
english: I know him very well; we often eat together.

meaning: ～しか残っていない / ～だけが残る
example: 這部電影票只剩前排的位子了
english: Only front-row seats are left for this movie.

meaning: 〜のようなもの / 〜など / 〜の類 / 〜とか（など）
example: 我對科技 / 機器人之類的話題很有興趣
english: I am very interested in topics such as technology and robotics.

meaning: プログラミングをする / コードを書く
example: 寫程式需要邏輯思考
english: Writing programs requires logical thinking

meaning: 納品する / 商品を引き渡す / デリバリーする
example: 我們必須在星期五之前交貨
english: We must deliver by Friday.

meaning: 掌握してコントロールする / 支配・管理する / 把握して制御する
example: 領導者需要能夠有效掌控團隊
english: Leaders need to be able to effectively manage their teams.

meaning: 結婚・縁談・恋愛に関するタブー / 縁起を担ぐ禁忌 / 避けるべき事柄
example: 年輕人越來越少在乎姻緣忌諱了，但長輩還是很重視
english: Young people care less about taboos regarding marriage, but elders still attach great importance to them.

meaning: 登録する / 申し込む / 記録する
example: 我們正在準備公司登記的文件
english: We are preparing company registration documents.

meaning: 一緒にくっつく / つながる / 一体となる
example: 他們從大學時期就連在一起了
english: They've been together since college.

meaning: 疑い / 疑問 / 不信 / 戸惑い
example: 我對這個解釋還是有點疑惑
english: I still have some doubts about this explanation.

meaning: 出会う / 偶然に出会う / めぐり逢う
example: 我們在旅行中相遇，從此開始了一段緣分
english: We met during our travels, and that's how our destiny began.

meaning: 貧しい / お金がない
example: 他小時候家裡很窮，但是他靠自己努力改變了命運
english: His family was very poor when he was a child, but he changed his destiny through his own efforts.

meaning: 価値 / 値打ち
example: 我們需要重新評估這棟房子的價值
english: We need to reassess the value of this house.

meaning: 続ける / 引き続き～する
example: 即使遇到困難，我也會繼續努力
english: Even if I encounter difficulties, I will continue to work hard.

meaning: 背景 / バックグラウンド / 背後 / 経歴 / 状況
example: 你要先了解事情的背景，才能做決定
english: You need to understand the background of the matter before you can make a decision.

meaning: 自慢する
example: 有錢人喜歡炫耀自己的財產
english: Rich people like to flaunt their wealth.

meaning: 集まり・カジュアルな会合
example: 我們明天晚上有個同學聚會，你要來嗎？
english: We're having a class reunion tomorrow night, do you want to come?

meaning: おじ（母方）
example: 小時候我常常跟舅舅一起去釣魚
english: When I was little, I often went fishing with my uncle.

meaning: おば（母方のおじの妻）
example: 我從小就很喜歡跟舅媽聊天，她很親切
english: I've always loved chatting with my aunt since I was little; she's very kind.

meaning: （女性が）嫁いでくる / 嫁いできた
example: 我弟弟的太太是從台中嫁來我們家的
english: My younger brother's wife came to our family from Taichung.

meaning: 母方の年上のいとこの姉
example: 我從小就很喜歡跟表姐一起玩
english: I've always loved playing with my older cousin since I was little.

meaning: 母方の年上のいとこの兄
example: 我常常向表哥請教英文
english: I often ask my cousin for help with English.

meaning:
（態度が）冷たい / そっけない / よそよそしい
（関係が）薄い / 親しくない
example: 他雖然看起來冷淡，其實內心很溫暖
english: Although he appears aloof, he is actually very warm-hearted.

meaning: 魂・スピリット
example: 音樂是我靈魂的一部分
english: Music is a part of my soul

meaning: 頻度
example: 他每天運動的頻率很高
english: He exercises very frequently every day.

meaning: 雇う / 雇用する
example: 我們打算僱用一位會說日語的助理
english: We plan to hire an assistant who can speak Japanese.

meaning: 合う / 合致する / 適合する
example: 這項產品不符合安全標準
english: This product does not meet safety standards.

meaning: 実際には〜ない / 全く〜ない
example: 他並沒有忘記你的生日
english: He didn't forget your birthday.

meaning: 過敏である（アレルギー等）
example: 我對海鮮過敏
english: I am allergic to seafood

meaning: 導く / 案内する / 指導する
example: 我們引導客戶進來台灣市場
english: We guide our clients into the Taiwan market.

meaning: （動）飽和する　（形）限界まで満たされる
example: 這個市場已經飽和了，很難再賺錢
english: This market is saturated; it's difficult to make money there anymore.

meaning: 新しいものを出す / 革新を図る / 創造する
example: 每次出新商品前，我們都會做市場調查
english: We conduct market research before launching any new product.

meaning: 注射をする / 注射を打つ
example: 醫生說我需要打一針抗生素
english: The doctor said I need an antibiotic injection.

meaning: お尻
example: 她的屁股很翹，大家都在看
english: Her butt was very perky, and everyone was looking at it.

meaning: 栄養補助食品 / サプリメント
example: 我每天早上都會吃營養品來補充維他命
english: I take nutritional supplements every morning to replenish vitamins.

meaning: レベル / 程度
example: 我覺得台灣人的英文程度很高
english: I think Taiwanese people have a very high level of English proficiency.

meaning: 売り込む / 販売促進する / 営業する
example: 推銷自己的能力在職場上很重要
english: The ability to market oneself is important in the workplace.

meaning: （動）批判する / 評論する　（名）批判 / 評論
example: 他不喜歡別人對他提出批評
english: He doesn't like being criticized.

meaning: 傷を受ける / 負傷する
example: 受傷的地方紅腫發痛，他決定去看醫生
english: The injured area was red, swollen, and painful, so he decided to see a doctor.

meaning: 心にしまう / 気にする
example: 我好像容易放在心裡
english: I seem to tend to keep things to myself.

meaning: もう少ししたら / しばらくしたら / あと少し経ったら
example: 你再過一陣子再打給我吧，我現在有點忙
english: Call me back later, I'm a bit busy right now.

meaning: （名）衝撃 / ショック　（動）衝撃を与える / 影響を及ぼす
example: 人工智慧正在衝擊傳統產業
english: Artificial intelligence is impacting traditional industries

meaning: 訂正する / 正す / 修正する
example: 老師糾正了我發音的錯誤
english: The teacher corrected my pronunciation mistakes.

meaning: 看板
example: 他們的招牌設計非常吸引人
english: Their signboard design is very attractive.

meaning: 職位 / ポジション / 役職
example: 他換了新的工作職位每天都學到很多新的東西
english: He changed jobs and learns a lot of new things every day.

meaning: 達成感 / 成功したという満足感
example: 雖然這份工作很有挑戰性,但我覺得很有成就感
english: Although this job is very challenging, I feel a great sense of accomplishment.

meaning: 覚えている / 思い出す / 忘れずにする
example: 記得把門鎖好再出門
english: Remember to lock the door before leaving.

meaning: 口実 / 言い訳
example: 他總是找藉口不來上課
english: He always makes excuses to skip class.

meaning: 逃げる / 回避する / 逃避する
example: 不要逃避你的責任
english: Don't shirk your responsibilities.

meaning: 重視する / 重要視する / 大切にする
example: 父母很重視孩子的教育
english: Parents attach great importance to their children's education

meaning: バーテンダー
example: 調酒師正在準備一杯特別的雞尾酒
english: The bartender is preparing a special cocktail.

meaning: 柔らかい / 柔軟な
example: 做瑜伽可以讓身體更柔軟
english: Doing yoga can make your body more flexible

meaning: 万が一に備えて / 念のため
example: 最近又有一些感冒傳染，我以防萬一戴口罩
english: There's been a recent resurgence of colds, so I'm wearing a mask just in case.

meaning: 好奇心がある / 興味を持つ
example: 小孩子對什麼都很好奇
english: Children are curious about everything.

meaning: 出資を共同で行う / 共同出資 / 共同出資そのもの
example: 我們打算一起合資開一家咖啡店
english: We plan to open a coffee shop together as a joint venture.

meaning: そうすると〜になってしまう / 結果として〜になる
example: 如果繼續這樣下去，就變成浪費時間了
english: If this continues, it will become a waste of time.

meaning: 戦略 / 方策
example: 公司未來的戰略是擴展海外市場
english: The company's future strategy is to expand into overseas markets.

meaning:
（動）パートナーシップを組む / 共同経営する
（名）パートナーシップ / 共同事業
example: 合夥人之間需要高度的信任
english: A high degree of trust is required between partners.

meaning: 話し好きである / 会話が得意な / 話題が豊富な
example: 他是一個很健談的人，跟他聊天很輕鬆
english: He is a very talkative person, and it's very easy to chat with him.

meaning: 出て行く / 外へ行く / 外出する
example: 雖然我沒有員工，但我還是有把工作外包出去
english: Although I don't have employees, I still outsource some work.

meaning: 業務や作業を外注する / 委託する
example: 政府要發包新的建設案
english: The government is going to award contracts for new construction projects.

meaning: 外部委託する / アウトソーシングする
example: 我們把社群管理外包給行銷公司了
english: We outsourced community management to a marketing company.

meaning: 言うことを聞かない / わがまま / いたずら
example: 我小時候也常常被說不乖
english: I was often told I was naughty when I was a child.

meaning: 自分自身 / 当人 / （それ）自体
example: 我自己本身會設計簡單的網站
english: I can design simple websites myself.

meaning: たぶん〜なんだと思う
example: 他沒有說錯，可是可能就是語氣聽起來不太禮貌
english: He wasn't wrong, but perhaps his tone sounded impolite.

meaning: どのくらいの時間で届きますか？
example: 我想知道這本書多久會送來
english: I'd like to know how long it will take for this book to arrive.

meaning: （物流などで）中継・配送センターでの「転送」
example: 從轉運中心出發後，大約兩天會送達
english: It will take approximately two days to arrive after departing from the transit center.

meaning: 倉庫
example: 倉庫有庫存，可以從倉庫調貨
english: The warehouse has inventory; goods can be transferred from the warehouse.

meaning: 物干しスタンド / 洗濯物干し台
example: 這個曬衣架可以折疊，很方便
english: This clothes rack is foldable, which is very convenient.

meaning: プラスチック
example: 便利商店現在不提供免費塑膠袋了
english: Convenience stores no longer provide free plastic bags.

meaning: 規則に違反する / ルール違反
example: 他因為違規停車，被開罰單了
english: He received a parking ticket for illegal parking.

meaning: 掴む / 捕まえる / 取り締まる
example: 那邊明明有人違規停車，警察卻不抓
english: There are clearly people illegally parked over there, but the police aren't arresting them.

meaning: 珍しい / まれな / 希少な
example: 這是一種稀有的動物
english: This is a rare animal

meaning:
①〜とみなす / 〜に相当する
②一応〜と言える / まあ〜かな（少し控えめな表現）
example: 平板算不算是電腦？
english: Is a tablet considered a computer?

meaning: 宣言する / 宣告する / 公式に発表する
example: 總統宣告進入緊急狀態
english: The president declared a state of emergency.

meaning: 上級の / 高レベルな / 上層の
example: 這款是高階手機，功能非常齊全
english: This is a high-end phone with a full range of features.

meaning: 初級の / 低レベルの / 下位の
example: 低階產品通常價格比較便宜
english: Lower-end products are usually cheaper.

meaning: 飢え / 飢餓
example: 許多國家仍然面臨飢餓問題
english: Many countries still face hunger problems.

meaning: 話題に出す / （ある事を）取り上げて話す
example: 有些家庭問題很難拿出來說
english: Some family problems are difficult to talk about.

meaning: かえって / 反対に / むしろ
example: 我以為這個工作很簡單，做了之後反而發現比想像中更困難
english: I thought this job would be easy, but after doing it, I found it to be more difficult than I had imagined.

meaning: 口コミで広まる / 口伝えに伝わる
example: 我們沒有請廣告公司，都是靠自己宣傳，靠口耳相傳
english: We didn't hire an advertising agency; we relied entirely on our own promotion and word-of-mouth.

meaning: 口コミ
example: 這家餐廳口碑很好
english: This restaurant has a very good reputation.

meaning: 効果と利益 / コストに対する成果
example: 這個廣告帶來了很高的效益
english: This advertisement brought in high profits.

meaning: 匿名 / 名前を伏せること
example: 這份問卷是匿名的，請放心填寫
english: This questionnaire is anonymous, please fill it out with confidence.

pinyin: shuō de hǎo tīng yì diǎn
meaning: 言い方をやわらげる / 良く言えば
example: 說得好聽一點，他是個有主見的人；說難聽一點，就是固執
english: To put it nicely, he's a person with his own opinions; to put it bluntly, he's stubborn.

meaning: 人混みの中に入っていく / 人々の集まりに近づく
example: 他鼓起勇氣走到人群中，開始跟大家聊天
english: He mustered his courage, walked into the crowd, and started chatting with everyone.

meaning: 他人に迷惑をかける / 他人の手を煩わせる
example: 我不想造成別人的麻煩，所以自己處理就好
english: I don't want to cause trouble for others, so I'll handle it myself.

meaning: 慎重に選ぶ / よく考えて選ぶ
example: 在購買保險時，要慎選保險公司與方案
english: When purchasing insurance, it is important to carefully select the insurance company and the insurance plan.

meaning: 節約する
example: 這個新技術可以幫助節省人力
english: This new technology can help save manpower.

meaning: 比較的に分かりやすい / より理解しやすい
example: 你講話的方式讓我覺得比較好理解
english: The way you speak makes it easier for me to understand.

meaning: 契約を結ぶ / 契約書にサインする
example: 我們公司昨天跟一家新客戶簽約了
english: Our company signed a contract with a new client yesterday.

meaning: 買収する（企業などを） / 買い取る
example: 收購談判進行得非常順利
english: The acquisition negotiations are going very smoothly.

meaning: 歩合を取る / コミッションを取る / 手数料として一部を差し引く
example: 平台會從每筆交易中抽成10%
english: The platform will take a 10% cut from each transaction.

meaning: 掲載料 / 出品料
example: 我們不收上架費，但會抽成
english: We don't charge a listing fee, but we will take a cut.

meaning: ～に対する私の印象は……
example: 我對台灣的第一印象是很熱情
english: My first impression of Taiwan was that it was very welcoming.

meaning: 演説する / 講演する
example: 他應母校之邀回校演講
english: He returned to his alma mater to give a speech at the invitation of the school.

meaning: ビストロ / ダイニングバー / レストランバー
example: 我們今晚打算去一家新開的餐酒館吃飯
english: We're planning to go to a newly opened restaurant/bar tonight.

meaning: レトロ
example: 這家咖啡廳的裝潢非常復古
english: This cafe has a very retro decor.

meaning: 体験する
example: 想知道當地文化的話，可以去體驗看看廟會活動
english: If you want to experience the local culture, you can go and experience the temple fair activities.

meaning: 中継する / 放送する（特に生中継）
example: 因為技術問題，轉播中斷了幾分鐘
english: The broadcast was interrupted for a few minutes due to technical issues.

meaning: 本場の / 本格的な / 正統な
example: 這間印度餐廳的咖哩吃起來很道地
english: The curry at this Indian restaurant tastes very authentic.

meaning: 人気がある / 好かれている / 歓迎される
example: 這家餐廳的牛肉麵非常受歡迎，常常要排隊
english: This restaurant's beef noodles are very popular, and there's often a queue.

meaning: ピーク / 最も高い時期・時間帯
example: 捷運在尖峰時間非常擁擠
english: The MRT is very crowded during peak hours.

meaning: 接待する / もてなす
example: 我們公司明天要接待日本的客戶
english: Our company is hosting Japanese clients tomorrow.

meaning:
（名）根拠 / 証拠 / 基準
（動）〜に基づく / 〜を根拠にする（「根據⋯⋯」の形で）
example: 老師根據學生的程度安排課程
english: Teachers arrange courses according to students' levels.

meaning: 割合 / パーセンテージ
example: 你覺得他考上的成數有多少？
english: What do you think his chances of passing the exam are?

meaning: とても真面目に / 一生懸命に
example: 我以前沒有很認真學中文
english: I didn't study Chinese very seriously before.

meaning: 混ざる / 混じる / 交じり合う
example: 他說話時夾雜了一些方言，聽不太懂
english: He spoke with some dialect mixed in, making it difficult to understand.

meaning: 覚える / 記憶する / 心に留める
example: 考試快到了，你就只能記住公式
english: The exam is coming soon, and all you can do is memorize the formulas.

meaning: 見ればすぐに分かる / 一目で分かる
example: 你沒睡好吧？一看就知道啊，眼睛都腫了
english: You didn't sleep well, did you? I can tell at a glance, your eyes are all swollen.

meaning: 推測して導き出す / 推理してわかる
example: 根據他的語氣，我可以推測出來他在生氣
english: Based on his tone, I can tell he's angry.

meaning: 相手 / 向こう側の人・団体
example: 台灣人希望對方多喝一點
english: Taiwanese people hope the other person drinks more.

meaning: 酒を勧める / 飲酒を勧める
example: 在台灣，有些場合會有勸酒的習慣
english: In Taiwan, there is a custom of urging others to drink in certain situations.

meaning: 海に沿った地域 / 沿岸部
example: 台灣的沿海地區經常受到颱風的影響
english: Taiwan's coastal areas are frequently affected by typhoons.

meaning: 重視する / 重んじる / 大切にする
example: 有些年輕人不會那麼注重健康，常常熬夜吃垃圾食物
english: Some young people don't pay much attention to their health and often stay up late eating junk food.

meaning: お小遣い / こづかい
example: 我爸爸給我的零用錢很少
english: My dad gives me very little pocket money.

meaning: 顔が赤くなる（照れ / 緊張 / 酔いなど）
example: 我喝一點酒就很容易臉紅
english: I blush easily after drinking even a little alcohol.

meaning: とても懐かしい / とても恋しい
example: 好懷念那年夏天我們一起去海邊的旅行
english: I miss our trip to the beach that summer.

pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng máfán nǐ bāng wǒ
meaning: ちょっとお願いがあるんだけど / ～してもらえますか？
example: 我想麻煩你幫我看一下這份報告，好嗎？
english: Could you please take a look at this report for me?

meaning: 取材する / インタビューする
example: 明天電視會來採訪我們的活動，請大家準備一下
english: Our event will be covered by television tomorrow, so please prepare accordingly.

meaning: 同じ / 等しい / 共通の
example: 成功沒有相同的模式，每個人都不一樣
english: There is no single formula for success; everyone's success is different.

meaning: 風評 / 噂・うわさ / 世間の評判
example: 我們需要時間來改善這個品牌的風評
english: We need time to improve the brand's reputation.

meaning: 冷凍する / 冷凍された / 無視する（比喩的に）
example: 他因為爭議行為而被公司冷凍，不再被提拔
english: He was sidelined by the company due to controversial behavior and was no longer eligible for promotion.

meaning: 発揮する / （能力・役割などを）十分に発動させる
example: 我覺得在這家公司，沒辦法發揮自己的能力
english: I feel like I can't fully utilize my abilities at this company.

meaning: 邪魔をする / 迷惑をかける
example: 你這樣一直傳訊息真的打擾我
english: Your constant messaging is really bothering me.

meaning: 稲妻 / 雷光 / 雷（光）
example: 她害怕閃電，每次都會躲起來
english: She was afraid of lightning and would hide every time.

meaning: 雷が鳴る / 雷がとどろく
example: 昨天晚上打雷打得很大聲，我都睡不著
english: There was so much thunder last night that I couldn't sleep.

meaning: 中旬
example: 我打算在八月中旬去馬來西亞出差
english: I plan to go to Malaysia on a business trip in mid-August.

meaning: 付き合いやすい / 話しやすい / 気さくな
example: 我們部門有幾個不好相處的人，溝通很困難
english: There are a few difficult people in our department; communication is very challenging.

meaning: ある一つの状況としては〜 / あるパターンとしては〜
example: 有一種情況是，對方其實沒惡意，只是不知道怎麼表達
english: In some cases, the other party may not actually have malicious intent, but simply doesn't know how to express it.

meaning: 空気を読む / 場の雰囲気を理解する
example: 你真的不會讀空氣欸，現在不是開玩笑的時候
english: You really can't read the room? This isn't the time for jokes.

meaning: 言うかもしれない（こと） / 言いそうな（こと）
example: 這是面試官可能會說的問題，你要準備好
english: These are questions the interviewer might ask, so be prepared.

meaning: 起きられない / 起き上がれない
example: 冬天的時候每天早上都起不來，很痛苦
english: I have trouble getting up every morning in winter, it's so painful.

meaning: 耐えられない / 我慢できない / 堪えられない
example: 我受不了日本冬天的寒冷
english: I can't stand the cold winters in Japan.

meaning: 耐えられない / 我慢できない
example: 我不能忍受有人在公共場所抽煙
english: I cannot tolerate people smoking in public places.

meaning: 深い / （心に）深く刻み込まれている / （事態が）深刻である
example: 我印象很深刻的冬天事情，是和家人一起過聖誕節
english: One of the most memorable winter memories for me is spending Christmas with my family.

meaning: 混雑している / 込み合っている / ぎゅうぎゅう詰めの
example: 擁擠的環境讓人感到壓力很大
english: Crowded environments can be very stressful.

meaning: 題材 / 素材
example: 618投廣素材可以幫我加一點東西嗎？
english: Can you add something to my 618 advertising materials?

meaning: 外注業者 / アウトソーシング会社
example: 如果外包商出現問題，我們也要承擔責任
english: If the outsourcing provider has problems, we will also bear responsibility.

meaning: 維持する / 保つ / キープする
example: 為了維持品質，公司定期進行品質檢查
english: To maintain quality, the company conducts regular quality inspections.

meaning: （原状を）保つ / 維持する
example: 保持健康的生活方式對每個人都很重要
english: Maintaining a healthy lifestyle is important for everyone.

meaning: いつでも / 随時
example: 你有問題可以隨時問我
english: Feel free to ask me any questions.

meaning: よく / しばしば / 頻繁に
example: 他常常遲到
english: He was often late

meaning: プロジェクト / 特定案件 / 特別企画
example: 我們需要開一個會議來確認專案進度是否落後
english: We need to hold a meeting to confirm whether the project is behind schedule.

meaning: 私に相談する / 私と話し合う
example: 這個提案你可以先自己想一想，然後再找我討論
english: You can think about this proposal yourself first, and then discuss it with me.

meaning:
（動）発展する / 展開する / 発達する
（名）成長・進展
example: 主管對關於他的未來發展提出了一些建議
english: His supervisor offered some suggestions regarding his future development.

meaning: 意見 / 考え / 見解
example: 如果他需要，我會給他意見
english: I will give him my opinion if he needs it.

meaning: 具体的な / はっきりとした / 明確な
example: 他提供了一些具體的解決方法
english: He provided some specific solutions.

meaning: 抽象的な
example: 請不要用太抽象的詞語，簡單一點說
english: Please don't use overly abstract terms; put it simply.

meaning: できないわけではない / ダメというわけではない
example: 這樣做不是不行，但可能會有風險
english: It's not that it's impossible, but it might be risky.

meaning: 価値
example: 你應該知道自己的價值
english: You should know your own worth

meaning: 向上させる / 引き上げる / 向上する
example: 這次培訓有助於提升員工的專業能力
english: This training will help improve employees' professional skills.

meaning: 作り出す / 行動に移す / 表す
example: 你要做出我給的錢的兩倍以上的價值
english: You need to produce more than twice the value I'm paying you.

meaning: 省略する / 削除する
example: 因為時間不夠，所以想省略一部分來準備發表
english: Because of time constraints, I'd like to omit a portion of the content in preparation for publication.

meaning: ずっとずっと / ひたすら / 何度も何度も
example: 他一直一直努力，終於成功了
english: He kept working hard and finally succeeded.

meaning: 交渉する / 話し合って解決を図る
example: 雙方經過多次交涉後，終於簽訂了合約
english: After several rounds of negotiations, the two parties finally signed a contract.

meaning: 損をする / 不利になる / だまされる / 割に合わない思いをする
example: 他經常太相信人，總是吃虧
english: He often trusts people too much and always suffers losses.

meaning: 時間を割く / 忙しい中で時間を作る
example: 感謝您今天撥空與我們開會
english: Thank you for taking the time to join us for this meeting today.

meaning: 集団・層・ターゲットグループ
example: 我們的產品主要針對年輕族群
english: Our products are primarily targeted at young people.

meaning: 才能 / センス / ひらめき
example: 這位歌手太有才華了，甚至能自己寫詞 / 作曲和編曲
english: This singer is incredibly talented; they can even write lyrics, compose music, and arrange their own compositions.

meaning:
（動）権限を与える / 委任する
（名）権限 / 許可
example: 沒有授權的使用會被視為侵權
english: Unauthorized use will be considered an infringement.

meaning: 敏感である / デリケートである
example: 我們的產品經過皮膚測試，敏感肌人也可以使用
english: Our products have undergone dermatological testing and are suitable for people with sensitive skin.

meaning:
（動）困らせる / 当惑させる
（名）悩み・困りごと
example: 季節轉換給你帶來什麼困擾？
english: What problems do you encounter during seasonal transitions?

meaning: 少し / ちょっとだけ / わずかに
example: 我想學稍微難一點的文法
english: I want to learn a slightly more difficult grammar.

meaning: 主に推す / 主力とする / メインで売り出す
example: 公司這次主打年輕族群，希望擴大市場佔有率
english: The company is targeting younger consumers this time in hopes of expanding its market share.

meaning: 築く / 構築する / 作り上げる / 創り出す
example: 他用社群媒體成功打造自己的個人品牌
english: He successfully built his personal brand using social media.

meaning: 特色 / 特長 / 個性 / 独自性
example: 台南的夜市有很多當地特色的美食
english: Tainan's night markets offer a wide variety of local delicacies.

meaning:
（製品・サービスなどの）主力として推す / 重点的に売り出す
（芸能人・歌などの）メインとして打ち出す / 主役として宣伝する
example: 我們主打這款手機的夜間拍照功能，比其他品牌更
english: Our main selling point is this phone's night photography capabilities, which are superior to other brands.

meaning: 社会に出る / 社会人になる
example: 出社會的第一年真的不容易，要學會適應各種挑戰
english: The first year after entering the workforce is really tough; you have to learn to adapt to all sorts of challenges.

meaning: （形）混乱している / 秩序がない / めちゃくちゃな状態
example: 因為資訊太多，我感到很混亂
english: I feel overwhelmed by the sheer volume of information.

meaning: 専門家 / エキスパート
example: 他是一位電腦科技的專家
english: He is a computer technology expert

meaning: いいねする
example: 如果想提高點贊數，標題和封面設計要更吸引人
english: To increase likes, the title and cover design need to be more attractive.

meaning: ソーシャルメディア / SNS
example: 我每天花很多時間在各種社交軟體上滑手機
english: I spend a lot of time scrolling through various social media apps every day.

meaning: ちょっと食べてみる / 試しに食べてみる
example: 朋友推薦這家拉麵店，我打算下次去吃看看
english: A friend recommended this ramen shop, and I plan to try it next time.

meaning: 実際には / 実のところ / 実は
example: 很多人以為他很冷淡，實際上他只是比較害羞而已
english: Many people think he's aloof, but he's actually just shy.

meaning: ショート動画 / 短編映像
example: 很多年輕人透過拍短視片來分享自己的興趣或生活
english: Many young people share their interests or lives by making short videos.

meaning: すぐに / 即座に / ただちに
example: 她在IG上傳了一支關於旅行的短視片，立刻獲得上千個讚
english: She uploaded a short travel video to Instagram and immediately received thousands of likes.

meaning: 言い換えれば / つまり / 別の言い方をすれば
example: 我們沒有足夠的資金，換句話說，這個計畫可能無法進行
english: We don't have enough funds; in other words, this plan may not be able to proceed.

meaning: ちょっと考えさせて
example:
A：週末我們想開車去台中玩，你要不要一起來？
B：哇，聽起來不錯，我想一下，看看家人那邊有沒有安排。
english:
A: We're thinking of driving to Taichung this weekend, do you want to come along?

B: Wow, that sounds great! Let me think about it and see if my family has any plans.

meaning: 探索する / 探し求める
example: 我們計劃到花蓮旅行，探索太魯閣的美景
english: We plan to travel to Hualien to explore the beautiful scenery of Taroko Gorge.

meaning: あくびをする
example: 他在會議中不停地打呵欠，看起來完全沒睡飽
english: He kept yawning during the meeting, looking like he hadn't slept at all.

meaning: キャリア
example: 我的職涯目標是成為一名專業的行銷經理
english: My career goal is to become a professional marketing manager.

meaning: 単純である / シンプルである / 素直である
example: 他是一個想法很單純的人，從不會懷疑別人的話
english: He is a very simple-minded person who never doubts what others say.

meaning: 状況に応じて柔軟に対応する / 臨機応変に対処する
example: 他在會議上臨機應變，解決了客戶的疑問
english: He demonstrated quick thinking and resourcefulness during the meeting, resolving the client's questions.

meaning: 命がけで / 必死に / がむしゃらに
example: 考試前一天晚上，我拼命看書看到凌晨兩點才睡
english: The night before the exam, I studied frantically until 2 a.m. before finally going to sleep.

meaning: 知らない人に話しかける（特に異性に） / ナンパする
example: 他在捷運上看到漂亮的女生，就鼓起勇氣去搭訕她
english: He saw a pretty girl on the subway and mustered up the courage to strike up a conversation with her.

meaning:
（動）親しくなる / 近づく / 心の距離を縮める
（形）親しみやすい / 距離感がない / 気さくな
example: 她說話的方式很溫柔，讓人覺得特別親近
english: She speaks in a gentle way, making people feel very close to her.

meaning: スキル / テクニック / 技術的なコツ
example: 學會發音的技巧之後，我的中文口說變得更自然流利了
english: After learning pronunciation techniques, my spoken Chinese became more natural and fluent.

meaning: 意図 / 狙い / 考え / 目的
example: 我覺得這次行銷活動的意圖不太清楚，需要再討論一下
english: I feel the intent of this marketing campaign is unclear and needs further discussion.

meaning: 食べきれない / 食べ終わらない
example: 你點太多了，我們一定吃不完
english: You ordered too much, we definitely can't finish it.

meaning: カロリー
example: 你知道一碗白飯大概有多少熱量嗎？
english: Do you know how many calories are in a bowl of white rice?

meaning: たとえ〜でも / 〜だとしても
example: 就算是便宜，我也不會買品質不好的東西
english: Even if it's cheap, I won't buy something of poor quality.

meaning: さらに悪い / もっとひどい / より劣る
example: 如果現在不處理，情況應該會更差吧
english: If we don't address this now, the situation will probably get worse.

meaning: 完璧である / 非の打ちどころがない / 理想的である
example: 這次的提案內容非常完整，加上簡報設計精美，整體感覺幾乎是完美的
english: The proposal was very comprehensive, and the presentation was beautifully designed; the overall impression was almost perfect.

meaning: わざわざ来る / 特別に来る
example: 雖然他很忙，還是特地來參加婚禮
english: Although he was very busy, he still made a special trip to attend the wedding.

meaning: 血圧
example: 吃太鹹的東西，對血壓不好喔
english: Eating too much salt is bad for your blood pressure.

meaning: 結論
example: 我們討論了一個小時，最後總算有了結論
english: We discussed it for an hour and finally reached a conclusion.

meaning: 説得力
example: 如果沒有實際的例子，就很難有說服力
english: Without concrete examples, it's difficult to be persuasive.

meaning:
（動）計画する / プランを立てる
（名）計画 / 構想 / プラン / 設計
example: 這次的行銷規劃非常完整，客戶反應也很好
english: The marketing plan was very comprehensive, and the customer feedback was excellent.

meaning: 詰まる / 引っかかる / 立ち往生する / （思考・作業が）止まってしまう
example: 我報告到一半卡住了，不知道要說什麼
english: I got stuck halfway through my report and didn't know what to say.

meaning: 出会う（偶然） / 遭遇する・ぶつかる（困難・問題など）
example: 如果碰到問題，要先冷靜處理
english: If you encounter a problem, try to handle it calmly first.

meaning: 買えない（＝欲しい物があるけど / 手に入らない）
example: 我排了一個小時的隊，結果還是買不到SWITCH 2
english: I queued for an hour, but I still couldn't buy a Switch 2.

meaning: 買えない（＝欲しい物があるけど / お金が足りなくて買えない）
example: 我很喜歡那雙設計師品牌的鞋子，但實在太貴了，我買不起
english: I really like those designer shoes, but they're too expensive for me.

meaning: 試しに使ってみる / 試しにやってみる
example: 你可以試著用這個APP學習中文
english: You can try using this app to learn Chinese.

meaning: ～を中心とする / ～を主とする / ～を重視する
example: 課程安排以聽說訓練為主，讓學生可以更自然地使用中文
english: The course is designed with a focus on listening and speaking training, enabling students to use Chinese more naturally.

meaning: 巻き舌
example: 你如果學拼音的話，老師都會教你要捲舌
english: If you learn pinyin, your teacher will teach you to roll your tongue.

meaning: 勝つ / 勝利する / 優勢になる
example: 贏比賽當然很重要，但更重要的是享受整個過程
english: Winning the game is important, of course, but enjoying the whole process is even more important.

meaning: 負ける
example: 輸一次沒關係，重要的是從失敗中學到教訓
english: Losing once is okay; the important thing is to learn from your mistakes.

meaning: 中に入れる
example: 我已經把糖放進去了，你不用再加了
english: I've already added the sugar, you don't need to add any more.

meaning:
① 条件・仮定：さもなければ / そうしないと　▶　不然會遲到（さもなければ遅刻する）
② 提案・代案：じゃなければ / それなら　▶　不然我們去喝咖啡？（じゃあコーヒーでも飲みに行く？）
③ 否定の強調：そうでなければ…のはずがない　▶　他這麼努力，不然怎麼可能失敗？（彼がこれだけ努力しているなら、失敗なんてありえない）
example: 你快一點起床，不然會遲到
english: Get up quickly, or you'll be late.

meaning: 外見 / 見た目 / 外観
example: 產品的外觀設計會影響顧客的購買意願
english: Product design can influence customers' willingness to buy.

meaning: 詰まる / 引っかかる / 固まる / 動かなくなる
example: 電腦突然卡住了，只能重開機才恢復正常
english: My computer suddenly froze and I had to restart it to get it working again.

meaning: 改めて / もう一度 / 再び
example: 系統更新後，你必須重新登入帳號
english: After the system update, you must log in to your account again.

meaning:
①もれる
②抜ける / 記載されない
③見落とす / 記録し忘れる
example: 這次報帳的資料我漏交了一張收據，得再補交一次。
english: I forgot to submit one receipt for this expense report, so I need to submit it again.

meaning: 孫
example: 我爸爸媽媽每年來台灣一次，是為了看自己的孫子
english: My parents come to Taiwan once a year to see their grandson.

meaning: すべり台
example: 小朋友在公園裡開心地溜滑梯
english: Children happily play on the slide in the park.

meaning: レモン
example: 夏天喝一杯加檸檬片的冰開水，真的超級消暑又解渴
english: Drinking a glass of iced water with lemon slices in the summer is incredibly refreshing and thirst-quenching.

meaning: 運転免許証
example: 雖然我有駕照，但因為住在市區，很少有機會開車
english: Although I have a driver's license, I rarely have the opportunity to drive because I live in the city.

meaning: 罰金の通知書 / 違反切符 / 反則金の紙
example: 自從買了機車以後，他已經被開了不少罰單
english: He's received quite a few tickets since buying the motorcycle.

meaning: 違法駐車
example: 政府最近加強取締亂停車，特別是在學校和醫院附近
english: The government has recently intensified its crackdown on illegal parking, especially near schools and hospitals.

meaning: レッカー移動する
example: 我剛剛出去買個飲料，回來才發現車子被拖掉了
english: I just went out to buy a drink, and when I came back I found my car had been towed away.

meaning: 高速道路などの通行料金 / 有料道路の料金
example: 現在台灣的高速公路過路費是使用電子收費系統，不用停車繳費
english: Taiwan's highway tolls are now collected using an electronic toll collection system, eliminating the need to stop to pay.

meaning: 警察局
example: 我陪朋友去警察局報案，處理遺失手機的事情，警察態度還不錯
english: I accompanied a friend to the police station to report a lost phone; the police officers were quite nice.

meaning: 飲酒運転する
example: 台灣對酒駕的處罰越來越嚴重
english: Taiwan is imposing increasingly severe penalties on drunk driving.

meaning: 待ち伏せする / 潜伏する / 身を隠して機会をうかがう
example: 警方早就埋伏在嫌犯常出現的那家便利商店外
english: Police had been lying in wait outside the convenience store where the suspect frequented.

meaning: 容疑者
example: 警方在現場逮捕了一名嫌犯
english: Police arrested a suspect at the scene.

meaning: 実行する / 執行する
example: 我們的計畫雖然已經確定，但執行過程中仍需靈活調整
english: Although our plan has been finalized, it still requires flexible adjustments during implementation.

meaning: 規則・規定に違反する / ルール違反をする
example: 開車時講電話是一種很危險的違規行為
english: Talking on the phone while driving is a very dangerous violation.

meaning:
①～になる（職業・身分など）【動詞】
②～のときに【前置詞】
③～として（役割）【前置詞】
④～に値する（価値・金額）【動詞】
⑤～を…とみなす【動詞】
example: 他一直想當醫生，為此努力了十年時間
english: He had always wanted to be a doctor and had worked towards that goal for ten years.

meaning: むしろ～したい / ～のほうがマシだ / ～するくらいなら / むしろ〜する
example: 寧願養寵物也不想生小孩的人變多了
english: More people are choosing to keep pets rather than have children.

meaning: ゆっくりしている / 遅い / 進行が緩やかで速くない
example: 雖然進度緩慢，但我們一步一步朝著目標前進
english: Although progress is slow, we are moving towards our goal step by step.

meaning: 入る / 進入する / ～に突入する
example: 請先出示證件才能進入這棟大樓的辦公區
english: Please show your identification before entering the office area of ​​this building.

meaning: エッグタルト
example: 他說自己做的蛋撻比外面賣的還好吃，結果一吃真的驚艷
english: He said his egg tarts were even better than the ones sold outside, and after trying them, I was truly amazed.

meaning: 交流する / コミュニケーションを取る / 意見を交わす / 接する
example: 學生透過與外國朋友的線上交流，提升了英語表達能力
english: Students improved their English speaking skills through online interactions with foreign friends.

meaning: 浅い / 薄い / 表面的な / 浅はかな
example: 我對歷史的了解還很淺，很多事件的背景都不清楚
english: My understanding of history is still very limited, and I am unclear about the background of many events.

meaning: ベテランの / 熟練の / キャリアが深い
example: 我們部門的資深員工對系統最熟悉，大家有問題都會請教他
english: Our department's senior staff member is the most familiar with the system, and everyone asks him for help when they have questions.

meaning: 注意する / リマインドする / 警告する / 忠告する
example: 媽媽常提醒我吃飯不要滑手機，要專心吃東西
english: My mom often reminds me not to use my phone while eating, and to focus on eating.

meaning: 削除する / 消す / 取り除く
example: 為了保護隱私，我會定期刪除手機上的聊天紀錄和圖片
english: To protect my privacy, I regularly delete chat history and pictures from my phone.

meaning: ワーカホリック
example: 她結婚後變得不像以前那麼工作狂，開始重視家庭時間
english: After getting married, she became less of a workaholic and started to value family time.

meaning: 在宅勤務 / テレワーク
example: 居家辦公讓我有更多的時間陪伴家人
english: Working from home gives me more time to spend with my family.

meaning: ～でない限り / ～でなければ
example: 除非是很嚴重的錯誤，老闆通常不會當面發脾氣
english: Unless it's a very serious mistake, bosses usually won't lose their temper in front of their bosses.

meaning: 法を執行する / 法を施行する / 取り締まる
example: 雖然有明確規定，但地方政府執法不嚴格，問題一直存在
english: Although there are clear regulations, local governments have not strictly enforced them, and the problem persists.

meaning: 一周周る
example: 我們在公園裡繞一圈，散散步 / 聊聊天，也是不錯的休閒方式
english: Taking a stroll or chatting in the park is a great way to relax.

meaning: 刑務所 / 牢獄 / 監獄
example: 他因為貪污被判十年徒刑，現在正在監獄裡服刑
english: He was sentenced to ten years in prison for embezzlement and is currently serving his sentence.

meaning: 翌日 / 次の日
example: 喝酒後的隔天容易水腫
english: Swelling is likely to occur the day after drinking alcohol.

meaning: 運次第・運に任せる・運による
example: 我報名的那個國外實習競爭超激烈，能不能上就看運氣啦
english: The overseas internship I applied for is extremely competitive; whether I get it or not depends on luck.

meaning: 思ったより〜 / 想像していたより〜
example: 台北的冬天比想像中的溫暖，不太需要穿厚外套
english: Taipei winters are warmer than I expected; you don't really need a thick coat.

meaning: 印象に残ったのは～です
example: 你去東京的時候，讓你印象很深刻的是什麼？
english: What impressed you most when you went to Tokyo?

meaning: 現地の人 / 地元の人
example: 如果你想吃好吃的東西，就問當地人推薦的餐廳
english: If you want to eat something delicious, ask the locals for restaurant recommendations.

meaning: 想像できない / 思い浮かばない
example: 我無法想像如果沒有網路生活會變成什麼樣子，太依賴了
english: I can't imagine what life would be like without the internet; I'm too dependent on it.

meaning: カルフール
example: 我以前是去那個家樂福剪頭髮的地方，因為那邊很便宜
english: I used to get my hair cut at the Carrefour hair salon because it was very cheap there.

meaning: 大型スーパー / 大型量販店（例：コストコ / カルフールなど）
example: 大賣場裡什麼都有，從新鮮水果到大型家電都可以買得到
english: Supermarkets have everything, from fresh fruit to large home appliances.

meaning: 値上げ
example: 夏季是旅遊旺季，很多飯店的房價都會漲價
english: Summer is peak tourist season, and many hotels will raise their room rates.

meaning: 美容室 / ヘアサロン
example: 我去一家新開的髮廊，設計師技術還不錯
english: I went to a newly opened hair salon, and the stylist's skills were pretty good.

meaning: 気にしない / どうでもいい
example: 以前我很在意別人的看法，現在就無所謂了
english: I used to care a lot about what others thought, but now I don't care anymore.

meaning: 滞在する / とどまる
example: 8月，我在台灣只待了九天
english: I only stayed in Taiwan for nine days in August.

meaning: あなたにとって
example: 對你來說，這份工作雖然辛苦，但也可能是一個很好的學習機會
english: This job may be tough for you, but it could also be a great learning opportunity.
