meaning: 泣き虫である / すぐ泣く / 涙もろい
example: 弟弟真是個愛哭鬼，只要媽媽不在就一直掉眼淚
english: My little brother is such a crybaby; he cries all the time whenever Mom isn't around.

meaning: 寂しい / 孤独な
example: 有時候，即使身邊有很多人，我還是會感到寂寞
english: Sometimes, even when I'm surrounded by many people, I still feel lonely.

meaning: メッセージを送る
example: 如果你有任何問題，可以直接傳訊息給我，我會盡快回覆
english: If you have any questions, feel free to message me and I will reply as soon as possible.

meaning:
（動）慰める / 安心させる
（名）慰め / 癒し
example: 收到你關心的訊息，真的讓我覺得很被安慰。
english: Receiving your caring message really comforted me.

meaning: うっとうしいと思う / 面倒くさいと思う / 煩わしく感じる
example: 他這樣一直問真的很嫌煩耶！
english: It's really annoying that he keeps asking like that!

meaning: アップグレードする / レベルアップする / 昇進する
example: 手機提示我可以升級作業系統，但我怕會變慢，所以還沒按下去
english: My phone is prompting me to upgrade the operating system, but I'm worried it will slow down, so I haven't pressed the button yet.

meaning: 関係 / ながり / 関連 / 果関係 / 人間関係
example: 他跟前女友的關係已經結束了，但還是偶爾會聯絡
english: His relationship with his ex-girlfriend is over, but they still keep in touch occasionally.

meaning: アミノ酸
example: 健身的人常會補充胺基酸，因為它有助於肌肉修復與生長
english: People who work out often supplement with amino acids because they help with muscle repair and growth.

meaning: プラセンタ
example: 許多保養品強調含有胎盤素
english: Many skincare products emphasize that they contain placenta extract.

meaning: 競争する / 争う
example: 兩家公司為了搶客戶，競爭得很激烈
english: The two companies are fiercely competing for customers.

meaning: 開拓する / 開発する
example: 我們計畫明年開始開發馬來西亞的電商市場
english: We plan to begin developing the Malaysian e-commerce market next year.

meaning: 導入する / 取り入れる / 引き入れる
example: 引進新的品牌雖然有潛力，但也面臨在地化與宣傳的挑戰
english: Introducing new brands has potential, but it also faces challenges in localization and promotion.

meaning: ～に入る / ～へ進む / ～に到達する
example: 你要怎麼選要讓什麼品牌進到臺灣？
english: How do you choose which brands to bring to Taiwan?

meaning: 苦戦する / 苦しい戦いをする
example: 我們的產品在馬來西亞市場初期苦戰
english: Our products struggled in the early stages of the Malaysian market.

meaning: エネルギー / 活気 / 元気 / 生命力
example: 馬來西亞的城市非常熱鬧，很有活力
english: Malaysian cities are very lively and vibrant.

meaning: ビジネスチャンス / 商機
example: 網路時代帶來了不少商業的機會
english: The internet age has brought numerous business opportunities.

meaning: 含む / 含める / 口に含む
example: 穆斯林用的保養品不可以含動物的成分
english: Muslim skincare products cannot contain animal ingredients.

meaning: 接触する / 触れる / 関わる / 接する
example: 如果想了解台灣文化，就要多多去接觸當地人，體驗他們的生活方式
english: If you want to understand Taiwanese culture, you need to interact with the locals and experience their way of life.

meaning: 抽象的な / 具体性に欠ける
example: 抽象的目標容易讓人失去方向，最好設立具體的計畫
english: Abstract goals can easily lead to a loss of direction; it's best to set concrete plans.

meaning: 見学する
example: 昨天我們去參觀了故宮博物院
english: Yesterday we visited the Palace Museum.

meaning: そちらへ行く / 向かう
example: 我現在坐計程車過去
english: I'm taking a taxi there now.

meaning: キーホルダー
example: 小孩把在日本買的紀念品鑰匙圈掛在書包上，開心地跟同學炫耀
english: The child happily showed off the souvenir keychain he bought in Japan to his classmates.

meaning: 旅行中遇到的熱情司機，親切的態度讓我有印象深刻
example: 我對老師說過的一句話有印象深刻，一直記到現在
english: I have a deep impression of something my teacher said, and I still remember it to this day.

meaning: マンション・アパート（集合住宅）
example: 我住在信義區一間高級公寓，樓下還有健身房跟游泳池喔
english: I live in a luxury apartment in the Xinyi District. There's even a gym and swimming pool downstairs!

meaning: 知り合い
example: 你想找攝影師嗎？我剛好有認識的人
english: Are you looking for a photographer? I happen to know someone like that.

meaning: ピーク時 / 最も高まった時点 / 混雑の時間帯
example: 我不喜歡在尖峰時段開車，太塞了
english: I don't like driving during rush hour, it's too congested.

meaning: 話しかける / 話に加わる / 会話を始める
example: 在酒吧裡，有一對馬來西亞夫妻主動跟我搭話
english: In the bar, a Malaysian couple struck up a conversation with me.

meaning: 達成する / 成し遂げる / 目標を果たす
example: 他努力了好幾年，終於達成自己開店的夢想
english: After years of hard work, he finally achieved his dream of opening his own shop.

meaning: 立ち上がる / 起き上がる
example: 他聽到電話響起，立刻起身去接聽
english: He heard the phone ring and immediately got up to answer it.

meaning: 激しい / 熾烈な / 激烈な
example: 激烈的競爭讓很多人壓力很大
english: Intense competition puts a lot of pressure on many people.

meaning: 消耗する
example: 天氣很熱，我消耗了很多體力
english: It was very hot, and I used up a lot of energy.

meaning: 釣る / 釣りをする
example: 我會帶孩子們去一間可以釣蝦的餐廳
english: I will take the kids to a restaurant where they can go shrimp fishing.

meaning: 運動神経
example: 他的運動神經很好，什麼運動都會
english: He has excellent athletic ability and can do all kinds of sports.

meaning: よく眠れない / 睡眠の質が悪い
example: 如果睡不好，白天工作時就會很沒精神 / 效率也變低
english: If you don't sleep well, you'll feel tired and less productive at work during the day.

meaning: 扇風機
example: 要開電風扇嗎？
english: Should we turn on the electric fan?

meaning: 検索する / 探す / 探し求める
example: 我用手機搜尋附近的餐廳
english: I searched for nearby restaurants on my phone.

meaning: （形）得意である / お手のもの（＝自信を持ってできること）
example: 我媽媽最拿手的菜是紅燒牛肉
english: My mom's best dish is braised beef.

meaning: （動）～に精通している / 熟練している
example: 她擅長管理時間，能同時處理多項工作
english: She is good at time management and can handle multiple tasks simultaneously.

meaning: 不得意である / 苦手である
example: 我對寫作不擅長，所以每次寫報告都要花很多時間
english: I'm not good at writing, so it always takes me a lot of time to write a report.

meaning: ラケット（テニス / バドミントン / 卓球などで使う道具）
example: 我雖然喜歡運動，但要用球拍的運動都不太擅長，像是網球跟羽毛球
english: Although I enjoy sports, I'm not very good at sports that require rackets, such as tennis and badminton.

meaning: クラブ活動 / サークル / 部活動
example: 你高中的時候參加什麼社團？
english: What clubs did you participate in during high school?

meaning: 小学校
example: 我的國小老師很親切，上課氣氛輕鬆又有趣，我很喜歡她
english: My elementary school teacher is very kind, and the classroom atmosphere is relaxed and fun. I like her very much.

meaning: 中学校
example: 我國中時參加了籃球社，每天放學後都會去練球
english: I joined the basketball club in middle school and would practice every day after school.

meaning: 高校
example: 他高中畢業後沒有馬上念大學，而是先去國外當交換學生一年
english: After graduating from high school, he did not immediately go to university, but instead went abroad as an exchange student for a year.

meaning: 踏切
example: 我家附近的平交道經常大排長龍，是上下班時間。
english: There are often long queues at the level crossing near my home during rush hour.

meaning: 熱中症になる / 暑さにやられる
example: 夏天在外面運動時一定要注意防曬，多喝水，以免中暑
english: When exercising outdoors in the summer, be sure to take precautions against sun exposure and drink plenty of water to avoid heatstroke.

meaning: ゲームセンター
example: 孩子們在遊戲中心玩了一整天，非常開心
english: The children had a great time playing at the game center all day.

meaning: 思い出を残す / 記憶に残る / 思い出になる
example: 在你心中，有哪些特別留下回憶的事情？
english: What are some of the most memorable things in your life?

meaning: 青春 / 若い時代
example: 我們一起經歷的校園生活，留下了青春的回憶
english: Our shared campus life has left us with many youthful memories.

meaning: ギターを弾く
example: 彈吉他讓我放鬆
english: Playing guitar helps me relax

meaning: しばらく〜していない / 長い間〜していない
example: 她說她很久沒運動，最近開始跑步想恢復體力
english: She said she hadn't exercised in a long time and recently started running to try and regain her strength.

meaning: 回復する / 取り戻す / 再開する / 復元する
example: 他生病一個星期，今天終於恢復精神，可以回學校上課了
english: He was sick for a week, but today he finally recovered and is able to go back to school.

meaning: 楽器
example: 小時候媽媽讓我學了一種樂器，現在我還會彈鋼琴
english: When I was little, my mom had me learn a musical instrument, and I can still play the piano now.

meaning: 楽団 / バンド
example: 高中時我和幾個喜歡音樂的朋友一起組樂團
english: In high school, I formed a band with a few friends who also loved music.

meaning: 女の子にモテる / 好かれる
example: 他不但長得帥，個性也很好，所以一直以來都很受女生歡迎
english: He's not only handsome, but also has a great personality, which is why he's always been popular with girls.

meaning: 懐かしく思う / 恋しく思う
example: 有時候我會懷念高中和朋友一起練團 / 參加比賽的那段日子
english: Sometimes I miss the days when I practiced with my friends in high school and participated in competitions.

meaning: 放送する / 配信する
example: 這支影片在網路上被播放了一百多萬次
english: This video has been viewed over a million times online.

meaning: 連続ドラマ（シリーズドラマ）
example: 我最近在看一部臺灣連續劇，劇情雖然有點誇張，但還蠻有趣的
english: I've recently been watching a Taiwanese drama series. The plot is a bit exaggerated, but it's quite interesting.

meaning: 人気がある / 歓迎される / 好かれている
example: 籃球在台灣非常受歡迎，幾乎每個學校都有籃球隊
english: Basketball is very popular in Taiwan, and almost every school has a basketball team.

meaning: スタートアップ企業（新しく創業した会社）
example: 越來越多年輕人選擇成立新創公司，希望把創意變成事業
english: More and more young people are choosing to start their own companies, hoping to turn their ideas into a career.

meaning: 退職する
example: 因為工作壓力太大，許多部下選擇離職
english: Due to excessive work pressure, many subordinates chose to resign.

meaning: 辞職する
example: 如果你遇到不開心的事情，先和主管溝通，不要馬上亂辭職
english: If you encounter something unpleasant, talk to your supervisor first; don't immediately quit your job.

meaning: 続ける / 引き続き〜する
example: 雖然學中文有點難，但我決定繼續努力，不會輕易放棄
english: Although learning Chinese is a bit difficult, I've decided to keep trying and won't give up easily.

meaning: （接） たとえ…としても / 仮に…としても
example: 即使我們分開了，也要保持聯絡
english: Even if we're apart, let's stay in touch.

meaning:
（副）完全に / 絶対に
（形）絶対的な
example: 這件事我絕對不會告訴別人
english: I will absolutely not tell anyone about this.

meaning: ほとんど / ほぼ / 大体
example: 現在的年輕人幾乎不看電視，很多企業發現電視廣告的效果正在下降
english: Young people today hardly watch TV, and many companies are finding that the effectiveness of TV advertising is declining.

meaning: 配信プラットフォーム / ストリーミングサービス
example: 現在年輕人比較常用播放平臺看影片，很少打開電視機
english: Young people nowadays prefer to watch videos on streaming platforms and rarely turn on the TV.

meaning: ストリーミングプラットフォーム
example: 串流平臺通常採用訂閱制，用戶每月付費就能享受無限觀看
english: Streaming platforms typically use a subscription model, where users pay a monthly fee to enjoy unlimited viewing.

meaning:
（動）ライブ配信する
（名）ライブ配信
example: 他常常在網路上直播玩遊戲，吸引了很多年輕觀眾
english: He often streams himself playing games online, attracting many young viewers.

meaning: 特徴 / 特性 / 特色
example: 人類的生物特徵之一是大腦特別發達
english: One of the biological characteristics of humans is their highly developed brain.

meaning: 就職する / 職に就く
example: 現在的年輕人覺得就職不容易，因為競爭激烈而且要求很高。
english: Young people today find it difficult to find jobs because of intense competition and high requirements.

meaning: その後 / あとで（過去の出来事を振り返って「後になって…」と言うとき）
example: 我們大學時認識，後來就成為好朋友了
english: We met in college and became good friends.

meaning: それから / そして（順番に行動・出来事を並べる）
example: 我們可以先討論這個問題，然後再決定怎麼做
english: We can discuss this issue first, and then decide what to do.

meaning: パートナーシップを解消する
example: 他們一起開餐廳多年，後來因為理念不同，最後決定拆夥
english: They ran a restaurant together for many years, but eventually decided to break up due to differences in their business philosophies.

meaning: お互いに / 相互に / 互いに
example: 我們應該互相幫助
english: We should help each other

meaning: 相互補完する / 補い合う
example: 兩家公司技術和資源互補，所以合作很成功
english: The two companies complement each other's technologies and resources, which is why the cooperation was very successful.

meaning: 商談する / ビジネスの話をする
example: 我明天要跟客戶談生意，希望能簽下一個新的合約
english: I have a business meeting with a client tomorrow, and I hope to sign a new contract.

meaning: 経費 / 費用 / 運営資金
example: 公司會報銷員工的出差經費，包括交通 / 住宿和餐飲
english: The company will reimburse employees for business travel expenses, including transportation, accommodation, and meals.

meaning: 残りの支払い / 最後に支払う金額
example: 小美已經付了尾款，所以店員說她的電腦今天就能帶回家了
english: Xiaomei has already paid the balance, so the salesperson said she can take her computer home today.

meaning: 感知して反応させる
example: 按樓層樓前先幫我用房卡感應
english: Please have my room card scanned before proceeding to the floor.

meaning: 〜によって / ～を提示して
example: 憑房卡報房好用餐
english: Please check in with your room card for dining.

meaning:
①飽和する / 限界まで満たされる
②市場や環境がいっぱいになる / 余地がない
example: 台北市的便利商店數量幾乎飽和，新店開下去很難再有利潤
english: The number of convenience stores in Taipei is almost saturated, and it will be difficult for new stores to be profitable.

meaning:
（接）…なので 
（前）…により
example: 由於交通已經飽和，上班時間的捷運車廂總是擠滿人，幾乎動不了
english: Because the traffic is already saturated, the subway cars are always packed with people during rush hour, making it almost impossible to move.

meaning: 祭壇や神様 / 先祖にお供えする品物
example: 中元節結束後，家人會一起分食供品，相信能帶來平安與好運
english: After the Ghost Festival, family members will share the offerings together, believing that this will bring peace and good fortune.

meaning: まるごと全部 / すっかり / 一日中
example: 在中元節普渡時，很多公司會準備一整隻雞拜拜，祈求事業順利發展
english: During the Ghost Festival (Zhongyuan Festival), many companies prepare a whole chicken for worship, praying for smooth business development.

meaning: きゅうり
example: 這道菜是用小黃瓜和蒜頭醃漬的
english: This dish is made with pickled cucumbers and garlic.

meaning: ナス
example: 有些人不喜歡茄子軟軟的口感，但我覺得很好吃
english: Some people don't like the soft texture of eggplant, but I think it's delicious.

meaning: 努力して手に入れる / 勝ち取る / 獲得を目指す
example: 他每天加班到很晚，就是想爭取一個升職的好機會
english: He works late every day, hoping to get a good opportunity for promotion.

meaning: 差し込む / 挿す / 入れる
example: 把竹籤插進黃瓜和茄子裡
english: Insert bamboo skewers into cucumbers and eggplants

meaning:
（形）特定の
（動）特定する
example: 警方已經特定了昨天行兇的嫌疑犯身份
english: Police have identified the suspect who committed the crime yesterday.

meaning:
（名）伝統 / しきたり
（形）伝統的な / 昔ながらの
example: 中秋節是臺灣非常重要的傳統節日之一
english: The Mid-Autumn Festival is one of the most important traditional festivals in Taiwan.

meaning:
（動）尊重する / 敬意を払う
（名）尊重
example: 旅行時，我們應該尊重當地的文化與習俗，避免不禮貌的行為
english: When traveling, we should respect local culture and customs and avoid impolite behavior.

meaning:
（名）記憶 / 思い出
（動）回想する / 思い出す
example: 這間老房子充滿了回憶，我真的捨不得搬走
english: This old house is full of memories; I really don't want to move away.

meaning: 保存する
example: 記得保存文件，避免突然關機導致資料遺失
english: Remember to save your files to avoid data loss due to sudden shutdown.

meaning: 幽霊 / 亡霊 / 魂
example: 許多人相信七月鬼月期間，幽靈會回到人間遊蕩
english: Many people believe that during the Ghost Month in July, ghosts return to the human world to wander.

meaning: 祖先 / ご先祖様
example: 每年清明節，我們都會去掃墓祭拜祖先
english: Every year during the Qingming Festival, we go to sweep the tombs and pay respects to our ancestors.

meaning: 禁忌 / タブー / してはいけないこと
example: 在農曆七月，有很多與鬼月有關的禁忌需要注意
english: During the seventh month of the lunar calendar, there are many taboos related to the Ghost Month that need to be observed.

meaning: ～しないほうがいい / ～しないのが望ましい
example: 今天風很大，最好不要騎機車出門，比較危險
english: It's very windy today, so it's best not to ride a motorcycle out; it's quite dangerous.

meaning: 評価する / 見積もる / 査定する
example: 主管要求我們評估市場趨勢，並提出明年的行銷計畫
english: Our supervisor asked us to assess market trends and develop a marketing plan for next year.

meaning: 情報（インフォメーション）
example: 公司建立了一個內部平台，讓員工能快速分享與查詢最新的工作資訊
english: The company has established an internal platform that allows employees to quickly share and access the latest work information.

meaning: 口笛
example: 他邊走邊吹口哨，心情看起來特別輕鬆
english: He whistled as he walked, looking particularly relaxed.

meaning: 引き受ける / 担う / 責任を負う
example: 一旦接下這個任務，你就必須承擔全部的責任
english: Once you accept this task, you must take full responsibility.

meaning: 道路 / 車道（特に舗装された自動車用道路）
example: 小孩子過馬路時，一定要牽著大人的手，注意安全
english: Children must hold an adult's hand when crossing the road and be careful.

meaning:
（名）バーベキュー / 焼き肉
（動）焼く / 炙る
example: 每年中秋節，我們一家人都會在陽台上一起烤肉燒烤
english: Every Mid-Autumn Festival, my family and I would have a barbecue together on the balcony.

meaning: 草地 / 芝生 / 草原
example: 假日的時候，我喜歡帶家人到公園草地上野餐
english: On holidays, I like to take my family to the park for a picnic on the grass.

meaning: イチゴ
example: 冬天的時候，我最喜歡吃新鮮的草莓和喝草莓牛奶
english: In winter, my favorite things to eat are fresh strawberries and strawberry milk.

meaning:
①太陽に当てる（日光で乾かす / 温める）
②日光を浴びる（例：日光浴をする）
example: 她一邊聽音樂一邊曬衣服，看起來心情非常輕鬆愉快
english: She listened to music while hanging up the laundry, and seemed to be in a very relaxed and happy mood.

meaning: 日焼けする
example: 夏天很容易曬黑，所以記得要塗防曬霜
english: It's easy to get a tan in the summer, so remember to apply sunscreen.

meaning: リコーダー（縦笛）
example: 直笛是學生最早接觸的樂器之一，簡單又容易上手
english: The recorder is one of the first musical instruments students encounter; it's simple and easy to learn.

meaning: 祭典 / 祭り / 儀式的なイベント
example: 村民們花了好幾個月準備這次的年度祭典，規模非常盛大
english: The villagers spent several months preparing for this annual festival, which was a very grand event.

meaning: 太鼓 / ドラム（伝統的な打楽器）
example: 小學的運動會上，我們表演了結合舞蹈和太鼓的節目，氣氛非常熱烈
english: At the elementary school sports meet, we performed a program combining dance and taiko drumming, and the atmosphere was very lively.

meaning: もう一度行きたい / また行きたい
example: 跟你一起去的那個海邊很美，下次有機會我想再去一次
english: The beach we went to together was beautiful; I'd like to go again sometime.

meaning: 仮面 / マスク / 面
example: 萬聖節那天，大家戴著各式各樣的面具來參加化妝舞會
english: On Halloween, everyone wears all sorts of masks to attend the costume party.

meaning: 祈る / 願う / （神仏などに）お願いする
example: 每次拜拜時，媽媽都會向神明祈求全家人身體健康
english: Every time she prayed, Mom would ask the gods for good health for the whole family.

meaning:
（名）豊作
（動）豊かな収穫を得ること
example: 由於今年雨水充足 / 氣候穩定，許多農民的作物都大豐收
english: Thanks to ample rainfall and stable weather this year, many farmers have had bumper harvests.

meaning: 頭をなでる / 頭をやさしく触れる
example: 每次我考試考得好，爸爸都會摸摸我的頭鼓勵我繼續加油
english: Every time I do well on a test, my dad pats my head and encourages me to keep going.

meaning: 近距離 / 近い距離
example: 昨天在動物園我近距離看到一隻剛出生不久的小老虎，超級可愛
english: Yesterday at the zoo, I saw a newborn tiger cub up close; it was incredibly cute!

meaning: ラジオ
example: 很多開車的人都會聽收音機
english: Many drivers listen to the radio.

meaning: どれくらい待ちますか？
example: 這道菜還沒好嗎？我們已經等很久了，要等多久啊？
english: Is this dish not ready yet? We've been waiting for ages, how much longer?

meaning: （動）取材する / インタビューする（名）取材 / インタビュー
example: 這份雜誌專門採訪在台灣創業的外國人，介紹他們的成功經驗
english: This magazine features interviews with foreign entrepreneurs in Taiwan, showcasing their success stories.

meaning: インターネット（台湾では最も一般的な言い方）
example: 我家的網路最近很不穩定，工作時常常會斷線
english: My home internet has been very unstable lately, and it often disconnects while I'm working.

meaning: 〜と言い慣れている / 〜と呼ぶのが一般的
example: 臺灣人習慣說「網路」，不太說「網絡」，雖然意思一樣
english: Taiwanese people are more used to saying "网路" (wǎnglù, meaning "the internet") than "网络" (wǎngluò, meaning "network"), although they mean the same thing.

meaning: インターネットを使う / ネットに接続する
example: 你每天花多少時間上網？
english: How much time do you spend online each day?

meaning: ～とは言えない / ～のうちに入らない
example: 這個問題不算太難，只要理解概念就能解出來
english: This problem isn't too difficult; you can solve it as long as you understand the concepts.

pinyin: měi nián dōu huì qù yí cì
meaning: 毎年一度は行く / 年に一回は行く
example: 我媽媽的老家在北海道，所以我小時候每年都會去一次北海道
english: My mother's hometown is in Hokkaido, so I would go to Hokkaido every year when I was a child.

meaning: 諦める / 放棄する / 断念する
example: 有些人為了家庭放棄了自己的工作和興趣
english: Some people give up their jobs and interests for their families.

meaning: どうしても〜せざるを得ない / 〜しないわけにはいかない
example: 因為颱風太大，我們不得不取消原本的旅行計畫
english: Because the typhoon was too strong, we had to cancel our original travel plans.

meaning: 勇敢な / 勇気がある / 臆さない
example: 面對未知的挑戰，她總是非常勇敢地往前走
english: She always bravely moves forward when faced with unknown challenges.

meaning: ～する勇気がない / ～するのを恐れる / ～することを控える
example: 老闆在發火的時候，大家都不敢出聲
english: When the boss was angry, no one dared to make a sound.

meaning: 転ぶ / つまずく / 倒れる
example: 弟弟在操場跑太快，不小心跌倒了，膝蓋擦傷了
english: My younger brother was running too fast on the playground and accidentally fell, scraping his knee.

meaning: オーブン
example: 餅乾從烤箱裡拿出來後，要先放涼再裝袋
english: After removing the cookies from the oven, let them cool completely before packaging them.

meaning:
①よく知らない / 慣れていない（人や事に対して）
②よくできない / 得意ではない（スキルに対して）
③（料理が）火が通っていない / 生焼け
example: 我對這一帶不熟，能不能麻煩你帶我去？
english: I'm not familiar with this area, could you please take me there?

pinyin: yǒu yì diǎn wàng jì le
meaning: ちょっと忘れてしまった / 少し忘れた
example: 我本來想跟你說什麼，可是現在有一點忘記了
english: I had something I wanted to tell you, but now I've forgotten something.

meaning: もう一度言ってください
example: 你的發音有點快，我還沒聽懂，請再說一遍慢一點好嗎？
english: Your pronunciation is a bit fast, I didn't understand it. Could you please say it again, a little slower?

meaning:
（名）会話 / 対話
（動）会話をする
example: 學習外語最重要的是多練習對話
english: The most important thing in learning a foreign language is to practice conversations a lot.

meaning: 生活リズム（特に「起きる・寝る」などの時間）
example: 我的作息很規律，早睡早起
english: I have a very regular schedule, going to bed early and waking up early.

meaning: リズム / テンポ（音楽だけでなく / 生活・仕事にも使える）
example: 東京的生活節奏很快，讓人覺得壓力很大
english: Life in Tokyo moves at a fast pace, which can be very stressful.

meaning: 歩調 / ペース（物理的な歩くスピードも / 比喩的にも使う）
example: 我喜歡慢步調的生活，比較輕鬆自在
english: I prefer a slower pace of life; it's more relaxed and comfortable.

meaning: 病気になった / 体調を崩した
example: 我這兩天生病了，不但發燒還咳嗽，所以請假在家休息
english: I've been sick for the past couple of days; I have a fever and a cough, so I'm taking the day off to rest at home.

meaning: 朝早く / 早朝 / とても早い時間帯に
example: 最近我改變作息，一大早起床運動，精神變得好多了
english: I recently changed my sleep schedule, getting up early every morning to exercise, and my energy levels have improved a lot.

meaning: ヘッドハンティングする / 引き抜く
example: 我被一家在台灣的日商公司挖角，然後就來台灣了
english: I was headhunted by a Japanese company in Taiwan, and that's how I came to Taiwan.

meaning: まさに行こうとしている / もうすぐ到着する / 行くことになる
example: 你會害怕要到一個新國家生活嗎？
english: Are you afraid to move to a new country?

meaning: 妊娠する / 赤ちゃんを身ごもる
example: 她懷孕八個月了，已經快要生產了
english: She's eight months pregnant and almost due.

meaning: 帝王切開
example: 她因為胎位不正，只好選擇剖腹產來確保母子平安
english: Because of the baby's breech position, she had to opt for a cesarean section to ensure the safety of both mother and child.

meaning: 傷口 / キズの部分
example: 手術後的傷口需要每天消毒，以防感染發炎
english: The surgical wound needs to be disinfected daily to prevent infection and inflammation.

meaning: 産後ケアセンター / 産後調理院
example: 月子中心提供二十四小時護理服務，非常適合新手媽媽
english: The postpartum care center offers 24-hour nursing services, making it ideal for new mothers.

meaning: 言い争う / 意見をぶつけ合う / 議論する
example: 網路上的一篇文章引發網友激烈爭論，留言區炸開了
english: An article on the internet has sparked a heated debate among netizens, with the comment section exploding.

meaning: 育児休業 / 育休
example: 許多公司提供育嬰假，但有些人擔心請假會影響升遷機會
english: Many companies offer parental leave, but some people worry that taking leave will affect their chances of promotion.

meaning: 日数 / 日程 / 期間の日にちの数
example: 請假的天數要提前和主管報告，不能臨時決定
english: The number of days of leave must be reported to the supervisor in advance; it cannot be decided on the spot.

meaning: いらいらする / そわそわして落ち着かない
example: 最近工作壓力很大，我常常因為一些小事情就變得很煩躁
english: I've been under a lot of work pressure lately, and I often get irritable over small things.

meaning:
（名）収入・所得　
（動）収入を得る
example: 如果一個家庭的收入不穩定，常常會覺得生活壓力很大
english: If a family's income is unstable, they often feel a lot of pressure in life.

meaning: （お金・時間・労力・感情などを）費やす / 注ぐ / 犠牲にする
example: 他為了考上好大學，付出了很多時間和精力，每天都努力讀書
english: He devoted a lot of time and energy to getting into a good university, studying hard every day.

meaning: 話題 / テーマ
example: 最近最熱門的話題是人工智慧，很多人擔心會影響未來的工作
english: The hottest topic lately is artificial intelligence, and many people are worried that it will affect future jobs.

meaning: ～すべきだ / ～しなければならない
example: 你應該要多休息，不要每天加班到那麼晚，身體才不會出問題
english: You should get more rest and not work so late every day, otherwise your health will suffer.

meaning: 裏社会 / マフィア / ヤクザ / 暴力団
example: 聽說這家酒吧以前跟黑社會有關係，所以很多人都不敢隨便去
english: I heard this bar used to have ties to the underworld, so many people are afraid to go there.

meaning:
①面白い / 興味深い
②意味がある
example: 覺得學中文很有意思，因為不但可以認識新文化，還能交到不同的朋友
english: I find learning Chinese very interesting because it allows me to learn about new cultures and make different friends.

meaning: 悪口を言う / 陰口をたたく
example: 他表面上很客氣，其實常常在背後說同事的壞話，讓人不敢信任他
english: He appears very polite on the surface, but he often speaks ill of his colleagues behind their backs, making people hesitant to trust him.

meaning:
（動）刺激する / 興奮させる / 触発する
（名）刺激 / 衝撃
（形容詞的）刺激的だ / スリリングだ
example: 這部電影的情節很刺激，觀眾看得心跳加快，完全捨不得離開座位
english: The movie's plot is thrilling, keeping viewers' hearts racing and making it impossible to leave their seats.

meaning:
（形）サスペンス的な / 謎めいた
（名）サスペンス（ジャンルとしての呼び方）
example: 我最喜歡看的類型是懸疑片，因為劇情常常出人意料，非常緊張刺激
english: My favorite genre is suspense films because the plots are often unexpected and very thrilling.

meaning: タイムスリップドラマ（歴史や未来などに行く物語）
example: 穿越劇常常把歷史故事和浪漫愛情結合，讓觀眾覺得既新鮮又有趣
english: Time-travel dramas often combine historical stories with romantic love, making them both fresh and interesting for viewers.

meaning:
①水に浮かんで流れる / 漂う（物・人が水流に流される）
②（比喩）人生の中で定まらず流されている状態
example: 小說的主角因為意外而在孤島上漂流，展開一段驚險的冒險故事
english: The protagonist of the novel is stranded on a deserted island due to an accident, embarking on a thrilling adventure.

meaning:
（名）監督（映画 / 舞台 / ドラマなどを演出する人）
（動）監督・演出する
example: 導演在拍攝現場不斷指導演員，希望能表現出最真實的情感
english: The director constantly guided the actors on set, hoping to help them express the most genuine emotions.

meaning: 主人公 / 主役
example: 導演安排了一個意外的結局，讓觀眾對主角的命運感到非常震驚
english: The director arranged an unexpected ending, leaving the audience deeply shocked by the protagonist's fate.

meaning: 生き続ける / 生き延びる
example: 爭中的平民最重要的願望，就是能平安活下去，保護家人
english: The most important wish of civilians in the conflict is to live peacefully and protect their families.

meaning: 缶詰
example: 小時候我最喜歡吃鳳梨罐頭，冰冰涼涼的味道讓人覺得很開心
english: When I was little, my favorite food was canned pineapple. The cool and refreshing taste made me very happy.

meaning:
（形）残念に思う
（名）心残り / 遺憾
example: 比賽雖然輸了，但我們已經盡力了，所以沒有什麼遺憾
english: Although we lost the game, we did our best, so we have no regrets.

meaning: 駐在員
example: 他是一位日商公司的外派人員，目前在台中負責財務部門
english: He is an expatriate for a Japanese company and is currently in charge of the finance department in Taichung.

meaning: 勢いがなくなる / 衰退する / 没落する
example: 這個傳統市場因為大型超市的競爭，生意慢慢的沒落了
english: This traditional market has gradually declined due to competition from large supermarkets.

meaning: アイドル
example: 偶像的形象很重要，所以經紀公司常常要求他們保持完美的外表
english: An idol's image is very important, so management companies often require them to maintain a perfect appearance.

meaning: あまり聞かない
example: 在新聞節目裡經常聽到這些政治術語，但在一般對話中比較少聽到
english: These political terms are frequently heard in news programs, but rarely in ordinary conversations.

meaning: 看板；（比喩的に）看板商品 / 看板メニュー / 有名な人物やもの
example: 這家牛肉麵店的紅燒牛肉是他們的招牌料理
english: This beef noodle shop's braised beef is their signature dish.

meaning: たくさんのお金を使った / 費やした
example: 我最近搬家，光是裝潢和傢俱就花了很多錢
english: I recently moved, and the renovations and furniture alone cost a lot of money.

meaning: 宣伝する / PRする / 広める
example: 這次的宣傳效果比我們預期的還要好
english: The publicity campaign was even more effective than we expected.

meaning: 稼いで持っていった / 利益を持っていかれた / 儲けられた
example: 我們辛苦賺來的錢，都被那些詐騙集團賺走了
english: The money we worked so hard to earn was all taken by those fraud groups.

meaning: 客引きをする / 客を呼び込む / 勧誘する
example: 夜市裡有許多攤販站在路邊大聲拉客，引人注意
english: In the night market, many vendors stand on the roadside, loudly soliciting customers, attracting attention.

meaning: 口コミに頼る / 評判で成り立つ / 口伝えで広まる
example: 如果你真的做好品質，自然可以靠口碑留下回頭客
english: If you truly focus on quality, you can naturally build a reputation and retain repeat customers.

meaning: サイコロ
example: 喝酒遊戲常常會用到骰子，輸的人要喝一杯
english: Drinking games often use dice; the loser has to drink a glass.

meaning: サークル / グループ / 界隈 / 仲間内 / コミュニティ
example: 他一直在創業圈子裡活動，認識了很多志同道合的朋友
english: He has been active in the startup community and has met many like-minded friends.

meaning: プライバシー
example: 在社群媒體上，我會小心保護自己的隱私
english: On social media, I will be careful to protect my privacy.

meaning: 商談する / ビジネスの話をする
example: 對日本人來說，談生意最喜歡去哪裡？是林森北路嗎？
english: Where do Japanese people prefer to conduct business? Is it Linsen North Road?

meaning: あまりよく分からない / はっきりしない
example: 我不太清楚他為什麼突然辭職了
english: I'm not quite sure why he suddenly resigned.

meaning: 死ぬ / 命を失う
example: 我阿公前幾年因為心臟病死掉了
english: My grandfather passed away from heart disease a few years ago.

meaning: （車などを）運転して戻ってくる / 転して戻る
example: 爸爸昨天開車去台中，今天一早就開回來了
english: Dad drove to Taichung yesterday and drove back early this morning.

meaning: （手で）持ち上げる / 拾い上げる / 取り上げる
example: 你把那杯熱咖啡拿起來的時候要小心
english: Be careful when you pick up that cup of hot coffee.

meaning: 路肩・道の端
example: 我把汽車停在路邊了
english: I parked the car on the side of the road.

meaning: 汚い / 汚れている
example: 你的手怎麼髒髒的？
english: Why are your hands so dirty?

meaning: 汚い言葉 / 悪口 / 下品な言葉
example: 雖然有些電影裡會出現髒話，但在現實生活中還是要注意言辭
english: Although some movies may contain profanity, it's still important to be mindful of your words in real life.

meaning: （本・お金・物などを）返す / 戻す
example: 我明天再把借你的錢還給你
english: I'll pay you back the money I borrowed tomorrow.

meaning: 教科書 / テキスト / 教材本
example: 請把課本收在書櫃
english: Please put your textbooks away in the bookshelf.

meaning: ちょっと考えないと / 少し考える必要がある
example: 這件事有點複雜，我得想一下，再告訴你
english: This is a bit complicated, I need to think about it and then I'll let you know.

meaning: 盛大である / 規模が大きく華やかである
example: 奧運開幕式被視為全球最盛大的節目之一，大家都會在電視前觀看
english: The Olympic opening ceremony is considered one of the world's grandest events, and everyone watches it on television.

meaning: 一人ぼっちでいること / 他人と一緒に行動せず / 一人だけで過ごすこと
example: 如果不敢主動交朋友，就容易在新環境裡釘孤枝
english: If you don't dare to take the initiative to make friends, you're likely to become isolated in a new environment.

meaning: やむを得ず〜するしかない / 仕方なく〜する
example: 手機忘在家裡，我只好借朋友的手機打電話
english: I forgot my phone at home, so I had to borrow a friend's phone to make a call.

meaning: 鳥肌が立つ
example: 她唱歌的聲音太動人了，讓全場的人都起雞皮疙瘩
english: Her singing voice was so moving that it gave everyone in the audience goosebumps.

meaning: 女性同士のとても親しい友人
example: 閨蜜之間可以分享最私密的心事，不用擔心被笑話
english: Best friends can share their most private thoughts without worrying about being laughed at.

meaning: ねえ聞いて / いい？ / あのね
example: 我跟你講！這件事情真的很嚴重！
english: Let me tell you! This matter is really serious!

meaning: だだをこねる / 甘える
example: 小兒子經常向我撒嬌
english: My youngest son often acts spoiled towards me.

meaning: 捨てる / 投げ捨てる / 失う
example: 她決定把不再需要的衣服丟掉，讓衣櫃裡多出一些空間
english: She decided to throw away clothes she no longer needed to make more space in her closet.

meaning: はっきりしている / 明確である / クリアである
example: 這張照片拍得很清晰，臉都看得清楚
english: This photo is very clear; you can even see the faces clearly.

meaning: とても似ている / よく似ている
example: 這裡的氣氛很像那個恐怖電影的感覺，讓人不敢一個人走
english: The atmosphere here is like that of a horror movie, making you afraid to walk alone.

meaning: まあまあ忙しい / けっこう忙しい
example: 最近工作真的還蠻忙的，幾乎每天都要加班
english: Work has been really busy lately, I've had to work overtime almost every day.

meaning:
（動）OEM生産をする / 受託製造する
（名）OEM生産 / 委託製造という行為
example: 這家公司幫很多品牌代工
english: This company manufactures for many brands.

meaning: スケール / 規模 / 規模の大きさ / 規模感
example: 我們的目標是在三年內擴大亞洲市場規模
english: Our goal is to expand our Asian market presence within three years.

meaning: すべて順調です / すべてうまくいっています
example: 手術後恢復得很好，醫生說目前一切都很順利
english: The recovery is going very well after the surgery, and the doctor says everything is progressing smoothly.

meaning:
（動）強く望む / 切望する
（名）強い願望・憧れ
example: 很多年輕人渴望有自由的生活方式，不想被束縛
english: Many young people yearn for a free lifestyle and don't want to be constrained.

meaning:
①着手する / 取り掛かる（中性〜ポジティブ）
②手を下す（ネガティブ：暴力・処罰）
example: 我不知道該從哪裡下手
english: I don't know where to start.

meaning:
①手元にある / 手中に持っている
②所持している / 管理している
example: 我手上有很多事情要處理，今天可能沒空
english: I have a lot of things to take care of, so I probably won't be available today.

meaning:
（動）類似している / 似ている
（形）似たような
example: 我們之前也處理過類似像這樣子的客訴
english: We've handled similar customer complaints before.

meaning:
（名）ウォームアップ
（動）ウォームアップする / 準備運動をする / 体を温める
example: 運動前一定要先熱身，這樣才能避免受傷
english: Always warm up before exercising to avoid injury.

meaning: 競争相手 / ライバル / 対抗馬
example: 在保養品市場上，我們最大的競爭對手是韓國的保養品牌公司
english: In the skincare market, our biggest competitors are South Korean skincare brands.

meaning: まねる / 模倣する
example: 那家新公司幾乎完全模仿我們的廣告風格，缺乏創意
english: That new company almost completely copied our advertising style; it lacked creativity.

meaning:
（動）参考にする / 参考する
（名）参考
example: 設計新產品時，我們會參考市場上的熱門款式和顧客需求
english: When designing new products, we refer to popular styles on the market and customer needs.

meaning: 盗作する / 剽窃する / パクる（他人の著作やアイデアを無断で使う）
example: 設計師否認抄襲，強調這是自己原創的概念
english: The designer denied plagiarism, emphasizing that it was their original concept.

meaning:
（名）傾向 / 傾き / 偏り
（動）〜しがちである / 〜の傾向がある
example: 現在的年輕人有追求自由與彈性工作的傾向，不再一味追求高薪
english: Young people today tend to seek freedom and flexible work arrangements, and are no longer solely focused on high salaries.

meaning: 嫌う / 嫌悪する / 憎む / 忌み嫌う
example: 我非常厭惡那種不尊重他人意見的說話方式
english: I utterly despise those ways of speaking that disrespect others' opinions.

meaning: 基礎 / 土台 / ベース / 基本となる部分
example: 家庭教育是人格發展的基礎，影響孩子的一生
english: Family education is the foundation of personality development and influences a child's entire life.

meaning: 追い求める / 追求する / 目指す
example: 追求幸福不代表一切順利，而是學會在困難中找到意義
english: The pursuit of happiness does not mean that everything will go smoothly, but rather that one should learn to find meaning in difficulties.

meaning: もはやただ一方的に～することはない / 単純に～だけには偏らない
example: 消費者現在不再一味相信廣告，而是會自己做功課比較產品
english: Consumers no longer blindly believe advertisements; instead, they do their own research and compare products.

meaning:
（形）（範囲・内容が）広い / 幅広い / 多方面にわたる
（副）広く / 広範囲に / 広い範囲で
example: 他有廣泛的興趣，什麼都想學
english: He has a wide range of interests and wants to learn everything.

meaning:
（動）〜に詳しい / 〜に慣れている / 〜をよく知っている。
（形）詳しい / 精通している（「對〜很熟悉」などの形でよく使います
example: 他一直在這個領域工作，非常熟悉
english: He has worked in this field for a long time and is very familiar with it.

meaning:
（形）豊富な / 充実した
（動）豊かにする / 充実させる
example: 他在國外工作多年，累積了豐富的國際經驗與文化視野
english: He has worked abroad for many years, accumulating rich international experience and cultural perspective.

meaning: キーワード
example: 選對關鍵字可以提升搜尋排名
english: Choosing the right keywords can improve search rankings.

meaning: 情報 / インフォメーション
example: 在這個數位時代，資訊的取得比以前容易許多，但也更需要判斷力
english: In this digital age, information is much easier to obtain than before, but it also requires greater judgment.

meaning: 範囲 / スコープ / 領域 / 限界 / 幅
example: 這次考試的內容範圍包括第一到第五章，請大家務必準備充分
english: The exam will cover Chapters 1 through 5, so please make sure you are well-prepared.

meaning:
（副）元々 / もともとは
（形）本来の / 元の
example: 這裡本來是一片森林，現在變成了城市
english: This area used to be a forest, but now it has become a city.

meaning:
（副）もともと / 本来は（以前の状況を表す）
（名）原本 / 原書（コピーではない / 元の文書）
example: 他原本打算明年出國留學，但因家裡有事只好暫時放棄
english: He originally planned to study abroad next year, but had to give it up temporarily due to family matters.

meaning: 淘汰する / ふるい落とす / 選別して除く
example: 在激烈的市場競爭中，不適應的企業很快就會被淘汰
english: In the fierce market competition, companies that fail to adapt will soon be eliminated.

meaning: 監獄 / 刑務所
example: 他因為詐騙被判五年徒刑，現在正在監獄服刑
english: He was sentenced to five years in prison for fraud and is currently serving his sentence.

meaning: 〜だと思っていた（実際は違った）
example: 他的中文很好，我還以為他是台灣人
english: His Chinese is very good; I thought he was from Taiwan.

meaning:
（動）腐る / ボロボロになる（物理的）
（形）ひどい / めちゃくちゃ / 最低（比喩的・評価）
example: 我昨天考試考得很爛，很多題目都看不懂
english: I did terribly on my exam yesterday; I didn't understand many of the questions.

meaning: 〜するかもしれない / ～になる可能性がある
example: 如果明天繼續下雨，活動可能會延期到下週舉行
english: If it continues to rain tomorrow, the event may be postponed until next week.

meaning: 全然予想してなかった / 考えもしなかった / 思いもしなかった
example: 我就沒有想到他會送我這麼特別的生日禮物
english: I never expected him to give me such a special birthday gift.

meaning: 角 / すみっこ / 隅にある場所
example: 咖啡廳的角落有一張小桌子，很適合一個人安靜地讀書
english: There's a small table in the corner of the café, perfect for a quiet place to read alone.

meaning: 役に立つ / 助けになる / 有益である
example: 謝謝你剛才的建議，真的對我很有幫助
english: Thank you for your suggestion, it was really helpful to me.

meaning: 私よりもっと良い / 私よりも優れている
example: 他的中文說得比我還要好，連老師都誇獎他了
english: His Chinese is better than mine; even the teacher praised him.

meaning: 私は前からずっと知っていた / 以前からわかっていた
example: 我從以前就知道他對錢很計較。
english: I knew he was very stingy with money.

meaning: アイドル / 憧れの存在
example: 她當偶像已經超過十年了，仍然保持著良好的形象和高人氣
english: She has been an idol for over ten years and still maintains a good image and high popularity.

meaning: 〜なのかもしれない
example: 我覺得可能是日本人學中文的時候，看到漢字會被日文影響
english: I think it might be that when Japanese people learn Chinese, seeing Chinese characters is influenced by the Japanese language.

meaning:
①〜を通じて / 〜を通して（方法・手段を表す）
②透過する / 通過する（物理的に「透ける」「通り抜ける」意味でも使う）
example: 我透過看臺灣的電視節目學中文，覺得很有幫助
english: I learned Chinese by watching Taiwanese TV programs, and I found it very helpful.

meaning: （副）互いに〜する / 相互に
example: 我們互相幫助
english: We help each other.

meaning: （代）お互いに
example: 我們幫助彼此
english: We help each other

meaning: 同じ同じ / こちらこそ / あなたもそう / 私もそうだよ
example: 我們都是新來的，彼此彼此，別太緊張
english: We're all new here, so don't be too nervous.

meaning: もうすぐ習得できる / まもなくできるようになる
example: 他學中文學了半年，現在已經快學會怎麼用繁體字寫文章了
english: He has been studying Chinese for half a year and is now almost able to write articles in traditional characters.

meaning: 話す / 話をする / しゃべる
example: 老師在課堂上講話的聲音太小，我坐在後面聽不清楚
english: The teacher spoke too softly in class, and I couldn't hear her clearly as I was sitting in the back.

meaning: 見学する / 見物する / 訪問して見て回る
example: 我們昨天去參觀了台北故宮博物院，裡面的文物非常精彩
english: We visited the National Palace Museum in Taipei yesterday, and the artifacts inside were truly magnificent.

meaning: 今まで一度も見たことがない
example: 我從來沒看過他這麼生氣，平常他很溫和
english: I've never seen him so angry; he's usually very gentle.

meaning: とても上手に話す / （〜を）とてもよく言える
example: 他從小就很會說英文，發音聽起來像外國人一樣
english: He was fluent in English from a young age, and his pronunciation sounded like a native speaker.

meaning: 宿題 / 学業 / 勉強
example: 英文功課都是我在教他們的
english: I taught them all their English homework.

meaning: （動）近くにある / 近づく
example: 我家靠近捷運站
english: My home is near the MRT station.

meaning: 近く / 付近 / 周辺
example: 我家附近有捷運站
english: There is an MRT station near my home.

meaning: わざわざ / 特に（ある目的のために行動することを強調）
example: 他特地從台中坐車來台北，就是為了參加你的生日派對
english: He specially traveled from Taichung to Taipei just to attend your birthday party.

meaning: 恋人 / 愛する人（付き合っている相手）
example: 他們原本是同班同學，後來慢慢變成了戀人，現在已經交往三年了
english: They were classmates, then gradually became lovers, and have been dating for three years now.

meaning: 期待する / 楽しみにする / 望む
example: 我很期待下個月的演唱會，因為那是我最喜歡的歌手第一次來台灣
english: I'm really looking forward to the concert next month because it's my favorite singer's first time coming to Taiwan.

meaning: 同じ / 一致した / 同一の
example: 在同一地點發生了兩次火災，引起居民的擔心
english: Two fires broke out at the same location, causing concern among residents.

meaning:
①まあまあ / 悪くない（＝Not bad / So-so）
②まだ〜できる / もう少し〜できる（能力や可能性を示す）
example: 時間還可以，我們不用太急，慢慢來就好
english: There's still time, we don't need to rush, we can take it slow.

meaning: 保護者 / 親
example: 老師希望家長能多關心孩子的功課，因為家庭教育非常重要
english: The teacher hopes that parents will pay more attention to their children's schoolwork, because family education is very important.

meaning: 熱心だ / 親切だ / 積極的だ
example: 我太太對孩子在學校的事情都很熱心
english: My wife is very enthusiastic about things related to the children's school.

meaning: あまり興味がない / ほとんど関心がない
example: 在我小學的時候，爸爸媽媽好像對學校的事沒有什麼興趣
english: When I was in elementary school, my parents didn't seem to be very interested in school-related matters.

meaning: 普段着 / カジュアルな服 / 制服ではない服装
example: 今天學校不用穿制服，我可以穿自己喜歡的便服去上課
english: Today, school doesn't require uniforms, so I can wear my favorite casual clothes to class.

meaning: 教育方針
example: 這所學校的教育方針是重視學生的自主學習能力
english: The school's educational policy emphasizes students' independent learning abilities.

meaning: ハーフ
example: 孩子們是日台混血兒，日文和中文都說得像母語一樣流利
english: The children are of Japanese and Taiwanese descent, and they speak both Japanese and Chinese fluently, as if they were their native languages.

meaning: 顔認証する
example: 這個健身房很先進，會員刷臉才可以進去，完全不用帶卡
english: This gym is very advanced; members can enter by scanning their faces, so there's no need to bring a card at all.

meaning: ちょっと〜に似ている / 〜っぽい / 〜のような感じ
example: 刷臉有點像在門口刷載具一樣，要掃一下才能進去
english: Facial recognition is similar to scanning a vehicle card at the entrance; you need to scan it to enter.

meaning: センサー（感知装置）
example: 有些大樓的門口安裝了臉部感應器，刷臉後門才會打開
english: Some buildings have installed facial recognition sensors at their entrances; the doors will only open after a face scan.

meaning: 唯一の / ただ一つの / たった一つの
example: 她願意跟我一起創業，唯一的條件是要平分利潤
english: She's willing to start a business with me, on the condition that we split the profits equally.

meaning: できるだけ / なるべく / 極力
example: 請盡量用長一點、難一點的句子回答我
english: Please answer me using longer and more complex sentences if possible.

meaning: （副） 少なくとも / せめて
example: 我每天都盡量至少花三十分鐘學一點中文
english: I try to spend at least 30 minutes learning some Chinese every day.

meaning: バカ・アホ・間抜け
example: 他模仿老師講話的樣子真的超白癡，全班都快笑瘋了
english: His imitation of the teacher's speech was so idiotic, the whole class almost burst out laughing.

meaning: お見舞いに行く
example: 同事住院了，大家決定週末一起去醫院探病
english: A colleague was hospitalized, so we all decided to visit him at the hospital over the weekend.

meaning:
①（学習や試験の）問題・課題・トピック
②（文章・スピーチなどの）タイトル・題名
③（議論や研究の）テーマ
example: 這些題目會覺得很難嗎？
english: Do you find these questions difficult?

meaning: どう言うの？ / 何て言うの？
example: 這個用中文怎麼講？
english: How do you say this in Chinese?

meaning:
（名）反応 / リアクション
（動）反応する / 応じる
example: 擔任客服人員時，對客戶的問題反應要很快
english: When working as a customer service representative, you need to respond to customer questions quickly.

meaning: 助けになる / 役立つ / 有益である
example: 多看台灣的電視節目，對學習台灣華語非常有幫助
english: Watching Taiwanese television programs is very helpful for learning Taiwanese Mandarin.

meaning: びっくりする / 驚く / ギョッとする
example: 我走在路上，突然有人拍我肩膀，真的嚇一跳
english: I was walking down the street when someone suddenly tapped me on the shoulder. I was really startled.

meaning: 感情的価値・情緒的価値・心のつながりの価値
example: 我的女朋友可以給我很多情緒價值
english: My girlfriend provides me with a lot of emotional support.

meaning: シナモン
example: 那家咖啡廳的肉桂捲每天都賣完
english: The cinnamon rolls at that coffee shop sell out every day.

meaning:
（動）なぐさめる / 慰める
（名）慰め
example: 他失戀的時候，朋友們都去安慰他，陪他聊天到半夜
english: When he was heartbroken, his friends all comforted him and stayed up talking to him until midnight.

meaning: 参加者 / 出場者
example: 每位參賽者都有五分鐘的時間來發表自己的作品
english: Each participant has five minutes to present their work.

meaning: みんな～を持っている / 全部～がある
example: 大部分的參賽者都有自己的 YouTube 頻道
english: Most of the contestants have their own YouTube channels.

meaning: カメラのレンズ / 映像の「カット・シーン」
example: 粉絲抱怨說他在節目裡的鏡頭太少了
english: Fans complained that he had too little screen time on the show.

meaning: 採用する / 雇用する
example: 他面試表現很好，公司決定錄用他
english: He performed very well in the interview, and the company decided to hire him.

meaning: 体調が悪い / 気分がすぐれない
example: 今天早上起來覺得身體不舒服，所以請假沒去上班
english: I felt unwell when I woke up this morning, so I took the day off and didn't go to work.

meaning: 話題を作る / 話題を引き起こす
example: 有些網紅為了製造話題，會故意做出誇張的行為
english: Some online celebrities will deliberately do exaggerated things in order to create buzz.

meaning: ファン / 支持者 / フォロワー
example: 她在YouTube上有超過五十萬名粉絲
english: She has over half a million followers on YouTube.

meaning: 偉そうにしている / うぬぼれている
example: 你最近很臭屁喔，拿了第一名就一直炫耀
english: You've been so arrogant lately, always showing off after getting first place.

meaning: 横柄・態度が大きい
example: 那個新人一進公司就很囂張，好像他是老闆一樣
english: That new guy was arrogant from the moment he joined the company, acting like he was the boss.

meaning: 自信が高まっている / 自信に満ちている
example: 比賽結束後，他因為得到第一名，自信高漲
english: After the competition, he was brimming with confidence because he had won first place.

meaning: 自信過剰・うぬぼれ
example: 他太自信過頭了，結果比賽反而失誤很多
english: He was too confident, which resulted in him making many mistakes in the match.

meaning: まったく同じ / そっくり / 瓜二つ
example: 你講的理由跟他說的一模一樣
english: Your reasoning is exactly the same as his.

meaning: 最初のとき・当時（今とは違う過去の時点）
example: 當初我學中文的時候，連拼音都看不懂
english: When I was learning Chinese, I couldn't even understand pinyin.

meaning: 〜さえ / 〜でも
example: 我今天很忙，連休息的時間都沒有
english: I was so busy today, I didn't even have time to rest.

meaning: ぶつかる / 衝突する / 当たる
example: 不好意思，我不小心撞到你了
english: Excuse me, I bumped into you by accident.

meaning: 蹴る / 足で蹴とばす / （ドアなどを）足で押す
example: 長髮男子受不了直接把老太太踹到對向座位
english: The long-haired man couldn't stand it and kicked the old woman into the opposite seat.

meaning: 常習犯 / 再犯者
example: 警方逮捕了一名偷車慣犯
english: Police arrested a habitual car thief

meaning:
（名）自制心・慎み・節度・プライド
（形）控えめな・落ち着いた・慎み深い・上品な
example: 她平常很矜持，不太會在別人面前表達情緒
english: She is usually very reserved and doesn't easily express her emotions in front of others.

meaning: いじめる・からかう・バカにする・弱い人を利用する
example: 他常常被同學欺負
english: He was often bullied by his classmates.

meaning: からかう・いじる・いたずらする・困らせる
example: 他很喜歡捉弄別人，是新同事
english: He enjoys playing pranks on others; he's a new colleague.

meaning: （実際とは違うことを）〜だと思っていた・勘違いしていた
example: 我以為中文很難學，但學了一年之後覺得其實滿有趣的
english: I thought Chinese would be difficult to learn, but after a year of studying it, I found it quite interesting.

meaning: このようなこと・こういう出来事・この手の話
example: 像這樣的事以前也發生過
english: Something like this has happened before.

meaning: シロップ
example: 這家咖啡店的拿鐵上面會加一點香草糖漿，味道很香
english: This coffee shop adds a touch of vanilla syrup to their lattes, which makes them very fragrant.

meaning: 私は子どもたちに言った / 話した
example: 我跟孩子們說不能吵架
english: I told the children they couldn't fight.

meaning: 争い・もめごと・トラブル・いざこざ
example: 這兩家公司因為合約問題發生糾紛
english: The two companies had a dispute over a contract.

meaning:
（動）誤解する　
（名）誤解
example: 他常常說話太直接，別人容易誤會他在生氣或看不起人
english: He often speaks too bluntly, which can easily lead others to misunderstand him as being angry or looking down on someone.

meaning: ～が得意でない / ～に慣れていない / 不得手である
example: 我一直都不擅長表達自己的情感，所以很少跟人分享心事
english: I've never been good at expressing my feelings, so I rarely share my innermost thoughts with others.

meaning: 嘘をつく
example: 小孩子有時候會因為害怕被罵而說謊
english: Children sometimes lie because they are afraid of being scolded.

meaning:
①（方向が）逆の / 反対方向の
②（行動・思考が）逆行する / 反対の流れに進む
example: 逆向行駛不只違法，也可能導致嚴重的交通事故，應該特別小心
english: Driving against the flow of traffic is not only illegal, but can also lead to serious traffic accidents, so you should be especially careful.

meaning: ブレーキをかける / ブレーキ
example: 我的爸爸最近反應變慢了，煞車總是慢一點才踩下去
english: My dad's reaction time has slowed down lately; he's always a little slow to press the brake pedal.

meaning:
（動） 運転する / 操縦する
（名） 運転 / 操縦 / 運転者
example: 隨著人口老化，高齡駕駛的比例也逐年增加
english: As the population ages, the proportion of elderly drivers is increasing year by year.

meaning: 年々 / 毎年徐々に
example: 雖然營收逐年增加，但成本也在上升，利潤並沒有明顯成長
english: Although revenue has increased year by year, costs have also risen, and profits have not grown significantly.

meaning: 迷惑をかける / 困らせる / ご迷惑をおかけする
example: 臺灣人覺得大部分的日本人都不想造成別人困擾
english: Taiwanese people believe that most Japanese people don't want to cause trouble for others.

meaning: ポスター
example: 我在車站看到一張關於交通禮儀的海報
english: I saw a poster about traffic etiquette at the train station.

meaning:
① 見る目 / 観察力
② 判断力 / センス（特に選択や評価において）
③ 目の視線（文脈によって）
example: 如果一直活在別人的眼光裡，永遠無法真正快樂
english: You can never be truly happy if you always live in the eyes of others.

meaning: 〜できるかどうかわからない
example: 我想問一下，不知道能不能把報告延期到下週一？
english: I'd like to ask if it's possible to postpone the report until next Monday?

meaning: 一度だけ行ったことがある / 一回しか行ったことがない
example: 他說他只去過一次日本，但對那裡的印象非常深
english: He said he had only been to Japan once, but it left a very deep impression on him.

meaning:
（名）チェーン / 系列 / つながり（例：連鎖店＝チェーン店）
（動）連鎖する / 連動する / 次々に起こる（例：引發連鎖反應＝連鎖反応を引き起こす）
example: 這家連鎖咖啡店在全台都有分店，服務品質很一致
english: This chain coffee shop has branches all over Taiwan, and the service quality is consistent.

meaning:
（動）くじを引く / 抽選する
（名）抽選イベント / プレゼントキャンペーン
example: 我們公司每年尾牙都會舉辦抽獎活動，獎品超豐富，大家都很期待
english: Our company holds a lucky draw at our annual year-end party, with amazing prizes; everyone looks forward to it!

meaning: くじを引く / 抽選する
example: 那場演唱會太熱門了，買票要先參加抽籤才能有機會
english: That concert was so popular that you had to enter a lottery to get tickets.

meaning: 電子レンジ
example: 在便利商店買的便當可以請店員幫忙用微波爐加熱
english: You can ask the store clerk to microwave the bento box you bought at the convenience store.

meaning: 売ってしまう / 売り払う / 売却する
example: 如果你不想用也可以賣掉
english: You can sell it if you don't want to use it anymore.

meaning:
（形）情熱的である・熱心である / 親しみやすい
（名）情熱・熱意・温かい心
example: 老師教學非常有熱情，學生們都受到他的影響
english: The teacher is very enthusiastic about teaching, and the students are all influenced by him.

meaning: にぎやか / 活気がある / 盛り上がっている
example: 台灣的尾牙跟日本比起來真的很熱鬧又花俏
english: Taiwan's year-end parties are much more lively and elaborate than those in Japan.

meaning: 自分にご褒美をあげる / 自分をねぎらう
example: 我這個月工作很努力，所以想買個新包包獎勵自己
english: I worked really hard this month, so I want to treat myself to a new bag.

meaning: 買い物欲 / ショッピング欲 / 物欲
example: 週年慶快到了，很多人開始無法控制購物慾
english: With the anniversary sale approaching, many people are finding it hard to control their shopping urges.

meaning: 年齢が上がる / 年を重ねる
example: 隨著年齡增長，我開始更加重視健康和生活品質
english: As I get older, I've started to pay more attention to health and quality of life.

meaning: 健康診断 / 健康チェック
example: 公司每年都會安排員工做一次全面的健康檢查
english: The company arranges for employees to undergo a comprehensive health check-up every year.

meaning: 今のところ / 現在までのところ
example: 目前為止，一切都還算順利
english: So far, everything has gone smoothly.

meaning: 何度も / 何回も / 何度か / 何回か
example: 我試著戒菸好幾次了，每次都撐不到一個星期
english: I've tried to quit smoking several times, but I can never last more than a week.

meaning: 〜まで持たない / 〜まで耐えられない / 〜まで続かない
example: 這份工作太累了，我撐不到一個月就想離職了
english: This job is too tiring; I want to quit before I can even last a month.

meaning:
（動）申請する / 申し込む
（名）申請
example: 申請簽證時需要提供財力證明和住宿資料
english: You need to provide proof of financial resources and accommodation information when applying for a visa.

meaning: 入国する
example: 因為文件不齊全，他在入境時被要求進一步說明
english: He was asked to provide further explanation upon entry because his documents were incomplete.

meaning: 不完全である / そろっていない / 欠けている
example: 他提供的證明文件不齊全，需要補交戶口名簿的影本
english: The supporting documents he provided were incomplete; he needs to submit a copy of the household registration booklet.

meaning: 没収する / 取り上げる
example: 在臺灣，電子煙是違禁品，帶入境會被沒收
english: In Taiwan, e-cigarettes are prohibited and will be confiscated if brought into the country.

meaning: 不利な点 / 害
example: 吸煙對健康有很多壞處
english: Smoking has many harmful effects on health.

meaning: 喫煙する（ややフォーマル / 文書や標識で使われる）
example: 這裡禁止吸菸，違者將被罰款
english: Smoking is prohibited here; violators will be fined.

meaning: タバコを吸う（口語・会話でよく使われる）
example: 我爸每天抽兩包菸，家裡都是煙味
english: My dad smokes two packs of cigarettes a day, and the house always smells of smoke.

meaning: 禁煙する / タバコをやめる
example: 戒菸對很多人來說是一個很大的挑戰，需要強大的意志力
english: Quitting smoking is a big challenge for many people and requires strong willpower.

meaning: 喫煙室 / スモーキングルーム
example: 機場裡設有吸菸室，方便旅客在登機前抽菸
english: The airport has smoking rooms for passengers to smoke before boarding.

meaning: 肝臓
example: 保持良好的飲食習慣，有助於保護肝臟健康
english: Maintaining good eating habits helps protect liver health.

meaning: 〜に役立つ / 〜を助ける / 〜に貢献する
example: 多運動有助於提升免疫力，減少生病的機會
english: Regular exercise helps boost immunity and reduce the chances of getting sick.

meaning:
（名）長寿 / 長生き
（形）寿命が長い
example: 他九十多歲了，還能自己煮飯 / 運動，真是個長壽的典範
english: He's over ninety years old and can still cook for himself and exercise; he's truly a model of longevity.

meaning: 世界一周する / 世界を旅する
example: 我一直有個夢想，就是能有一天環遊世界，體驗不同的文化與生活方式
english: I've always had a dream: to one day travel around the world and experience different cultures and lifestyles.

meaning: クルーズ船 / 豪華客船
example: 我夢想搭乘豪華遊輪環遊世界，享受慢節奏的旅程與美食
english: I dream of traveling around the world on a luxury cruise ship, enjoying a slow-paced journey and delicious food.

meaning: 楽しむ / 享受する
example: 因為看日本小說的時候要一直查單字，所以會花很多時間，沒辦法好好享受
english: Because I have to constantly look up words when reading Japanese novels, it takes a lot of time, and I can't really enjoy it.

meaning: 耐える / 受け入れる / 受け止める / （重荷を）背負う
example: 每個人能承受的壓力不同，不需要拿別人的標準來要求自己
english: Everyone has a different tolerance for pressure; there's no need to hold yourself to other people's standards.

meaning: 子を育てて老後に備える / 子は老後の支えになる
example: 在傳統觀念裡，養兒防老是一種責任與保障，但現代人未必這麼想
english: In traditional thinking, raising children to provide for one's old age is a responsibility and a guarantee, but modern people may not think that way.

meaning: 資産運用 / お金の管理 / ファイナンス管理 / 財テク
example: 我最近加入了一個有投資理財課程的團體，大家會一起討論股票和基金
english: I recently joined a group that offers investment and financial management courses, where we discuss stocks and funds together.

meaning: 思いつかない / 予想できない / 想像できない
example: 他竟然辭掉了工作，我完全想不到這種結果
english: He actually quit his job; I never expected this outcome.

meaning: 思い出せない（記憶が出てこない）
example: 我記得你跟我說過這件事，但細節我真的想不起來了
english: I remember you told me about this, but I really can't recall the details.

meaning: なんと / まさか / 意外にも
example: 他中文學得不久，竟然能流利地跟老師對話
english: Despite having only studied Chinese for a short time, he was able to converse fluently with his teacher.

meaning: 戦いの場面 / バトルシーン
example: 在看4DX電影的時候，他們的打鬥場景變得非常真實
english: When watching 4DX movies, their fight scenes become incredibly realistic.

meaning: 言い出しにくい / 口にしづらい / 恥ずかしくて言えない
example: 我有件私事想請你幫忙，但又覺得難以啟齒，怕你會覺得困擾
english: I have a personal matter I'd like to ask for your help with, but I'm finding it difficult to bring it up, and I'm afraid it might bother you.

meaning: Aではなく / Bである
example: 今天的問題不是設備壞了，而是我們操作錯誤
english: The problem today isn't that the equipment is broken, but that we made a mistake in operating it.

meaning: 頼る / 近づく / 〜によって / 〜のおかげで
example: 她的成功不是靠運氣，而是靠長期的努力與堅持
english: Her success was not due to luck, but to long-term hard work and perseverance.

meaning: 真実である / 本当である
example: 只有真實的朋友才會在困難時支持你
english: Only true friends will support you in times of difficulty.

meaning: 衝撃を受ける / 揺り動かす / 震撼する
example: 我第一次聽她唱歌時，真的被她的聲音震撼到了
english: The first time I heard her sing, I was truly amazed by her voice.

meaning: アクション映画
example: 這部動作片的打鬥場景設計得非常精彩
english: The fight scenes in this action movie are very well designed.

meaning: 刺激する
example: 他說的話讓我覺得很受刺激，所以更加努力
english: What he said really motivated me, so I worked even harder.

meaning: （競争が激しくて）手に入らない / 買いそびれる / 取れない
example: 我今天早上六點就起來搶票，結果還是搶不到
english: I got up at six o'clock this morning to try and buy tickets, but I still couldn't get any.

meaning: 買うのがとても難しい
example: 這款限量的球鞋真的很難買得到，一開賣就秒殺
english: These limited-edition sneakers are incredibly hard to get; they sold out instantly as soon as they went on sale.

meaning: 簡単には買えない
example: 這種食材在台灣不容易買到
english: This ingredient is not easy to find in Taiwan.

meaning: 発売する / 売り出す
example: 由於預購數量超過預期，發售當天可能會出現缺貨情況
english: Due to pre-orders exceeding expectations, stock shortages may occur on the release day.

meaning: 〜に（おいて）〜する予定だ / 〜で〜が行われる（未来・予定）
example: 本活動將於明天下午截止報名
english: Registration for this event will close tomorrow afternoon.

meaning: （非公式・違法な）転売屋 / ダフ屋
example: 購票系統新增了驗證機制，就是為了防止黃牛行為
english: The ticketing system has added a verification mechanism to prevent scalping.

meaning: 転売する
example: 他把限量鞋轉賣給其他人賺錢
english: He resold the limited-edition shoes to others to make money.

meaning:
（動）制限する / 制約する
（名）制限 / 制約
example: 這部電影沒有年齡限制，任何人都可以看
english: This movie has no age limit and can be watched by anyone.

meaning: プレゼント / 無料の景品 / おまけ
example: 購買滿千元即送精美贈品
english: Purchase over 1000 yuan and receive a beautiful gift.

meaning: 行きすぎる / やりすぎ / ひどすぎる / 度が過ぎる
example: 他提的條件太過分了，我們根本無法接受
english: His demands were outrageous; we simply could not accept them.

meaning: アルバム（主に音楽）
example: 這張專輯在數位平台上架不到一天就衝上排行榜第一名
english: This album climbed to number one on digital charts in less than a day after being released.

meaning: 助ける
example: 我們應該互相幫助，共同進步
english: We should help each other and make progress together.

meaning: とても役に立つ / とても助かる / とても勉強になる
example: 你剛才說的建議對我來說真的很有幫助
english: Your suggestion was really helpful to me.

meaning: 勝ち取る / 獲得するために努力する / 手に入れるように頑張る
example: 他正在積極爭取升遷的機會，每天都加班到很晚
english: He is actively seeking a promotion opportunity and works overtime until very late every day.

meaning: 飛行機酔いする
example: 如果你容易暈機，建議你起飛前先吃暈機藥
english: If you are prone to airsickness, it is recommended that you take airsickness medication before takeoff.

meaning: スケベな男性 / 痴漢 / 性的な目的で不適切な行動をする男性（性的にいやらしい男）
example: 昨天搭捷運的時候，有個色狼故意靠近我，真的很噁心
english: Yesterday, while I was on the subway, a pervert deliberately approached me. It was really disgusting.

meaning: ストロー
example: 現在越來越多店家不主動提供塑膠吸管，鼓勵大家自備環保吸管
english: More and more shops are no longer providing plastic straws, encouraging people to bring their own eco-friendly straws.

meaning:
（名）習慣 / 慣れ
（動）慣れる / なじむ
example: 你有吃早餐的習慣嗎？
english: Do you have the habit of eating breakfast?

meaning: ほとんど毎日
example: 我幾乎每天都不吃早餐
english: I almost never eat breakfast.

meaning: フライパン
example: 這個平底鍋不沾效果很好，煎魚的時候完全不會黏鍋
english: This non-stick frying pan works great; fish doesn't stick at all when frying.

meaning: その方が早くて便利です / そうした方が早くて便利です
example: 點外送雖然多花一點錢，但這樣比較快又方便，不用自己煮
english: Ordering takeout costs a little more, but it's faster and more convenient, and you don't have to cook yourself.

meaning: ソーセージ
example: 每次逛夜市，我都會買一根台灣香腸來配蒜頭吃
english: Every time I go to the night market, I buy a Taiwanese sausage to eat with garlic.

meaning: 子どもたちのために朝ごはんを作る
example: 媽媽每天早上六點起床做早餐給孩子們吃
english: Mom gets up at six o'clock every morning to make breakfast for the children.

meaning: 独身であること / 恋人がいないこと / 未婚
example: 我已經單身三年了，習慣一個人的生活了
english: I've been single for three years and I'm used to living alone.

meaning: 挑発する / けしかける / 相手をわざと怒らせる
example: 你每次都故意講這些話，是想挑釁我嗎？
english: Do you deliberately say these things every time to provoke me?

meaning: レシピ / 料理の作り方
example: 我在網路上找到一個簡單的鬆餅食譜，週末想試做看看
english: I found a simple pancake recipe online and I'd like to try making it this weekend.

meaning: 外で食べる方が安いです
example: 有時候在外面吃飯真的比較便宜，還不用自己煮和洗碗
english: Eating out is sometimes really cheaper, and you don't have to cook or wash dishes yourself.

meaning: 割に合う / コスパがいい / お得だ
example: 這家餐廳的午餐套餐只要一百多塊，真的很划算
english: The lunch set meal at this restaurant is only a little over 100 yuan, which is a really good deal.

meaning: 処理済みの物 / 準備済みの物 / 加工済みの物
example: 我喜歡買處理好的東西，像是切好的水果和去骨雞腿肉
english: I like to buy pre-processed items, like cut fruit and boneless chicken thighs.

meaning: コストコ
example: 我每個月都會去好市多補貨，因為那裡的東西又多又便宜
english: I go to Costco every month to restock because they have a wide variety of products at low prices.

meaning: 冷凍食品
example: 我家冰箱裡有很多冷凍食品，都是忙碌時吃的方便選擇
english: My refrigerator is full of frozen food, which are convenient choices for when I'm busy.

meaning: イライラしないで
example: 遇到困難時，最重要的是保持冷靜，不要煩躁
english: When faced with difficulties, the most important thing is to stay calm and not get agitated.

meaning: トイレットペーパー
example: 去超市買東西時，別忘了順便補充衛生紙喔
english: When you go to the supermarket, don't forget to stock up on toilet paper!

meaning: 感情 / 情緒 / 気分
example: 情緒穩定的人比較容易面對困難和壓力
english: People with stable emotions are more likely to cope with difficulties and stress.

meaning: 期限切れになる / 有効期限が過ぎる
example: 冰箱裡的牛奶已經過期三天了，還是不要喝比較好
english: The milk in the refrigerator expired three days ago, so it's best not to drink it.

meaning: 消耗品
example: 為了省錢，我會趁打折時大量囤積常用的消耗品
english: To save money, I stock up on frequently used consumables when they're on sale.

meaning: 大量に買いだめする / 大量に備蓄する
example: 因為颱風快來了，大家到超市大量囤積泡麵和瓶裝水
english: Because a typhoon is approaching, people are stocking up on instant noodles and bottled water at supermarkets.

meaning: 毎日必ず使う / 毎日使わないといけない
example: 這瓶洗面乳是我每天都要用的，洗完臉覺得很清爽
english: This facial cleanser is something I use every day; it leaves my face feeling very refreshed after washing.

meaning: ポテトチップス
example: 看電影的時候，最適合配上一包香脆的洋芋片和一瓶可樂
english: When watching a movie, the best accompaniment is a bag of crispy potato chips and a bottle of cola.

meaning:
（動）総合する / まとめる
（形）総合的な / 複合的な
（名）総合 / ミックス / バラエティ番組
example: 綜合考慮時間 / 預算和人力後，我們決定延期活動
english: After taking into account time, budget, and manpower, we have decided to postpone the event.

meaning:
（動）組み合わせる / 構成する
（名）組み合わせ / 構成
example: 你可以自由組合不同的家具，打造專屬風格的客廳
english: You can freely combine different furniture pieces to create a living room with your own unique style.

meaning: 洗濯物を干す / 衣服を日に当てる
example: 中秋節如果曬衣服，衣服上可能會有烤肉味喔！
english: If you hang your clothes out to dry during the Mid-Autumn Festival, they might smell like barbecue!

meaning:
① 片付ける / 整理する
②（物を）まとめる / 荷造りする
example: 請收拾一下你的房間，客人快到了
english: Please tidy up your room, the guests are arriving soon.

meaning: なんで〜しなかったの？ / どうして〜がないの？
example: 你不是說已經準備好了嗎？怎麼沒有帶資料過來？
english: Didn't you say you were ready? Why didn't you bring any documents?

meaning: あなたが〜って言ってたんじゃないの？
example: 你不是說你今天要來嗎？
english: Didn't you say you were coming today?

meaning:
① 距離を縮める
② 心の距離・関係を近づける
③（カメラやズームなどで）画面を近づける
example: 一起吃飯喝酒，很容易拉近彼此的關係
english: Eating and drinking together can easily bring people closer.

meaning: むしろ / かえって（逆の結果や意外なことを言うとき）
example: 我在台灣過得很自在，反而在日本比較辛苦
english: I'm very comfortable in Taiwan, but it's much harder in Japan.

meaning: 気を遣う / 配慮する / 考慮する / 遠慮する
example: 你不需要太顧慮我的想法，就照你的意思去做吧
english: You don't need to worry too much about my thoughts, just do as you wish.

meaning: くやしい / 納得できない / あきらめきれない
example: 我去參加國慶活動，結果人太多了，想看的東西都沒看到，真的有點不甘心
english: I went to participate in the National Day activities, but there were so many people that I didn't see anything I wanted to see. I'm really a bit disappointed.

meaning:
（動）推測する
（名）推測
example: 根據他的表情，我們可以推測他應該已經知道這件事了
english: Based on his expression, we can infer that he probably already knew about this.

meaning: いったいいつになったら
example: 到底什麼時候才能回到平靜的生活？
english: When will we finally be able to return to a peaceful life?

meaning: 単語を覚える / 暗記する
example: 老師建議我們用例句來背單字，這樣比較容易記住
english: The teacher suggested that we memorize words by using example sentences, as this makes them easier to remember.

meaning: ウエットテイッシュ
example: 帶小孩出門時，我總是準備幾包濕紙巾，以備不時之需
english: When I take my child out, I always prepare a few packs of wet wipes, just in case.

meaning: 〜に備えて / 〜に備えるために
example: 我每天都會帶雨傘，以備突然下雨的情況發生
english: I carry an umbrella every day in case of sudden rain.

meaning: ありえない！ / ひどすぎる！ / マジで！？ / それはないでしょ
example: 公司竟然要求我們週末也要加班，太扯了吧！
english: The company is actually requiring us to work overtime on weekends! That's outrageous!

meaning: 家を借りる / 部屋を借りる
example: 租屋資訊可以在591網站找到
english: Rental information can be found on the 591 website.

meaning: 真面目な / まじめに取り組む / 丁寧な / 本気の / 誠実な
example: 老師誇獎他是一個認真又努力的學生
english: The teacher praised him as a serious and hardworking student.

meaning: つい / うっかり / 不注意で / 思わず
example: 在星巴克喝咖啡的時候，我不小心聽到旁邊的人在談感情的事
english: While having coffee at Starbucks, I overheard the people next to me talking about relationships.

meaning: ～の前 / 〜より前に
example: 我們之前見過一次面，你還記得嗎？
english: We met once before, do you remember?

meaning: 昔 / かつて
example: 我以前住在台中，那裡的生活節奏比較慢
english: I used to live in Taichung, where the pace of life is slower.

meaning: 親戚
example: 在婚禮上，我見到了很多多年未見的親戚
english: At the wedding, I saw many relatives I hadn't seen for many years.

meaning: ベトナムのフォー（米粉を使った麺料理）
example: 除了越南河粉，他們家的炸春捲和涼拌青木瓜也很好吃
english: Besides Vietnamese pho, their fried spring rolls and chilled green papaya salad are also delicious.

meaning: 正社員 / 正規職 / フルタイムの職
example: 他白天做正職，晚上還去補習班兼差，生活非常忙碌
english: He has a full-time job during the day and also works part-time at a tutoring center at night, leading a very busy life.

meaning: 契約社員 / 契約雇用 / 任期付きの雇用
example: 我目前是政府機關的約聘人員，每年要重新簽約一次
english: I am currently a contract employee of a government agency, and I need to renew my contract every year.

meaning: パートタイム / 副業
example: 他在公司是正職員工，晚上兼職當補習班老師
english: He is a full-time employee at the company and works part-time as a tutor in the evenings.

meaning: 副業 / 掛け持ちの仕事
example: 最近想兼差開Uber賺點零用錢，聽說不錯
english: I'm thinking of taking on an Uber job to earn some extra pocket money; I've heard it's a good option.

meaning: アルバイトをする
example: 她為了存錢去旅行，週末會去咖啡廳打工
english: She works part-time at a coffee shop on weekends to save money for her trip.

meaning:
①時間を計る / 測る
②時間制の（労働形態） / ＝時給制の
example: 這份工作是計時的，每小時薪水是180元
english: This job is hourly, and the hourly wage is 180 yuan.

meaning: 訪問する / お邪魔する / 表敬訪問する
example: 我剛剛去拜訪了一間新的公司，談合作的可能性
english: I just visited a new company to discuss the possibility of cooperation.

meaning: あまりチャンスがない / あまり機会がない
example: 因為平時工作太忙，我不太有機會跟朋友見面
english: Because I'm usually too busy with work, I don't have many opportunities to meet with my friends.

meaning: 今 / 少し緊張しています
example: 等一下要面試了，我現在有一點緊張
english: I'm having an interview soon, and I'm a little nervous.

meaning: ネクタイ
example: 今天面試很重要，我特地挑了一條紅色的領帶
english: Today's interview is very important, so I specifically chose a red tie.

meaning: スーツ
example: 雖然現在流行休閒風，他上班還是每天穿西裝
english: Although casual style is popular now, he still wears a suit to work every day.

meaning: シャツ（Yシャツ / ワイシャツ / ドレスシャツ）
example: 公司規定男生每天上班都要穿襯衫，不可以穿T恤
english: Company policy requires male employees to wear shirts to work every day; T-shirts are not allowed.

meaning: 軽くて便利 / 動きやすい / 気軽な服装
example: 他平常上班喜歡穿輕便的襯衫和休閒褲，不喜歡西裝
english: He usually prefers to wear casual shirts and trousers to work, and doesn't like suits.

meaning:
（名）翻訳 / 通訳 / 翻訳者
（動）翻訳する / 通訳する
example: 請你把這段文章翻譯成中文，我想了解內容
english: Please translate this passage into Chinese; I want to understand its content.

meaning: Aのようにできる（能力）
example: 我沒想到你中文進步這麼快，已經可以像台灣人一樣聊天了
english: I didn't expect your Chinese to improve so quickly; you can already chat like a Taiwanese person.

meaning:
（動）誤解する / 思い違いをする
（名）誤解 / 勘違い / 思い違い
example: 我講得比較直接，怕有誤會，請你不要誤會我的意思
english: I'm being a bit direct, and I'm afraid there might be some misunderstanding. Please don't misunderstand me.

meaning: 試したことがある
example: 很多人推薦這款APP，我目前還沒試過，想找時間來試試
english: Many people recommend this app, but I haven't tried it yet. I'd like to try it sometime.

meaning: 説明する
example: 我不太能用中文說明自己公司
english: I'm not very good at explaining my company in Chinese.

meaning: あまり〜できない / 〜するのが少し難しい
example: 我不太能用中文表達複雜的想法，但簡單的沒問題
english: I'm not very good at expressing complex ideas in Chinese, but simple ones are no problem.

meaning: 人であふれている / 大混雑している
example: 音樂祭總是人山人海，我常常找不到朋友
english: Music festivals are always packed with people, and I often can't find my friends.

meaning: 完成した製品 / 完成品（製造・創作などの最終成果）
example:
A：你設計的包包做出來了嗎？
B：對啊，昨天剛做好成品，給你看看！
english:
A: Have you finished making the bag you designed?

B: Yes, I just finished it yesterday. Let me show you!

meaning:
（名）実体 / 物理的な存
（形）リアルなもの
example: 現在很多人習慣網購，不常去實體店面了
english: Many people are now used to online shopping and rarely go to physical stores anymore.

meaning: 業界 / 業種
example: 他在廣告業界工作已經十年了，對市場非常了解
english: He has worked in the advertising industry for ten years and has a deep understanding of the market.

meaning: 集中力を発揮している時間 / 集中できている時間帯
example: 學生應該在集中注意力的時間複習，效果會比較好
english: Students will be more effective when they review during periods of focused attention.

meaning: 描写する / 詳しく述べる / 描く（状況・様子・感情などを言葉で伝える）
example: 這份報告詳細描述了消費者的購物行為和心理變化
english: This report details changes in consumer shopping behavior and psychology.

meaning: 気が散る / 集中できない / 注意がそれる
example: 我想專心準備簡報，但手機一直跳通知，讓我不斷分心
english: I wanted to focus on preparing my presentation, but my phone kept popping up notifications, constantly distracting me.

meaning: 図鑑
example: 我的孩子很喜歡看動物圖鑑，常常一看就看好幾個小時。
english: My child loves looking at animal picture books and often spends hours at a time looking at them.

meaning: 知識
example: 透過閱讀圖鑑，孩子可以學到很多自然科學的知識
english: Children can learn a lot about natural science by reading picture books.

meaning: 好奇心
example: 我因為對日文有好奇心，就開始自學平假名和片假名
english: Because of my curiosity about Japanese, I started to teach myself hiragana and katakana.

meaning: 賞状（表彰状）
example: 我小學的時候因為成績好，得過很多張獎狀
english: I received many certificates of merit when I was in elementary school because of my good grades.

meaning:
（動）挫折する
（名）挫折
example: 他在創業初期經歷了許多挫折
english: He experienced many setbacks in the early stages of his business.

meaning: 仕事が速くて丁寧だ / 迅速かつ的確に物事をこなす / 手際よく完璧にやる
example: 這家店的服務生做事做得又快又好，效率很高
english: The staff at this restaurant are fast, efficient, and do their jobs well.

meaning: たぶん～だと思うよ / ～じゃないかな
example: 他今天沒來，應該是生病了吧，昨天看起來就不太舒服
english: He didn't come today; he must be sick. He didn't look well yesterday.

meaning: 合格する（試験や成績が基準に達する）
example: 這次考試的題目很簡單，我應該是能及格吧
english: The exam was very easy; I think I'll pass.

meaning: 人を～させる / ～という気持ちにさせる
example: 他的中文說得像母語一樣流利，令人羨慕又佩服
english: His Chinese is as fluent as a native speaker's, which is both enviable and admirable.

meaning:
（名）尊敬 / 敬意
（動）敬う / 尊敬する
example: 在臺灣文化裡，尊敬長輩是一種很重要的價值觀
english: In Taiwanese culture, respecting elders is a very important value.

meaning: 感心する・すごいと思う・敬服する
example: 我真的很佩服你每天早上五點起床運動
english: I really admire you for getting up at five every morning to exercise.

meaning:
（動）まじめに努力する
（形）勉強熱心な / 頑張り屋
example: 他不用特別用功就可以考得很好
english: He can get good grades without studying particularly hard.

meaning: 毎日必ず〜する / 毎日〜することになっている
example: 孩子們每天都會主動把作業做完
english: The children will complete their homework on their own initiative every day.

meaning: ほとんど全部〜 / ほぼ全員が〜
example: 我幾乎都在 UNIQLO 買他們的衣服
english: I buy almost all of UNIQLO's clothes.

meaning: ほめる / 称賛する
example: 她昨天在公司受到老闆的誇獎，心情特別好
english: She was praised by her boss at work yesterday and was in a particularly good mood.

meaning: …に長じている / …に堪能である / …に優れている
example: 她不擅長表達自己的感情
english: She is not good at expressing her feelings.

meaning:
（動）つなぐ / 結びつける
（名）リンク
example: 請點擊下方的連結，填寫報名表格，報名截止日是下週五
english: Please click the link below to fill out the registration form. The registration deadline is next Friday.

meaning: だいたい同じ / ほとんど一緒 / 似たようなもの
example: 我們的想法差不多一樣，所以合作起來很順利
english: We had similar ideas, so the collaboration went smoothly.

meaning: 勉強する（特にテストや授業のため）
example: 他每天念書念到半夜，真的很用功
english: He studied until midnight every day; he was really diligent.

meaning: 学ぶ / 学習する
example: 我正在學習中文，覺得很有趣
english: I'm learning Chinese and I find it very interesting.

meaning: 勉強する / 本を読む
example: 我在讀書，準備明天的考試
english: I'm studying, preparing for tomorrow's exam.

meaning: 本を見る / 本を読む
example: 我在看書，這本小說很好看
english: I'm reading a book; this novel is very good.

meaning: 言い間違える / 誤って言う / 言葉を間違える
example: 上課的時候我把老師的名字說錯了，好丟臉…
english: I mispronounced the teacher's name during class, how embarrassing...

meaning:
（動）遺伝する
（名）遺伝
example: 他數學特別好，應該是遺傳爸爸的理工頭腦
english: He's exceptionally good at math; he probably inherited his father's STEM mind.

meaning: 子ども時代 / 幼少期 / 童年時代
example: 雖然我們家不富有，但我的童年充滿愛與溫暖
english: Although my family wasn't wealthy, my childhood was filled with love and warmth.

meaning: 年月 / 時期 / 暮らし / 生活
example: 時光過得很快，畢業已經十年了
english: Time flies, it's been ten years since graduation.

meaning: 直接進級する / 飛び級のように試験なしで昇進・進学する
example: 我們學校是直升制度，只要成績達標就可以直升高中部，不需要參加考試
english: Our school has a direct admission system; as long as your grades meet the requirements, you can directly enter the high school without taking an exam.

meaning: 転校する
example: 轉學後，他很快就交到新朋友
english: After transferring schools, he quickly made new friends.

meaning: 大学院を卒業する（修士または博士を修了する）
example: 很多公司比較喜歡錄用研究所畢業的人
english: Many companies prefer to hire people who have graduated from graduate school.

meaning: 招待する / 誘う
example: 謝謝你的邀請，我一定會參加
english: Thank you for your invitation, I will definitely participate.

meaning: 障害 / 妨げ / ハードル / 苦手意識
example: 我有整理跟丟東西的障礙
english: I have trouble organizing lost items.

meaning: 〜に変える / 〜に改める
example: 改成下週一可以嗎？
english: Can we change it to next Monday?

meaning: 経済
example: 最近的經濟狀況非常不穩定
english: The recent economic situation is very unstable.

meaning: 社会人になる / 社会に出る
example: 很多人出社會後才發現，學校學的東西不一定用得上
english: Many people only realize after entering the workforce that what they learned in school may not be applicable.

meaning: （副） 改めて / 再び / もう一度
example: 看來我們要重新安排計劃了
english: It seems we need to rearrange our plans.

meaning: 連休
example: 你的連假過的好嗎？
english: How was your holiday?

meaning: 外に出てご飯を食べる / 外食する
example: 今天是她生日，我們打算帶她去高級餐廳出去吃
english: Today is her birthday, and we plan to take her out to a fancy restaurant.

meaning: 戦闘機
example: 這架最新型的戰鬥機配備了先進的雷達系統
english: This latest fighter jet is equipped with an advanced radar system.

meaning: 視覚的に「見えない」（物理的・状況的に）
example: 雨太大，窗外的風景完全看不到
english: The rain was so heavy that the view outside the window was completely obscured.

meaning: 「見なかった」「目に入らなかった」「気づかなかった」（事実として）
example: 他進來的時候我沒看到他
english: I didn't see him when he came in.

meaning: ハンバーグステーキ（日本の「ハンバーグ」に近い料理）
example: 今天午餐我點了照燒口味的漢堡排套餐，味道不錯
english: For lunch today, I ordered a teriyaki burger steak set meal, and it tasted pretty good.

meaning: 外はカリッと / 中はやわらかくてジューシー
example: 我媽媽做的漢堡排外酥內嫩，味道比餐廳的還要好吃
english: My mom makes hamburgers that are crispy on the outside and tender on the inside; they taste even better than those in restaurants.

meaning:
（動）仮定する
（名）仮定・仮説
example: 假設明天下雨，我們的野餐計畫就只能取消了
english: If it rains tomorrow, our picnic plan will have to be canceled.

meaning: 気づかないうちに / 知らず知らずに
example: 就是，我也會不知不覺說
english: Yes, I sometimes say things without even realizing it.

meaning: カプセルトイ / ガチャガチャ
example: 我的孩子超喜歡玩扭蛋，每次看到都想轉一次
english: My child loves playing with gashapon toys; he wants to spin one every time he sees them.

meaning: マグロ
example: 我最愛吃鮪魚壽司，在迴轉壽司店看到剛上盤的時候馬上就拿
english: My favorite food is tuna sushi. I grab it as soon as I see it served at a conveyor belt sushi restaurant.

meaning: 鮭
example: 早餐吃烤鮭魚配白飯，是我最喜歡的日式組合
english: Grilled salmon with white rice for breakfast is my favorite Japanese combination.

meaning: 茶碗蒸し
example: 我每次去日本料理店都會點一份茶碗蒸，口感滑嫩超好吃
english: I always order chawanmushi (steamed egg custard) whenever I go to a Japanese restaurant; it's so smooth and delicious!

meaning: 受け入れる / 受け取る / 承諾する / 認める
example: 孩子不能接受納豆的味道
english: Children cannot accept the taste of natto

meaning: 回転盤 / ルーレット盤 / ターンテーブル
example: 你們喜歡拿轉盤上的壽司，還是喜歡用點的？
english: Do you prefer to take sushi from the conveyor belt or order it directly?

meaning: 値段の範囲・価格帯
example: 現在的智慧型手機價錢的範圍很廣
english: The price range for smartphones is now very wide.

meaning:
①（言葉にして）うまく言えない / 説明できない
②（思い出したいけど）出てこない
③（口に出すのがつらくて）言えない
example: 我聽得懂，但要我自己說就說不出來
english: I can understand it, but I can't express it myself.

meaning: いつ頃までに
example: 大概要在什麼時候以前搬家？
english: Around what time should we move?

meaning: なかなか見つからない / あまり見つからない
example: 房東已經決定要賣了房子，但還找不太到想買的人
english: The landlord has decided to sell the house, but hasn't found a buyer yet.

meaning:
（名）仲介
（動）仲立ちすること
example: 房屋仲介介紹了好幾個地點不錯的房子
english: The real estate agent introduced several houses in good locations.

meaning: 住宅価格 / 不動産価格
example: 最近台北市的房價又漲了，年輕人越來越難買得起房子
english: Recently, housing prices in Taipei have risen again, making it increasingly difficult for young people to afford homes.

meaning: 家賃 / 住宅・部屋の賃料
example: 這間套房雖然房租便宜，但房間太小，我住得不太舒服
english: Although the suite was cheap, the room was too small and I wasn't very comfortable.

meaning: （家屋・物品の）賃貸料
example: 我們公司每月的辦公室租金很高，壓力不小
english: Our company's monthly office rent is very high, which puts a lot of pressure on us.

meaning: 家主 / 大家
example: 房東說下個月房租要調漲五百元，我還在考慮要不要續租
english: The landlord said the rent will increase by 500 yuan next month, and I'm still considering whether to renew the lease.

meaning: 住宅ローン / 住宅ローン返済
example: 每個月光是繳房貸就花掉我薪水的一半，生活壓力真的很大
english: Every month, the mortgage payment alone takes up half of my salary, and the financial pressure is really immense.

meaning: 運び出す / 引っ越す / 立ち退く / （物・人が）移動する
example: 房東有限定你們要幾個月以內搬走嗎？
english: Does the landlord have a time limit for you to move out within a few months?

meaning: それでも足りない / やはり十分ではない / まだ不十分だ
example: 搬到郊區後雖然房租便宜了，但薪水太低，還是不夠繳學費
english: Although rent was cheaper after moving to the suburbs, my salary was still too low to cover tuition fees.

meaning: 支出 / 出費 / 出ていくお金（生活費 / 経費など）
example: 即使我每個月都節省開支，面對高房租還是不夠生活費
english: Even though I try to save money every month, it's still not enough to cover my living expenses given the high rent.

meaning: 期限が来る / 契約・有効期限などが満了する
example: 合約已經到期了，如果想繼續使用服務，必須重新簽約
english: The contract has expired. If you wish to continue using the service, you must sign a new contract.

meaning: 賃貸契約
example: 因為租約已經到期，房東可以突然叫我搬走
english: Because the lease has expired, the landlord can suddenly ask me to move out.

meaning: （名）現実 / 実際 （形）実用的である （副）実際に
example: 很多人覺得他很有錢，但實際上他負債很多
english: Many people think he's very rich, but in reality he's heavily in debt.

meaning: （副）実は / 本当は / 実のところ
example: 他看起來很冷靜，其實內心非常緊張
english: He appeared calm, but was actually very nervous inside.

meaning: 見た感じでは〜 / 感じとしては〜 / 印象では〜
example: 他今天感覺起來有點累，可能昨天沒睡好
english: He seems a bit tired today, probably because he didn't sleep well last night.

meaning: 屋根
example: 貓跑到屋頂上去了
english: The cat ran up to the roof.

meaning: 最上階 / 屋上
example: 頂樓有曬衣服的地方
english: There is a place to dry clothes on the roof.

meaning: 画像 / 写真 / 図 / イラスト / 絵など「視覚的なコンテンツ」全般
example: 這張圖片看起來好像是在日本拍的，但其實是在台中
english: This picture looks like it was taken in Japan, but it was actually taken in Taichung.

meaning: 写真
example: 媽媽很喜歡以前的照片，還把它們洗出來放在相簿裡
english: Mom really liked the old photos, so she printed them out and put them in an album.

meaning: 動画 / 映像 / ビデオクリップ
example: 我昨天在網路上看到一部介紹台灣小吃的影片，看了就想吃
english: I saw a video online yesterday introducing Taiwanese snacks, and it made me want to try them.

meaning: 隣人 / 近所の人
example: 我們家的鄰居是一對老夫婦，每天早上都會跟我們打招呼
english: Our neighbors are an elderly couple who greet us every morning.

meaning: エレベーター
example: 這棟公寓一層樓只有一戶，電梯一打開就是家門口
english: This apartment building has only one unit per floor, and the elevator doors lead directly to your door.

meaning: エスカレーター
example: 電扶梯靠右站立左側通行
english: Stand on the right and walk on the left on escalators.

meaning: 小包 / 郵便物 / 配送される荷物
example: 我昨天在網路上買的東西，今天就收到包裹了，速度很快
english: I ordered something online yesterday and received the package today. It was very fast!

meaning: 旅行や移動のための荷物 / スーツケースなど
example: 你出國旅行的時候，行李一定不要超過航空公司規定的重量
english: When you travel abroad, make sure your luggage does not exceed the weight limit set by the airline.

meaning: 洋服だんす
example: 搬家的時候，我發現衣櫃裡有很多不穿的衣服
english: When I moved, I found a lot of clothes in my closet that I no longer wore.

meaning: 位置 / 場所
example: 我們的學校位置在市中心，交通非常方便，附近還有很多餐廳
english: Our school is located in the city center, with very convenient transportation, and there are many restaurants nearby.

meaning:
（動）位置を決める / 位置付ける
（名）ポジショニング
example: 我打開導航應用程式，它很快就幫我定位現在的位置
english: I opened the navigation app, and it quickly located my current position.

meaning:
（動）内装する
（名）インテリア工事 / リフォーム / 内装デザイン
example: 我朋友最近買了新房子，正在找裝潢公司幫他設計室內空間
english: My friend recently bought a new house and is looking for a decorating company to design the interior space.

meaning: 私の立場から言うと
example: 以我來說，與其加薪，不如擁有彈性的上下班時間
english: Personally, I'd rather have flexible working hours than a raise.

meaning: 私にとって
example: 對我來說，家人永遠是最重要的人
english: For me, family will always be the most important people.

meaning: ～するよりは / ～するくらいなら
example: 與其住在交通不方便的地方，不如多花一點錢搬到市中心
english: Instead of living in an inconvenient location, it's better to spend a little more money and move to the city center.

meaning: 屋上に増築された建物
example: 頂加的房子雖然便宜，但環境真的沒那麼好
english: While the top-floor apartments are cheap, the environment isn't really that great.

meaning: 空き家 / 誰も住んでいない家 / 空室
example: 我聽說台北市有很多空屋
english: I've heard that there are many empty houses in Taipei.

meaning:
（名）補助 / 助成 / 支援 / サポート
（動）補助する / 助ける
example: 政府提供青年租屋補助，幫助剛出社會的年輕人減輕房租壓力
english: The government provides housing subsidies for young people to help alleviate the pressure of rent for those who have just entered the workforce.

meaning: 違法 / 法に反する / 合法ではない
example: 頂樓加蓋的房子如果沒有申請建照，就被認為是不合法建築
english: A rooftop addition without a building permit is considered an illegal structure.
