meaning: 信じられない / 信じることができない
example: 我無法相信他會做這種事
english: I can't believe he would do such a thing.

meaning: 量より質を重視する
example: 現在很多人做影片都追求數量，他卻選擇質重於量
english: Many people nowadays prioritize quantity in filmmaking, but he chooses quality over quantity.

meaning: 複雑で種類も多い
example: 這份工作內容繁雜多樣，需要高度的組織能力
english: This job involves a wide variety of tasks and requires a high level of organizational skills.

meaning: 特許
example: 這家公司因為侵犯他人的專利，被法院判賠上百萬元
english: This company was ordered by the court to pay over one million yuan in damages for infringing on others' patents.

meaning: シフト制 / 交替勤務制
example: 因為公司實行排班制，我每個月的休假日都不一樣
english: Because the company uses a shift system, my days off vary each month.

pinyin: rén bǐ rén, qì sǐ rén
meaning: 人と比べてもキリがない
example:
A：我昨天看到小美在日本旅遊，她的生活真的好精彩，我好羨慕喔
B：唉，人比人，氣死人啦！每個人都有自己的步調啊
english:
A: I saw Xiaomei traveling in Japan yesterday. Her life looks so exciting! I'm so envious!

B: Sigh, comparisons are odious! Everyone has their own pace.

meaning: もう気にしない / 吹っ切れた / あきらめがついた / 前向きに受け止めた
example: 以前我很在意別人的看法，現在我看開了
english: I used to care a lot about what others thought, but now I've come to terms with it.

meaning: 努力は報われる
example: 雖然過程很辛苦，但我相信努力會有回報
english: Although the process was tough, I believe that hard work will pay off.

meaning: 手順 / プロセス / ワークフロー
example: 如果有完整的工作流程，效率就會提高很多
english: Having a complete workflow will greatly improve efficiency.

meaning: マニュアル / ガイドブック / ハンドブック
example: 新進員工要先看完員工手冊，了解公司的規定與文化
english: New employees should first read the employee handbook to understand the company's rules and culture.

meaning: （ぷんぷんして）怒っている / おこ（激おこ） / ぷりぷりしている
example: 我只是開玩笑，不要氣噗噗啦～
english: I was just kidding, don't be angry!

meaning: コミュ障 / 人見知り
example: 我是社恐，不太想跟陌生人聊天
english: I have social anxiety and don't really want to chat with strangers.

meaning: 社交的
example: 他是社牛，走到哪裡都可以交朋友
english: He's a socialite; he can make friends anywhere.

meaning: 長く住んでいる / 長い間住んでいた
example: 我們在這棟公寓住了很久，已經有感情了
english: We've lived in this apartment for a long time, and we've grown attached to it.

meaning: そば（蕎麦）
example: 每年跨年我都會吃蕎麥麵，據說可以帶來好運
english: I eat buckwheat noodles every New Year's Eve, because it's said to bring good luck.

meaning: 露店 / 屋台 / 売り場（の「店」そのもの）
example: 這家臭豆腐攤子很有名，常常排隊
english: This stinky tofu stall is very famous; there's often a queue.

meaning: 屋台を出して物を売る人 / 業者
example: 那位攤販很親切，還多送我一個水果
english: The vendor was very kind and even gave me an extra piece of fruit.

meaning:
①ちょうど～したばかり（遅れて起こる動作）
②～してはじめて（条件）
③やっと / たった～しか（数量の少なさ）
example: 吃了年糕湯才有過年的氣氛
english: Eating rice cake soup is essential to creating a festive atmosphere for the Lunar New Year.

meaning: 帰ってくる / 戻ってくる
example: 你什麼時候回來？我們都在等你喔
english: When are you coming back? We're all waiting for you!

meaning: 買える（＝手に入る）
example:
A：最近好想吃蕎麥麵喔
B：欸～蕎麥麵去哪裡買得到啊？我在超市都沒看到耶
english:
A: I've been craving buckwheat noodles lately!
B: Uh oh, where can I buy buckwheat noodles? I haven't seen any in the supermarket.

meaning: ～についていく / ～に従って / ～に続いて
example: 小狗一直跟著我走，好可愛
english: The puppy kept following me, it was so cute.

meaning: 追跡する / フォローする（SNS用語）
example: 我已經追蹤你的帳號了
english: I have tracked your account.

meaning: 塗る / なすりつける / 拭き取る（文脈により）
example: 洗完臉以後，我會先擦化妝水，再抹乳液
english: After washing my face, I first apply toner, then lotion.

meaning: 塗る / ペイントする / 塗りつける
example: 她每天出門前都會塗口紅
english: She applies lipstick every day before going out.

meaning: こする / 拭く / つける（広い意味で使われている / 例：擦化妝水）
example: 她擦眼淚，不讓別人看到她哭
english: She wiped away her tears, not wanting anyone to see her cry.

meaning: 拭き取る / 消す / ぬぐい取る
example: 老師把黑板上的字擦掉了
english: The teacher erased the words on the blackboard.

meaning: 縦
example: 你要直的還是橫的排列？
english: Do you want them arranged vertically or horizontally?

meaning: 横
example: 中文是橫的寫法，日文常用直書
english: Chinese is written horizontally, while Japanese often uses vertical writing.

meaning: 斜め
example: 超商的斜對面有一家咖啡廳
english: There is a coffee shop diagonally opposite the convenience store.

meaning: ほとんど必要ない
example: 這種植物幾乎不需要澆水，很好養
english: This plant hardly needs watering and is very easy to care for.

meaning: ノート
example: 把筆記本裝進袋子裡
english: Put the notebook in the bag

meaning: 携帯する / 身につけて持ち歩く
example: 你會隨身攜帶水壺嗎？
english: Do you carry a water bottle with you at all times?

meaning: できるだけ / なるべく / 極力
example: 我盡量不想隨身帶太多東西
english: I try not to carry too much stuff with me.

meaning: 折りたたみ傘
example: 臺北常常下雨，所以我買了折疊雨傘
english: It rains a lot in Taipei, so I bought a folding umbrella.

meaning: 脆い（もろい） / 弱い / 脆弱な
example: 日本的傘骨比較脆弱，但是很輕
english: Japanese umbrellas have relatively fragile ribs, but they are very light.

meaning: 不思議に思う / 驚く / 怪しく思う
example: 我對他的行為感到很訝異
english: I was very surprised by his behavior.

meaning: 先に準備をしておく
example: 你先準備好資料，我再幫你看一下
english: Prepare your documents first, then I'll take a look at them for you.

meaning: 食べ終わった
example: 我還沒吃完，等我一下
english: I haven't finished eating yet, wait a minute.

meaning: 食べ終わって準備が整った / 食事が完了した状態
example: 我吃好了，我們走吧
english: I'm done eating, let's go.

meaning: けっこうよく使う / わりと使う
example: 這個詞在口語中滿常用的
english: This word is quite commonly used in spoken language.

meaning: うるさい人 / 細かい人 / 扱いにくい人（スラング）
example: 這個新老師很機車，常常給學生一堆作業
english: This new teacher is really difficult; he often gives students a ton of homework.

meaning: ～について / ～に関して
example: 我一直想做一支關於日本文化的Vlog影片
english: I've always wanted to make a vlog about Japanese culture.

meaning: のんびりした雰囲気 / ゆったり感 / リラックス感
example: 這家咖啡廳的裝潢很有悠閒感，讓人想待一整天
english: This cafe has a very relaxed atmosphere, making you want to stay all day.

meaning:
①身分や立場が低い
②へりくだっている / 控えめである
③（比喩的に）自分を小さく感じている / 無力である
④ネット上では「報われない恋・片思い」の文脈でよく使われる
example: 雖然我的夢想很卑微，但我會努力去實現它
english: Although my dream is humble, I will strive to achieve it.

meaning: 広く行き渡らせる / 普及させる / 広める
example: 在台灣便利商店非常的普及
english: Convenience stores are very common in Taiwan.

meaning: 統一番号（台湾で企業や商業登記された団体に割り当てられる8桁の番号）
example: 可以幫我打統編嗎？
english: Can you help me with the unified national staffing system?

meaning: それゆえに / だから / そのため
example: 天氣不好，因此我們取消了旅行
english: The weather was bad, so we canceled our trip.

meaning: （飲み物の）預け買い / 先払い購入
example: 全家的店員教我怎麼使用寄杯功能，真的很貼心
english: The staff at FamilyMart taught me how to use the cup-carrying function; it was really thoughtful of them.

meaning: 受け取る / 受領する / 引き取る
example: 等下次想要喝的時候，再拿收據來領取就可以囉！
english: You can just bring the receipt to collect your drink next time you want it!

meaning: 電子レンジ
example: 請問怎麼用微波爐？
english: How do I use a microwave oven?

meaning: 身分を照合する / 本人確認をする
example: 領取包裹前需要先核對身份
english: Identity verification is required before picking up the package.

meaning: 残高不足
example: 你的悠遊卡餘額不足，請到櫃檯加值
english: Your EasyCard balance is insufficient. Please top it up at the counter.

meaning: 実用的である / 使いやすい / 役に立つ
example: ChatGPT真的超級實用，我每天都用來練習中文
english: ChatGPT is incredibly useful; I use it every day to practice my Chinese.

meaning: いったい / 結局 / 結末まで / 最終的に
example: 今天我們要來問問大家，到底他們覺得自己有多台灣？
english: Today we're going to ask everyone, how Taiwanese do they really think they are?

meaning: （仕事などに）着手する / 慣れる / うまく扱えるようになる
example:
A：你最近工作還好嗎？
B：剛開始有點亂，不過現在已經上手了。
english:
A: How's work lately?

B: It was a bit chaotic at first, but I've gotten the hang of it now.

meaning:
（名）象徴 / シンボル
（動）象徴する
example: 鴿子常被用來象徵和平與希望的訊息
english: Doves are often used to symbolize messages of peace and hope.

meaning: 開放する / 自由に開ける
example: 公園每天早上六點準時開放給民眾使用
english: The park opens to the public at 6:00 a.m. every day.

meaning: とても開放的 / リベラル / 自由な考え方
example: 我覺得台灣人很開放吧
english: I think Taiwanese people are very open-minded.

meaning: 相席する / 他の人と同じテーブルに座る
example: 在台灣，有時候在小吃店併桌是很常見的事情
english: In Taiwan, it's quite common to sometimes share a table at snack shops.

meaning: エネルギーの供給源 / エネルギー源
example: 吃早餐可以說是一天重要的能量來源
english: Eating breakfast is an important source of energy for the day.

meaning: 十分である / 足りている
example: 你今天有喝足夠的水了嗎？
english: Did you drink enough water today?

meaning: けっこう好き / まあまあ気に入っている
example: 這部電影我還滿喜歡的，劇情不錯
english: I quite liked this movie; the plot was good.

meaning: 合併して〜になる / 統合して〜にする
example: 我還滿喜歡在週末，就是把早上跟中餐合併成一餐
english: I quite like combining breakfast and lunch into one meal on weekends.

pinyin: rú guǒ bǐ jiào yǒu kòng de huà
meaning: もし比較的時間があれば / もしちょっと暇があれば
example: 如果你比較有空的話，就跟我們一起去看電影吧
english: If you're free, come with us to see a movie!

meaning: たとえば〜みたいなものだよ / つまり / それはまさに例えば…
example: 他很有創意，就是像是會自己發明東西那種人
english: He's very creative, the kind of person who can invent things.

meaning: とっても楽しかった / すごく嬉しかった
example: 今天跟你們出去玩，真的滿開心的！
english: I had a really great time going out with you guys today!

meaning: 貴重な / かけがえのない / 大切な
example: 這段經驗對我來說很珍貴
english: This experience is very valuable to me.

meaning: 時間をつぶす / 暇つぶしをする
example: 下雨天不能出門，只好看書打發時間
english: Since I can't go out on a rainy day, I can only pass the time by reading.

meaning: ちゃんとやっておく / 整える / うまく仕上げる / 片づける / 準備する
example: 我已經把今天的事情都弄好了
english: I've already taken care of everything for today.

meaning: 最も長い / 最長である
example: 我交往最長的是五年
english: My longest relationship lasted five years.

meaning: 基本的に / おおむね / だいたい
example: 他基本上每天都運動，身體很健康
english: He exercises almost every day and is very healthy.

meaning: 余裕 / スペース / 可能性 / 選択の幅
example: 在這種情況下，我們真的沒有選擇的餘地
english: In this situation, we really have no other choice.

meaning: 含む / 含まれる / 〜を含めて
example: 公司福利包括年終獎金和健康保險
english: Company benefits include year-end bonuses and health insurance.

meaning: ある一定の期間 / しばらくの間 / ある時期
example: 我想一段日子好好休息，整理一下自己的心情
english: I need to take some time to rest and sort out my feelings.

meaning: いかなる〜も / どんな〜でも / どれでも / 何でも
example: 這個方法很安全，不會有任何問題
english: This method is safe and will not cause any problems.

meaning: サボる / 怠ける / こっそり手を抜く
example: 我今天太累了，只想在家裡偷懶一整天
english: I'm so tired today, I just want to stay home and laze around all day.

meaning: 自信がない / 自分を劣っていると感じる / 劣等感を持つ
example: 在台灣住了五年，但中文還是不好，讓我很自卑
english: I've lived in Taiwan for five years, but my Chinese is still not good, which makes me feel very inferior.

meaning: たぶん（おそらく）〜だからだ / きっと〜が理由だと思う
example: 可能就是因為我講話太直接，讓他覺得不舒服
english: It might be because I speak too directly that he felt uncomfortable.

meaning: スムーズである / 順調である / 滞りなく進む
example: 他的中文講得很順暢，聽起來像台灣人一樣
english: He speaks fluent Chinese, and sounds like a Taiwanese person.

meaning:
（形）純粋な / 混じりけのない
（副）単に / ただの / 純粋に〜だけの理由で
example: 我純粹是出於好奇，沒有別的意思
english: I was just curious, nothing more.

meaning: 徐々に / だんだんと / 次第に
example: 傷口雖然還沒好，但已經逐漸不痛了
english: The wound hasn't healed yet, but it's gradually stopping hurting.

meaning: スキャンする / スキャン読み取りをする（QRコード / 文書 / 画像など）
example: 請用手機掃描這個 QR 碼來付款
english: Please scan this QR code with your mobile phone to make payment.

meaning: 待つ / 待機する
example: 我們已經等候超過三十分鐘了
english: We have been waiting for more than thirty minutes.

meaning: 放つ / 漂わせる / （香りや魅力が）広がる
example: 你散發出一種很親切的氣質
english: You exude a very approachable aura.

meaning: 〜に対して / 〜について
example: 他對於工作非常認真
english: He is very serious about his work.

meaning: 寛容 / 包容力がある / 心が広い / 受け入れてくれる
example: 台灣人其實對不會講中文的外國人很包容
english: Taiwanese people are actually very tolerant of foreigners who don't speak Chinese.

meaning: 寛容である / 大目に見る
example: 台灣社會對外國人相對寬容
english: Taiwanese society is relatively tolerant of foreigners.

meaning: 事前に設定する / 初期設定 / デフォルト
example: 很多台灣人會預設外國人不懂中文
english: Many Taiwanese people assume that foreigners don't understand Chinese.

meaning: 顔つき / 表情
example: 走進會場時，看到了許多熟悉的面孔
english: As I entered the venue, I saw many familiar faces.

meaning: 話す練習をする / スピーキング練習
example: 我想多練口說，提高中文會話能力
english: I want to practice speaking more to improve my Chinese conversation skills.

meaning: けっこうガッチリしている / 体格がいい / 筋肉がついている / 運動していそう
example: 我覺得你算是蠻壯的，然後應該有在健身吧？
english: I think you're quite muscular, so you must work out regularly, right?

meaning: 手の指
example: 請不要用手指指著別人
english: Please do not point at others with your finger.

meaning: 石 / 石ころ / （比喩）無感情・頑固・重たい存在
example: 他像石頭一樣，不太說話
english: He was like a stone, rarely speaking.

meaning: ごますり / おべっかを使う / 上の人の機嫌を取ること
example: 你在公司裡，如果對老闆比較有禮貌，別人說你拍馬屁；你對老闆不禮貌，別人就說你很難搞
english: If you're polite to your boss at work, people will say you're a sycophant; if you're impolite, people will say you're difficult to deal with.

meaning: 眠って起きる / 目が覚める（しっかり睡眠を取ったあと）
example: 每天睡醒第一件事就是看手機
english: The first thing I do every morning when I wake up is check my phone.

meaning: 今のところ / 現在までに / これまでのところ
example: 到目前為止，我們的專案進行得很順利
english: So far, our project is progressing very smoothly.

meaning:
① 溶け込む / なじむ
② 溶け合う / 一体化する
③ 入り込む / 融合する
example: 剛來台灣的時候，我花了很多時間才慢慢融入當地生活
english: When I first came to Taiwan, it took me a long time to gradually integrate into local life.

meaning: ずっと良くなった / かなり改善した
example: 感冒好多了，謝謝你關心
english: My cold is much better, thank you for your concern.

meaning: たくさん / 多い
example: 我今天有好多事情要做
english: I have so many things to do today.

meaning: 見つけることができる / 探して見つかる
example: 六萬塊也不一定找得到好房子
english: Even with 60,000 yuan, you might not be able to find a good house.

meaning: 円安になる / 日本円が価値を下げる
example: 因為現在日圓貶值，如果換算成日圓的話，台灣的物價跟東京差不多了
english: Because the yen has depreciated, if converted to yen, prices in Taiwan are about the same as in Tokyo.

meaning: 残高 / 口座・クレジットカード・ポイントなどに今残っている金額
example: 帳戶裡的餘額不多了
english: The account balance is running low.

meaning: 支払えない / お金が足りなくて払う能力がない
example: 一般上班族付不起一個月六萬
english: The average office worker can't afford 60,000 a month.

meaning: ただ言っているだけ / 別に深い意味はないけど / あくまで一例・補足として言うと
example: 他只是說自己的想法，並沒有要批評你
english: He was just expressing his own thoughts and wasn't trying to criticize you.

meaning: 空いている部屋 / 空室
example: 我聽說台北市內的公寓空房很多
english: I've heard there are many vacant apartments in Taipei.

meaning: 隠れる / 隠す
example: 他把重要的文件隱藏起來，不讓別人看到
english: He hid the important documents so that others wouldn't see them.

meaning: ほこり / ちり
example: 桌子上積了很多灰塵，需要打掃一下
english: The table is covered in dust and needs to be cleaned.

meaning: ひざ / ひざ頭
example: 因為膝蓋痛，上下樓梯很辛苦
english: Because of knee pain, going up and down stairs is very difficult.

meaning: ブランケット
example: 你會用蓋在膝蓋上的毯子嗎？
english: Do you use a blanket to cover your knees?

meaning: クレジットカードを作る / クレジットカードを申し込む
example: 第一次辦信用卡通常需要收入證明
english: Proof of income is usually required when applying for a credit card for the first time.

meaning: あなたの言いたいことは分かります / 言っている意味は理解しています
example: 我懂你的意思，不過我有不同的看法
english: I understand what you mean, but I have a different opinion.

meaning: ～さえも / ～すらも / さらに…でさえ
example: 他的中文說得非常流利，甚至可以跟台灣人自然地聊天
english: He speaks fluent Mandarin and can even chat naturally with Taiwanese people.

meaning: 才能 / 生まれ持った素質 / 先天的な能力
example: 我覺得自己沒什麼天分，只能靠努力
english: I don't think I have any talent; I can only rely on hard work.

meaning: 訂正する / 是正する / 間違いを正す
example: 可以幫我糾正發音嗎？
english: Can you help me correct my pronunciation?

meaning: 修士課程に在籍して勉強する / 大学院（修士）で学ぶ
example: 唸碩士跟大學的生活很不一樣
english: Studying for a master's degree is very different from undergraduate life.

meaning: つまり / 言い換えると / 要するに
example:
A：我這個月信用卡刷太多，看到餘額真的會嚇到。
B：也就是說，你接下來只能吃泡麵了？
english:
A: I overspent on my credit card this month, and seeing the balance really terrifies me.

B: So, you're basically going to have to eat instant noodles from now on?

meaning: 意見 / 見解 / 考え方（ややフォーマル）
example: 我對這個政策有不同的看法
english: I have a different opinion on this policy.

meaning: 考え / アイデア / 思いつき
example: 我只是說說我的想法
english: I'm just sharing my thoughts.

meaning: 暗唱する / 丸暗記する（方法・行為）
example:
A：這一課要怎麼準備？
B：老師說要背誦內容
english:
A: How should I prepare for this lesson?

B: The teacher said we need to memorize the content.

meaning: 前に進む / 前進する / 進歩する（比喩）
example: 高階的學生需要用背下來的方法繼續前進
english: Advanced students need to use memorization to continue their studies.

meaning: リンクを送る / URLを共有する
example: 我之後會傳連結給你
english: I'll send you the link later.

meaning: 正直に言うと / ぶっちゃけ
example: 老實說，我本來不想參加這個
english: To be honest, I didn't want to participate in this.

meaning: 正直に言うと / 率直に言えば
example: 說實在的，我對這件事不太有信心
english: To be honest, I'm not very confident about this.

meaning: 率直に言うと / 正直に話すと
example: 坦白說，我對結果並不樂觀
english: To be honest, I'm not optimistic about the outcome.

meaning: はっきり言うと / 本音を言えば
example: 坦白講，這樣做根本行不通
english: Frankly, this approach simply won't work.

meaning: 決して〜ではない / 必ずしも〜ではない / 実は〜ではない
example: 我並不反對這個想法
english: I do not object to this idea.

meaning: あまり聞き取れない / 完全には理解できないちょっと分かりにくい
example: 不好意思，我剛剛聽不太懂
english: Sorry, I didn't quite understand what you were saying.

meaning: 開ける / つける（電源を入れる） / 起動する / オンにする
example: 他慢慢打開心房，開始跟大家說話
english: He slowly opened his heart and began to talk to everyone.

meaning: （電源・スイッチを）切る / 閉じて止める / オフにする
example: 出門前記得把電燈關掉
english: Remember to turn off the lights before you leave the house.

meaning: 閉めておく / 閉じた状態にする / （中に入れて）閉じ込める
example: 出門前記得把窗戶關起來
english: Remember to close the windows before you leave the house.

meaning: アツアツ / 熱々で湯気が出ている感じ / 触ると熱い状態
example: 這碗湯熱呼呼的，小心燙到
english: This soup is piping hot, be careful not to burn yourself.

meaning: 第一候補 / 最高の選択 / 第一志望
example: 日本向來是台灣人旅遊與移居的熱門首選
english: Japan has always been a popular choice for Taiwanese people traveling to and relocating to.

meaning: これまでずっと / 昔からずっと / 一貫して
example: 我們老闆向來不遲到，非常準時
english: Our boss is never late; he's always on time.

meaning: 人によって異なる / 人それぞれ違う / 人に応じて変わる
example: 每個人對壓力的反應因人而異，有些人比較敏感
english: Everyone reacts to stress differently; some people are more sensitive.

meaning: 適応する / 慣れる
example: 他剛到台灣的時候，花了幾個月才適應這裡的飲食和生活習慣
english: When he first arrived in Taiwan, it took him several months to adapt to the local food and lifestyle.

meaning: 人を満足させる / 満たされた気持ちにさせる
example: 每天學一點新東西，會讓我覺得生活很有意義，也很令人滿足
english: Learning something new every day makes me feel that life is meaningful and fulfilling.

meaning: 非常に大きい / 甚だしい / 非常に深刻で大きな（影響や損失など）
example: 這次颱風造成的損失甚鉅，需要很長時間恢復
english: The damage caused by this typhoon is enormous and will require a long time to recover.

meaning: 気にする / 大切に思う / こだわる
example: 我很在乎你的想法，所以才會問你意見
english: I care about your thoughts, that's why I asked for your opinion.

meaning: ドリンク（注文後に材料をシェイクして作る飲み物）
example: 這家店的手搖飲用新鮮水果做的，超好喝
english: This shop's handmade bubble tea is made with fresh fruit, it's super delicious!

meaning: 次々と現れて尽きない（成語）
example: 近年來詐騙案件層出不窮 / 手法日新月異
english: Fraud cases have been emerging one after another in recent years / The methods are constantly evolving

meaning: 思い出す / 思い起こす
example: 我突然想起來了今天有一個重要的會議
english: I suddenly remembered that I have an important meeting today.

meaning: 病気をうつす・うつる
example: 我被小朋友傳染了流感，現在全身都不舒服
english: I caught the flu from a child and now I feel unwell all over.

meaning: 免疫力
example: 壓力太大會讓身體免疫力下降，容易生病
english: Excessive stress can weaken the body's immune system, making one more susceptible to illness.

meaning:
①それとも～？（選択）
②やはり / ～したほうがいい（提案・決定）
③まだ / 依然と（継続）
④やっぱり～のほうがいい（比較）
example: 你想喝咖啡還是茶？
english: Would you like coffee or tea?

meaning: または〜 / あるいは～
example: 我週末想看電影或是去逛街
english: I want to see a movie or go shopping this weekend.

meaning: 少し〜（マイナスの感情が多い）
example: 我最近有點咳嗽，可能是感冒了
english: I've had a bit of a cough lately, it's probably a cold.

meaning: 少しの〜 / ちょっと（数量・程度）
example: 你可以給我一點時間嗎？
english: Can you give me a little time?

meaning: 特に何も言わなかった
example: 醫生沒有特別說不能吃辣，所以我還是吃了一點
english: The doctor didn't specifically say I couldn't eat spicy food, so I ate a little bit anyway.

meaning: 今まで / 今でもなお / 現在に至るまで
example: 他們的感情從大學到現在，至今依然很好
english: Their relationship has lasted from college to now, and it remains very good.

meaning: 脂っこい食べ物
example: 我正在減肥，所以盡量不吃油膩的食物
english: I'm on a diet, so I try to avoid oily foods.

meaning: 痰を生じる / 痰ができる
example: 這種食物容易生痰，感冒時最好不要吃
english: This food can easily produce phlegm, so it's best to avoid it when you have a cold.

meaning: ちょっと我慢する / 少し耐える
example: 有點痛，你忍一下
english: It hurts a little, just bear with it.

meaning: 我慢する / 耐える / 忍耐する
example: 他沒有忍耐，很快就放棄了
english: He couldn't hold back and gave up quickly.

meaning: ぐっと我慢する / 抑える
example: 壓力大的時候，他忍不住一直吃東西
english: When he's under a lot of stress, he can't help but keep eating.

meaning: 丸一年 / 一年中ずっと / 一年まるごと
example: 我們一整年都在努力經營這個品牌
english: We've been working hard to build this brand all year.

meaning: 素材
example:
A：你喜歡穿什麼材質的衣服？
B：我喜歡聚酯纖維的材質，因為它不容易起皺，而且很快就乾了。
english:
A: What kind of material do you like to wear?

B: I like polyester because it doesn't wrinkle easily and dries quickly.

meaning: 〜と言えば / 〜の話をするならば
example: 說到夏天，你會想到什麼？
english: What comes to mind when you think of summer?

meaning: 二股をかける / 浮気する
example: 我才剛知道他劈腿了，真的超難過的
english: I just found out he cheated on me, I'm so heartbroken.

meaning: 二股をかける / 浮気する
example: 他腳踏兩條船，被兩個女生發現了
english: He was two-timing, and the two girls found out.

meaning: お金をむやみに使う / 無駄遣いをする
example: 他沒有理財觀念，總是亂花錢買不需要的東西
english: He has no concept of financial management and always spends money recklessly on things he doesn't need.

meaning: ギャンブル
example: 我真後悔當初把錢用在賭博
english: I truly regret spending my money on gambling.

meaning: 酒や遊びにふけり / ぜいたくに遊ぶこと
example: 他每天過著花天酒地的生活，完全不在乎未來
english: He lived a life of extravagance and debauchery, completely disregarding the future.

meaning: 襟（えり）
example: 他穿了一件高領子的毛衣，看起來很有氣質
english: He wore a turtleneck sweater and looked very elegant.

meaning: ピンク色
example: 這款手機有粉紅色的版本，很多女生都喜歡
english: This phone comes in a pink version, which many girls like.

meaning: 桃の花のような明るいピンク色（赤みが強いピンク）
example: 我不喜歡太亮的桃紅色，比較喜歡淡一點的粉紅色
english: I don't like bright peach pinks; I prefer lighter shades of pink.

meaning: あちこち / どこにでも / 至る所に
example: 冬天你喜歡待在家裡，還是到處旅遊？
english: Do you prefer to stay at home or travel during the winter?

meaning: 待機する / スタンバイ状態でいること
example: 他正在機場待機，準備搭乘下一班飛機
english: He is waiting at the airport, preparing to catch the next flight.

meaning: ほうれん草
example: 菠菜富含鐵質，對身體很有幫助
english: Spinach is rich in iron, which is very beneficial to the body.

meaning: 〜と見なす / 〜だと思う / 〜として扱う
example: 我們還是當成一次經驗吧
english: Let's treat this as a lesson learned.

meaning: 小さなコミュニティ
example: 在公司裡，有些人喜歡搞小圈圈文化
english: In companies, some people like to create cliques or factions.

meaning: コンフォートゾーン（＝快適な領域）
example: 離開舒適圈，你將遇見未知的自己
english: Step out of your comfort zone and you will encounter an unknown version of yourself.

meaning: 持ってくる / もたらす / 連れてくる
example: 這個新產品到底能帶來什麼價值？
english: What value does this new product actually bring?

meaning: 信頼感
example: 客戶對我們有信任感，合作才會順利
english: When clients trust us, cooperation will be smooth.

meaning: 公式ウェブサイト / オフィシャルサイト
example: 我在品牌的官方網站上買了這件衣服
english: I bought this dress from the brand's official website.

meaning: 見てわかる / 見抜ける / （見た感じで）わかる
example: 看得出來哪個是真的，哪個是假的
english: You can tell which is real and which is fake.

meaning: 気ままに / 自分の気分にまかせて / 自由に
example: 我們這次旅行決定走隨興路線
english: We decided to take a spontaneous trip this time.

meaning:
気ままに / 自由に（ポジティブ）
いい加減に / 適当に（ネガティブ）
example: 你想吃什麼？隨便啦，我都可以
english: What do you want to eat? Anything is fine with me.

meaning: すみません / 通してもらえますか？（道を開けてもらいたいときの丁寧な言い方）
example: 不好意思，借過一下
english: Excuse me, may I pass by?

meaning: 同性愛
example: 他坦白自己是同性戀者
english: He openly admitted that he was gay.

meaning: 今まで一度も～したことがない
example: 我從來沒有去過台東
english: I have never been to Taitung.

meaning: あなたはどうやって見分けるの？
example: 你怎麼分辨真假消息的？
english: How do you distinguish between true and false information?

meaning: 感覚・直感・フィーリングに頼る
example: 他做決定常常靠感覺，不太理性
english: He often makes decisions based on feelings, rather than rationally.

meaning:
（名）同感
（動）同じ気持ちである / 共感する / 同意する
example: 有些人表面上看起來很快樂，其實很孤單，你有同感嗎？
english: Some people may seem happy on the surface, but they are actually very lonely. Do you feel the same way?

example: 四十多歲的人常常為了家庭和工作而煩惱
english: People in their forties often worry about family and work.

pinyin: sān chéng nǔlì qī chéng yùnqì
meaning: 成功や結果は「3割の努力」と「7割の運」で決まる
example: 人生有時候就是三成努力七成運氣，放寬心一點吧
english: Life is sometimes 30% effort and 70% luck, so try to relax a bit.

meaning: 調和がとれている / 仲むつまじい。
example: 和諧的工作環境能提高員工的生產力
english: A harmonious work environment can improve employee productivity.

meaning: 一体何がしたいの？ / 結局どうしたいの？ / （怒り・混乱）で：何が言いたいの！？どうしたいの！？
example: 你到底想怎樣？說清楚好不好！
english: What exactly do you want? Make it clear!

meaning: ずっと投げやりな態度で何もしない / 放置している
example: 我真的不知道他到底想怎樣，事情一直擺爛
english: I really don't know what he wants; things have just been left stagnant.

meaning: 話し方のトーン / 言葉の調子 / 語調（ニュアンスを含む）
example: 那樣說，語氣不太一樣
english: Saying it that way, the tone is a bit different.

meaning: けっこうよく言うよ / まあまあ頻繁に使うね / けっこう普通に言う（フレーズ）だよ
example: 這個詞，在年輕人之間還蠻常講的
english: This word is quite commonly used among young people.

meaning: 引き起こす / 生じさせる / 結果として〜になる
example: 他常常擺爛不做事，造成大家很多麻煩
english: He often shirks his responsibilities and does nothing, causing a lot of trouble for everyone.

meaning: どんどん先延ばしにする / 何度も何度も引き延ばす / ズルズルと後回しにする
example: 很多事情一拖再拖，就會一直沒做
english: Many things, if put off again and again, will remain undone.

meaning: 何度も何度も食べる / 何回も食べ続ける / （しつこく）食べる / 繰り返し食べる
example: 這家店的牛肉麵很好吃，讓我一吃再吃也吃不膩
english: The beef noodles at this restaurant are so delicious, I could eat them again and again and never get tired of them.

meaning: よく考えずに行動する / 衝動的にしゃべる / 軽率な
example: 這個人講話總是不經大腦，想說什麼就說什麼
english: This person always speaks without thinking, saying whatever comes to mind.

meaning: 冒険心（リスクを恐れずに挑戦する心構え / 新しいことに積極的に挑む姿勢）
example: 創業需要冒險精神，也需要堅持到底的毅力
english: Starting a business requires a spirit of adventure, as well as the perseverance to see it through to the end.

meaning: 税込み / 税金が含まれている
example: 我們的商品標價都是含稅，不會另外收費
english: Our prices include tax; there are no additional charges.

meaning: とても面白い / とても興味深い
example: 這堂課真的好有趣，我學到了很多新東西
english: This class was really fun, and I learned a lot of new things.

meaning: 数歩歩く / ちょっと歩く
example: 醫院就在前面而已，走幾步就好，不用搭車
english: The hospital is just ahead, only a few steps away, no need to take a car.

meaning: 印象に残った / 印象が深かった
example: 第一次去台南旅行的經驗讓我印象很深刻
english: My first trip to Tainan left a deep impression on me.

meaning: なまりが強い / 発音に癖がある
example: 你的口音不會很重啊，我覺得講得很好聽
english: Your accent isn't very strong; I think it sounds very pleasant to speak.

meaning: 年を取った / 年配になった
example: 上了年紀之後，我開始注意飲食和運動了
english: As I've gotten older, I've started paying more attention to my diet and exercise.

meaning:
（動）寄付する / 募金する
（名）寄付金 / 募金
example: 他每年都會固定捐款給兒童福利機構
english: He makes regular donations to children's welfare organizations every year.

meaning: （成）思うままにする / 自由気ままにする
example: 退休後，他終於可以隨心所欲地安排自己的生活
english: After retiring, he was finally able to arrange his life as he pleased.

meaning: 理性を失う / 熱狂する
example: 喝酒過後發生過最痛狂的事情是什麼？
english: What's the most outrageous thing that's ever happened after drinking?

meaning: 熱狂的に夢中になる
example: 你最近有沒有瘋狂迷上什麼？
english: Have you recently become obsessed with anything?

meaning: モバイルゲーム / スマホゲーム
example: 聽說最近有一款新的手遊很熱門，我下載來玩玩看
english: I heard there's a new mobile game that's really popular lately, so I'll download it and give it a try.

meaning: しかし / なのに / 反対に
example: 這道菜看起來很普通，卻意外地好吃
english: This dish looks ordinary, but it's surprisingly delicious.

meaning: 目尻のシワ
example: 用眼霜可以預防魚尾紋提早出現
english: Using eye cream can prevent crow's feet from appearing prematurely.

meaning: ほうれい線
example: 我最近在煩惱法令紋太深，想去醫美做療程
english: I've been bothered by my deep nasolabial folds lately and am thinking of getting some cosmetic treatment.

meaning: シミ
example: 我想除掉我的黑斑跟法令紋
english: I want to get rid of my dark spots and nasolabial folds.

meaning: 顔のくすみ / 顔色がどんよりしている
example: 這款精華液能改善臉部暗沉，讓肌膚更透亮
english: This serum can improve dullness and make skin more radiant.

meaning: 代謝が悪くなる / 代謝が落ちる
example: 上了年紀後，很多人會覺得代謝變差了
english: As people age, many feel that their metabolism slows down.

meaning: 痩せにくい / なかなか痩せられない
example: 我控制飲食也運動了，但真的很難瘦下來
english: I've been controlling my diet and exercising, but it's really hard to lose weight.

meaning: 相談する / 話し合う / 意見を出し合う
example: 我們商量了很久，最後決定一起創業開一家咖啡廳
english: We discussed it for a long time and finally decided to start a coffee shop together.

meaning: メモを取る / ノートを取る / 記録を残す
example: 他邊聽講邊做筆記，非常認真
english: He listened attentively and took notes diligently.

meaning: とどまる / 滞在する / 停滞する．
example: 這班巴士在每個站都停留五分鐘
english: This bus stops for five minutes at each station.

meaning:
（動）攻撃する
（名）攻撃
example: 網路上的言語攻擊會造成心理傷害
english: Online verbal attacks can cause psychological harm.

meaning: 防御する / 防御
example: 這款遊戲的角色有很強的防禦能力
english: The characters in this game have strong defensive capabilities.

meaning: 〜するって約束した / 〜するって言ってた
example: 說好要一起處理問題，怎麼最後把全部的事情都丟給我
english: We agreed to work together on the problem, so why did you dump everything on me in the end?

pinyin: bù shì shuō hǎo ～ le ma?
meaning: 〜ってもう約束したよね？
example: 不是說好一起吃午餐了嗎？
english: Didn't we agree to have lunch together?

meaning: 約束した（よ） / 約束済み / 決まってる / 打ち合わせ済み
example: 別忘了你跟我約好的事
english: Don't forget what you promised me.

meaning: いつも昔のことを蒸し返す / すぐに過去のことを掘り返す
example: 她老愛挖舊帳，超難聊
english: She loves to bring up the past, she's incredibly difficult to talk to.

meaning: もうちょっと辛く（すれば）
example: 再辣一點，應該會更好吃
english: It would taste even better if it were a little spicier.

meaning: 質問する / 問いを出す
example: 老師鼓勵學生在課堂上提問
english: The teacher encouraged students to ask questions in class.

meaning:
（動）答える
（名）返答・回答
example: 你可以幫我回答這個客戶的問題嗎？
english: Can you help me answer this customer's question?

meaning: （症状・状況・感情などが）やわらぐ / 緩和される / 軽くなる
example: 做完筋膜放鬆以後，頭痛就緩解了
english: My headache was relieved after the myofascial release treatment.

meaning:
（動）骨を整える / 骨格矯正
（名）骨を整える行為 / 整体
example: 最近我的脖子很緊，常常偏頭痛，所以我去做了日式整骨
english: My neck has been very tight lately, and I often get migraines, so I went for Japanese chiropractic.

meaning: ～する価値がある / ～に値する
example: 雖然整骨很貴，可是效果很好，那就很值得
english: Although osteopathic manipulation is expensive, the results are excellent, so it's well worth it.

meaning:
（名）循環
（動）循環する / ループする / ぐるぐる回る
example: 運動可以幫助促進血液循環，改善健康
english: Exercise can help promote blood circulation and improve health.

meaning: 太い / 粗い / 大まか
example: 我最近吃太多，腰變得很粗
english: I've been eating too much lately, and my waist has gotten really thick.

meaning: 細い / 繊細 / 細かい
example: 腿很細的人穿牛仔褲特別好看
english: People with very slim legs look especially good in jeans.

meaning: 人生の分かれ道 / 人生のターニングポイント / 転機
example: 三十歲是許多人人生的分水嶺，要做很多重要決定
english: Thirty is a watershed moment in many people's lives, a time to make many important decisions.

meaning: ゆるんでいる / たるんでいる / リラックスしている
example: 年紀大了以後，皮膚容易鬆弛
english: As we get older, our skin tends to sag.

meaning: 以前（あなたが）私に送った
example: 你可以再傳一次嗎？我找不到你之前傳給我的連結
english: Could you please send it again? I can't find the link you sent me before.

meaning: 思い出せない / 覚えていない（記憶に残っていない） / 記憶にない
example: 他是誰啊？我好像見過，但記不起來了
english: Who is he? I think I've seen him before, but I can't remember.

meaning: 覚えようとしても / 覚えられない / 記憶に定着しない
example: 記不住就算了，沒關係
english: If you can't remember, that's okay.

meaning: むくみ
example: 吃了拉麵這種鹽分高的食物，隔天很容易水腫
english: Eating high-sodium foods like ramen can easily cause water retention the next day.

meaning: 食べすぎる / 食べ過ぎた
example: 過年期間大家常常吃太多，容易變胖
english: People often eat too much during the Chinese New Year, which can easily lead to weight gain.

meaning: たくさん水を飲んでね / もっと水を飲んで
example: 每天多喝水，對皮膚和身體都有幫助
english: Drinking more water every day is beneficial for both your skin and your body.

meaning: お風呂に浸かる
example: 因為泡澡能讓我放鬆，所以我喜歡
english: I like taking baths because they help me relax.

meaning: 浴槽 / バスタブ
example: 請不要把毛巾放在浴缸裡
english: Please do not put towels in the bathtub.

meaning: 場所（空間）を取る / かさばる
example: 這個行李箱太大了，放在房間裡很佔空間
english: This suitcase is too big; it takes up a lot of space in the room.

meaning: リフォームする / 改装する / 内装を新しくする
example: 我爸媽最近在家裡重新裝潢客廳和廚房
english: My parents recently renovated the living room and kitchen at home.

meaning: 取り除く / 削除する / 排除する
example: 我不小心把重要的檔案移除了
english: I accidentally deleted an important file.

meaning: 取り壊す / 分解する / 外す / 撤去する
example: 裝潢時，我們把舊的吊燈也一起拆掉了
english: During the renovation, we also removed the old chandelier.

meaning: 徹夜ができない / 夜更かしが無理
example: 我年紀大了，無法熬夜
english: I'm too old to stay up late.

meaning: すぐに眠りにつく / 寝やすい / 寝落ちしやすい
example: 他只要一躺在床上就容易睡著，真羨慕
english: He falls asleep easily as soon as he lies down in bed; I really envy him.

meaning: 眠れない / 寝つけない
example: 他最近壓力太大，常常半夜睡不著
english: He's been under a lot of stress lately and often can't sleep at night.

meaning: もう少しで / 危うく
example: 我上次過馬路的時候，差點被闖紅燈的計程車撞到
english: Last time I was crossing the street, I was almost hit by a taxi that ran a red light.

meaning: どんな状況でも / 何があっても / いずれにせよ
example: 不管怎麼樣，我都會支持你
english: No matter what, I will support you.

pinyin: bú yào jiǎng nàxiē yǒu de méi de
meaning: 余計なこと言わないほうがいいよ
example: 不要講那些有的沒的，免得禍從口出
english: Avoid talking nonsense, lest you cause trouble with your words.

meaning: キャラメル・マキアート
example: 我要一杯大杯焦糖瑪奇朵，冰的
english: I'd like a large caramel macchiato, iced.

meaning: 付帯する / 付随する
example: 這個方案是附帶早餐的
english: This plan includes breakfast.

meaning: やる / 処理する / 何とかする / いじる
example: 現在沒辦法，只能先搞定再說。
english: There's no other way now, we can only deal with it first.

meaning: 間違える / 勘違いする
example: 你是不是搞錯地點了？我們約的是火車站，不是捷運站喔
english: Are you sure you've got the location right? We're meeting at the train station, not the subway station.

meaning: 大騒ぎする / 大喧嘩して暴れる / 大声でわめく
example: 他在公司大吵大鬧，大家都很困擾
english: He caused a huge disturbance at the company, which bothered everyone.

meaning: 洗脳する / 思想や考え方を一方的に刷り込むこと
example: 他是那種很容易被洗腦的人
english: He is the kind of person who is easily brainwashed.

meaning: あまり悩まない / くよくよしないタイプ
example: 我這個人做決定很快，不太會煩惱
english: I make decisions quickly and don't tend to worry much.

meaning: 転院する / 紹介状で別の病院・科に回されること
example: 醫生建議我轉診到大醫院
english: The doctor advised me to be transferred to a larger hospital.

meaning: 痛み止め / 鎮痛剤
example: 頭痛很嚴重，所以我去醫院拿了止痛藥
english: My headache was very bad, so I went to the hospital to get painkillers.

meaning: ストレッチする / 筋を伸ばす
example: 因為我的身體很硬，整骨師叫我多拉筋
english: Because my body is very stiff, the osteopath told me to do more stretching.

pinyin: zhēn de tài nán guò le
meaning: 本当に辛すぎる / 本当に悲しすぎる
example: 看你這樣，我也覺得真的太難過了
english: Seeing you like this makes me really sad too.

meaning:
（動）（店や施設が）営業する　
（名）営業
example: 請問今天營業到幾點？
english: What time do you close today?

meaning: ポイントを集める / スタンプを集める
example: 辦會員可以集點，消費有 10% 點數回饋，之後可以折抵
english: Becoming a member earns you points, and you get 10% points back on your purchases, which can later be used as a discount.

meaning: 登録する / 会員登録する
example: 你下載我們的 APP，然後註冊一下
english: Download our app and register.

meaning: 取引 / 決済 / 売買
example: 交易紀錄可以在 APP 裡查看
english: Transaction records can be viewed in the app.

meaning: （成）さっぱり分からない / ちんぷんかんぷん / 状況が全然つかめない
example: 沒人跟我說發生什麼事，我一頭霧水
english: Nobody told me what happened, I was completely confused.

meaning: よくそんなことできるね / よく平気でできるね（少し呆れたり、非難するニュアンス）
example: 你怎麼好意思這樣說？
english: How could you say that?

meaning: 充実した一日
example: 我度過了很充實的一天
english: I had a very fulfilling day.

meaning: しばらくの間 / ちょっとの間 / 一時的に
example: 我有一陣子都不喝酒
english: I haven't drunk alcohol for a while.

meaning: 賛成する / 支持する / 同意する
example: 我完全贊成你的看法
english: I completely agree with your opinion.

meaning: 称賛する / 褒める / 賞賛する
example: 我想稱讚你今天的表現
english: I want to commend you for your performance today.

meaning: 抑える / 抑圧する / 我慢する
example: 他一直壓抑自己的情緒
english: He kept suppressing his emotions.

meaning: 居心地が悪い / 落ち着かない / 気まずい / なんとなく不快
example: 回到日本後，我常常覺得自己不自在
english: After returning to Japan, I often felt uncomfortable.

meaning: 冷淡である / 冷ややかだ
example: 他的態度總是那麼冷漠
english: His attitude was always so cold.

meaning: ～だと考える / ～だと判断する
example: 你也是這麼認為的嗎？
english: Do you think so too?

meaning: 張りつめている / ピリピリしている / 余裕がない
example: 最近工作很多，心裡很緊繃
english: I've been very busy with work lately, and I'm feeling quite stressed.

meaning: 順番に〜する / 交代で〜する
example:
A：今天事情很多，怎麼分工？
B：我們輪流處理吧。
english:
A: There's a lot to do today, how should we divide the tasks?

B: Let's take turns.

meaning: 道路を渡る
example: 過馬路請走斑馬線
english: Please use the crosswalk when crossing the street.

meaning: 信号無視をする / 赤信号で進む
example: 剛剛那台車是不是闖紅燈？
english: Did that car just run a red light?

meaning: よく分からない / 混乱する / はっきり把握できない
example: 我搞不清楚怎麼用這個 APP
english: I don't understand how to use this app.

meaning: 良くなる / 元気になる / 改善する
example: 我希望你快一點好起來
english: I hope you get better soon.

meaning: （接）ただ / でも / けど 　※カジュアル
example: 我很喜歡吃甜點，不過最近開始減肥了
english: I love desserts, but I've recently started dieting.

meaning: （接）でも / けど 　※カジュアル
example: 我想買新的手機，可是現在沒什麼錢
english: I want to buy a new phone, but I don't have much money right now.

meaning: （接）しかし / けれども　※フォーマル
example: 我知道這樣做很麻煩，但是沒有別的選擇
english: I know this is troublesome, but I have no other choice.

meaning: 成約率 / 契約成立率
example: 透過介紹是不是成交率比較高？
english: Does a referral increase the conversion rate?

meaning: 忘れにくい
example: 我覺得學語言就像學騎腳踏車一樣，一旦學會了就很難忘記
english: I think learning a language is like learning to ride a bicycle; once you've learned it, it's hard to forget.

meaning: 私は今考えている / ちょっと思うんだけど
example: 我在想晚餐要吃什麼
english: I'm thinking about what to have for dinner.

meaning: 傷つける / 損なう / 壊す
example: 不要期待，就不會有傷害
english: If you don't expect anything, you won't get hurt.

meaning: 保護者 / 親（特に学校で使う言い方）
example: 家長的心態對教育非常重要
english: Parents' mindset is very important in education.

meaning: スタート地点 / 出発点
example: 如果想讓小孩贏在起跑點，就要花很多錢在補習上
english: If you want your child to have a head start, you have to spend a lot of money on tutoring.

meaning: 余裕 / ゆとり
example: 有餘裕的人比較不容易生氣
english: People with plenty of time and energy are less likely to get angry.

meaning: 統計データ / 統計資料
example: 根據統計數據，今年出生率下降了
english: According to statistics, the birth rate has declined this year.

meaning: ある人々 / 一部の人
example: 某些人認為房價還會繼續上漲
english: Some people believe that housing prices will continue to rise.

meaning:
① さらに～が必要
② その上さらに～する
③ まだ～しなければならない
example: 如果想成功，還要不斷努力
english: If you want to succeed, you must keep working hard.

meaning: 自然に / 無理なく / いつの間にか
example: 家庭比工作更重要，所以他們會自然而然地把時間留給自己的小孩
english: Family is more important than work, so they naturally dedicate their time to their children.

meaning:
（動）圧迫する / 追い詰める
（形）切迫している
example: 經濟壓力逼迫很多年輕人晚婚
english: Economic pressures are forcing many young people to marry later in life.

meaning: 何年も / 数年（かなり長い期間）
example: 我好幾年沒感冒，這次卻感冒了
english: I haven't had a cold for years, but I caught one this time.

meaning: 価値観
example: 離婚的原因是價值觀的差異
english: The reason for the divorce was a difference in values.

meaning: 許可する / 認める
example: 學校不允許學生帶手機
english: The school does not allow students to bring mobile phones.

meaning: 慎重な / 軽率でない / 用心深い
example: 投資之前應該謹慎考慮
english: You should carefully consider before investing.

meaning: 統合する / まとめる / 整理して一つにする
example: 腦袋裡太亂，需要慢慢整合
english: My mind is too cluttered; I need to organize it slowly.

meaning: 完全な / 欠けていない / 整っている
example: 孩子可以帶來快樂和意義，讓人生更完整
english: Children can bring joy and meaning, making life more complete.

meaning: キャリア
example: 生小孩可能會影響大人的職涯發展
english: Having a child may affect an adult's career development.

meaning: 失う / 失ってしまう
example: 他失去了工作，所以現在正在努力找新的機會重新開始
english: He lost his job, so he's now trying to find new opportunities to start over.

meaning: まあまあ / 悪くない / そこそこ
example: 整體聽下來還行
english: Overall, it was alright.

meaning: どういうこと / 事情 / 状況
example: 這是怎麼回事？
english: What's going on?

meaning: 私について来て
example: 現在時間不多了，請大家跟我走
english: Time is running out, please follow me.

meaning: ガス（都市ガス・プロパンガス）
example: 瓦斯味很重，可能有漏氣的問題
english: The gas smell is very strong; there might be a gas leak.

meaning: かえって～だ / むしろ～だ / 逆に～だ
example: 我以為他會生氣，反而是他先道歉
english: I thought he would be angry, but instead he apologized first.

meaning: 無駄話 / くだらない話 / 当たり前だろ（やや強い）
example: 開會的時候不要講太多廢話
english: Don't talk too much nonsense during meetings.

meaning: 論理 / ロジック
example: 我搞不清楚他的邏輯
english: I don't understand his logic.

meaning:
はっきり分からない
よく理解できない
頭が整理できない
example: 我搞不清楚為什麼他生氣
english: I don't understand why he's angry.

meaning: （成）いつも通り / 相変わらず
example: 好久沒來這家店了，這杯咖啡一如往常的好喝！
english: It's been a long time since I've been to this shop, and this coffee is as delicious as ever!

meaning: 食べ方 / 食事中の態度・マナー
example: 吃相不好會讓自己很丟臉
english: Eating bad table manners will make you very embarrassed.

meaning:
① もったいなくて〜できない
② 名残惜しくて〜できない
③ 手放したくない
example: 太太送我的真皮大衣實在是太高級了，我捨不得穿
english: The genuine leather coat my wife gave me is so luxurious, I can't bear to wear it.

meaning: パーマをかける / 髪を巻く
example: 我想去燙頭髮，換個新造型
english: I want to get my hair permed and get a new look.

meaning: 〜のうちに / 〜を利用して / 〜に乗じて
example: 我很後悔沒有趁年輕去環遊世界
english: I regret not traveling the world while I was young.

meaning: 美容師
example: 日本美髮師的技術比臺灣的好
english: Japanese hairdressers are more skilled than those in Taiwan.

meaning: こだわる / 重視する / 気を配る
example: 看起來你對頭髮也很講究
english: It seems you're quite particular about your hair.

meaning: 前髪
example: 請把劉海剪短大概兩公分
english: Please trim your bangs about two centimeters shorter.

meaning: まゆ毛
example: 眉毛太短會讓臉看起來比較大
english: Short eyebrows can make your face look bigger.

meaning: あまり使わないほうだ / けっこう使用頻度が少ない
example: 這種說法現在還蠻少用的
english: This kind of statement is rarely used nowadays.

meaning: たくさんの話 / 言いたいことがたくさんある
example: 還有好多話沒說，真的捨不得就這樣分開
english: There are so many things I haven't said yet, and I really don't want to part ways like this.

meaning: 顔つき / 態度 / 表情（※少しネガティブ）
example: 看他那種嘴臉，超想賞他一巴掌！
english: Looking at his face, I really want to slap him!

meaning: くすぐる / かゆいところをかく
example: 小孩子喜歡被爸爸搔癢
english: Kids love being tickled by their dads.

meaning: もっと練習したい
example: 我想要多練習口說
english: I want to practice speaking more.

meaning: 所有している / 保有している
example: 日本護照持有率只有16.8%
english: Japan's passport ownership rate is only 16.8%.

meaning: あなたの周りの人 / あなたの身近な人
example: 你身邊的人都結婚了嗎？
english: Are all the people around you married?

meaning: 自然に目が覚めるまで寝る
example: 今天早上我睡到自然醒，沒有設鬧鐘，感覺特別輕鬆
english: I woke up naturally this morning without setting an alarm, and I felt especially relaxed.

meaning: リフレッシュする / 気分を回復する / エネルギーを取り戻す
example: 最近工作很忙，我想請一天假重新充電
english: I've been very busy at work lately, and I'd like to take a day off to recharge.

meaning: 充実している / 中身がしっかりある / 満たされている感じ
example: 這個週末我過得很充實
english: I had a very fulfilling weekend.

meaning: コピーする / 複製する
example: 你可以幫我拷貝這個檔案嗎？
english: Can you help me copy this file?

meaning: 貼り付ける / ペーストする
example: 請先拷貝這段文字，然後貼上到文件裡
english: Please copy this text first, then paste it into the file.

meaning: （成）口は災いの元
example: 不要講那些有的沒的，免得禍從口出
english: Avoid talking nonsense, lest you cause trouble with your words.

meaning: かつて覚えていた / 昔は覚えていた
example: 我曾經記得，但是我現在忘了
english: I used to remember, but now I've forgotten.

meaning: 余計なこと / 関係ないこと / あれこれ
example: 不要想太多有的沒有的事情，放輕鬆一點
english: Don't overthink things, just relax.

meaning:
①髪 → パサパサ / 広がる / まとまらない
②人 → 落ち着きがない / そそっかしい
example: 她的頭髮很毛躁，所以每天都用護髮乳
english: Her hair is very frizzy, so she uses conditioner every day.

meaning: 柔らかくてツヤツヤしている
example: 這款洗髮精可以讓頭髮變得柔柔亮亮
english: This shampoo can make your hair soft and shiny.

meaning: フケ（頭の皮膚の白い粉）
example: 冬天的時候，我的頭皮常常狂掉頭皮屑
english: In winter, my scalp often sheds a lot of dandruff.

meaning: 安い商品 / バーゲン品 / お得な品物
example: 有些便宜貨的品質不太好
english: Some cheap goods are not of good quality.

meaning: 本当に知らない / 実はよく分からない
example: 你問我這件事，我還真不知道
english: You asked me about this, and I honestly don't know.

meaning: 狂ったような / ものすごく / クレイジー
example: 他瘋狂地買衣服
english: He went on a clothing buying spree.

meaning:
（動）送金する / 振り込む
（名）振込
example: 我已經匯款了，再麻煩你確認
english: I have already transferred the money. Could you please confirm it again?

meaning: ブチ切れる / テーブルをひっくり返す / お客さんが入れ替わること（回転すること）
example: 這麼貴，如果不好吃，我真的會翻桌
english: It's so expensive, if it doesn't taste good, I'll really flip the table.

meaning: ちょっと見てみる / パラパラ見てみる
example: 這本書很好，你可以去書店翻翻看
english: This book is very good; you can go to the bookstore and browse through it.

meaning: 振り返ってこちらに来る / 戻ってくる
example: 他聽到有人叫他，就回頭過來
english: He heard someone call him and turned around.

meaning: 順序 / 順番 / オーダー
example: 做事情要有順序
english: Do things in an orderly manner

meaning:
（動）保湿する
（名）保湿
example: 每天喝水可以幫助皮膚保濕
english: Drinking water every day can help moisturize the skin.

meaning: 体質
example: 我體質不適合喝酒，所以很少喝
english: My constitution isn't suited to drinking alcohol, so I rarely drink.

meaning: 強迫症 / 強迫性障害 / 几帳面
example: 我有一點強迫症，東西一定要排整齊
english: I have a bit of OCD; things have to be arranged neatly.

meaning: 崩れる / つぶれる / 崩壊する
example: 地震的時候，有些房子塌了
english: Some houses collapsed during the earthquake.

meaning: ボリュームがない / ぺたんこ / つぶれている
example: 我的頭髮很容易扁塌
english: My hair tends to fall flat easily.

meaning: 建築物 / 建物 / 建造物
example: 這個城市有很多漂亮的建築物
english: This city has many beautiful buildings.

meaning: 食いしん坊 / 口がさみしくて何か食べたい
example: 半夜嘴饞想吃東西
english: I crave something to eat in the middle of the night

meaning: 歩いて外へ出る / 外に出て行く
example: 他生氣地走出去了
english: He stormed out angrily.

meaning: 早朝 / 明け方
example: 他每天清晨去跑步
english: He goes for a run every morning.

meaning: デジタルマーケティング
example: 我在做數位行銷工作
english: I work in digital marketing.

meaning: ついでに言うと / ちなみに / ところで
example: 順便說一下，我昨天看到你的朋友
english: By the way, I saw your friend yesterday.

meaning: ブロックする（SNS・連絡を遮断）
example: 如果有人在網路上一直騷擾你，你可以直接封鎖他
english: If someone keeps harassing you online, you can block them directly.

meaning: 素晴らしい / 見ごたえがある / とても面白い
example: 那部電影非常精彩
english: That movie was fantastic.

meaning: 具体的に言うと / 具体的には
example: 具體來說，他負責設計，我負責行銷
english: Specifically, he was in charge of design, and I was in charge of marketing.

meaning:
（動）点を取る / 得点する
（名）得点
example: 這位前鋒在今天的比賽中得分很多
english: This striker scored a lot of points in today's game.

meaning: トイレに行く / 用を足す
example: 我去上廁所一下
english: I need to use the restroom.

meaning:
①悲しい / つらい / 落ち込む
②具合が悪い / 体調がつらい
example: 聽到這個消息，我覺得很難過
english: I felt very sad when I heard this news.

meaning: （接） 〜だけれども / 〜にもかかわらず
example: 雖然很忙，（但是）我還是每天學中文
english: Although I'm very busy, I still study Chinese every day.

meaning: Aですよね？ / Aだったよね？
example: 前幾天不是台灣跟日本打嗎？
english: Didn't Taiwan and Japan fight a few days ago?

meaning: 保存する / セーブする
example: 檔案無法儲存，請稍後再試
english: The file could not be saved. Please try again later.

meaning: 私はこの後〜に行きます
example: 我等一下要去健身房
english: I'm going to the gym in a bit.

meaning: 〜して初めて…になる / 〜だからこそ…する
example: 我看到你的訊息才會嚇到
english: I was only scared when I saw your message.

meaning: すごく会いたい / とても恋しい
example: 最近常常想到你，好想你
english: I've been thinking about you a lot lately, I miss you so much.

meaning: 脇
example: 夏天很熱，所以腋下很容易流汗
english: Summer is hot, so armpits sweat easily.

meaning: （接）それによって / その結果として / そこからさらに
example: 他每天努力學習中文，從而提高了自己的語言能力
english: He studied Chinese diligently every day, thereby improving his language skills.

word:
（動詞）スプレーする・霧状に噴射する
（名）噴霧
meaning: ちょっと考えてみる / 少し考えさせて
example: 你的建議很好，我想一想再決定
english: Your suggestion is good; I'll think about it and then decide.

meaning: 手足が冷たい / 手足が冷える（冷え性の症状）
example: 很多女生冬天都會有手腳冰冷的問題
english: Many girls experience cold hands and feet in winter.

meaning:
（動）スプレーする / 霧状に噴射する
（名）スプレー / 噴霧
example: 工作人員正在公園裡噴霧殺蟲
english: Workers are spraying insecticide in the park.

meaning: 消臭剤 / デオドラント
example: 夏天很熱，所以很多人會用除臭劑
english: Summer is hot, so many people use deodorants.

meaning: 怠ける / 面倒くさがり / だらける
example: 他很懶惰，不喜歡每天認真工作
english: He is lazy and doesn't like to work diligently every day.

meaning: 怠ける / サボる / 手を抜く
example: 我今天工作時有一點偷懶，所以事情還沒做完
english: I was a little lazy at work today, so I haven't finished my work yet.

meaning: なんとなく面倒くさい / 少しだるい / やる気が出ない感じ
example: 今天下雨，我整天都覺得懶懶的，不太想出門
english: It's raining today, and I've felt lazy all day and don't really want to go out.

meaning: 気持ちや考えが読めない / 予測できない / つかみどころがない
example: 最近的天氣捉摸不定，出門最好帶雨傘
english: The weather has been unpredictable lately, so it's best to bring an umbrella when you go out.

meaning: 感情的になる / 情緒不安定である
example: 他一生氣就變得很情緒化
english: He becomes very emotional when he gets angry.

meaning: 発表する / 公表する / 意見を述べる
example: 我想發表一下我的看法
english: I would like to express my opinion.

meaning:
（動）優先する
（名）優先
example: 這件事情要優先處理
english: This matter should be dealt with as a priority.

meaning: カモにされる / ぼったくられる / いいように利用される
example: 我在新宿的酒吧被當盤子了
english: I was cheated out of my plate at a bar in Shinjuku.

meaning: あちこち走り回る / 行ったり来たりする / 忙しく動き回る
example: 我今天一直跑來跑去，很累
english: I've been running around all day, I'm very tired.

meaning: 少し / ちょっと / やや
example: 我想稍微說明一下
english: I'd like to explain a little.

meaning: すぐに～する / ちょっとしたことで～する / やたらと～する
example: 他動不動就生氣，很情緒化
english: He gets angry easily and is very emotional.

meaning: 早めに見つける
example: 還好你提早發現，不然我們就完了
english: Thank goodness you found out early, otherwise we would have been finished.

meaning: 分ける / 離す / 別々にする / 別れる
example: 這兩件事，分開討論比較好
english: It's better to discuss these two things separately.

meaning: 周り / 周囲 / まわりの場所
example: 我喜歡住在周圍有公園的地方，因為環境比較舒服
english: I like living in places with parks nearby because the environment is more comfortable.

meaning: 鑑賞する / 眺めて楽しむ / 観賞する
example: 很多遊客喜歡在春天來這裡觀賞櫻花盛開的美麗景色
english: Many tourists enjoy visiting this place in spring to admire the beautiful scenery of cherry blossoms in full bloom.

meaning: 省略する / 飛ばす / スキップする
example: 我們先略過這個問題
english: Let's skip this question for now.

meaning: 人それぞれ / 人によって違う / ケースバイケース
example: 學習中文的方法很多，適合的方式也會因人而異
english: There are many ways to learn Chinese, and the most suitable method varies from person to person.

meaning: 夕方 / 日が沈む頃 / 夕暮れ
example: 今天傍晚可能會下雨，記得帶雨傘
english: It might rain this evening, remember to bring an umbrella.

meaning: ～しか残っていない / ～だけ残る
example: 考試結束後，教室裡只剩下我一個人
english: After the exam, I was the only one left in the classroom.

meaning: やる / 作る / いじる / 処理する / 何かを操作する
example: 我先弄一下這個電腦，很快就好了
english: I'll fix this computer first, it'll be quick.

meaning:
（動）充実する
（形）充実している / 満たされている
example: 我想利用空閒時間充實自己，多學一些新的技能
english: I want to use my free time to enrich myself and learn more new skills.

meaning: ビザ / 査証
example: 我正在申請去美國的簽證
english: I am applying for a visa to the United States.

meaning: ～せざるを得ない / どうしても～しなければならない
example: 因為戰爭的關係，所以他們不得不回日本
english: Because of the war, they had to return to Japan.

meaning: 変顔をする / おどけた顔をする
example: 小朋友很喜歡對朋友扮鬼臉，讓大家笑
english: Children love to make funny faces at their friends to make everyone laugh.

meaning: つまり / 言い換えると / ということは
example:
A： 老闆今天不在公司
B： 也就是說，我們今天比較輕鬆
english:
A: The boss isn't in the office today.

B: That means we have a relatively relaxed day.

meaning: 人見知りする / 知らない人を怖がる
example: 她小時候很怕生，現在已經變得很活潑
english: She was very shy when she was little, but now she has become very lively.

meaning: 話題を始める / 話題を切り出す
example: 如果不知道說什麼，可以用天氣來開啟話題
english: If you don't know what to say, you can start a conversation with the weather.

meaning: 乗客 / 乗り物に乗っている人
example: 這輛公車上有很多乘客
english: There were many passengers on the bus.

meaning: 常連客 / リピーター
example: 常客坐在酒吧的吧台前，一邊喝酒一邊聊天
english: Regulars sat at the bar counter, drinking and chatting.

meaning: 親指
example: 他不小心被刀子割到拇指
english: He accidentally cut his thumb with a knife.

meaning: 人差し指
example: 他用食指指著地圖上的位置
english: He pointed to the location on the map with his index finger.

meaning: 中指
example: 在很多國家，對別人豎中指是很不禮貌的
english: In many countries, giving someone the middle finger is considered very impolite.

meaning: 薬指
example: 她的無名指上戴著一枚戒指
english: She wore a ring on her ring finger

meaning: 小指
example: 兩個小朋友用小指拉勾約定不再吵架
english: Two children made a pinky promise with their little fingers that they would never fight again.

meaning: 突っ込む / 突き入れる / 押し込む
example: 小孩把手指戳進蛋糕裡
english: The child poked his finger into the cake.

meaning: 見知らぬ / なじみがない / 知らない
example: 我很癡迷於在陌生的地方散步
english: I am obsessed with taking walks in unfamiliar places.

meaning: 右利き
example: 大部分的人都是右撇子
english: Most people are right-handed.

meaning: 左利き
example: 他是左撇子，不過丟球是用右手
english: He's left-handed, but he throws the ball with his right hand.

meaning: いくつかの店を比較してから買う（値段や品質を比べて買う）
example: 買東西要貨比三家
english: Compare prices from three different vendors before buying anything.

meaning: ブランド側 / ブランドの立場 / ブランド企業の側
example: 我們先跟品牌端確認合作細節
english: We first confirmed the cooperation details with the brand.

meaning: 全然状況がわからない / 何が起きているのか分からない / 頭が混乱している
example: 突然改計畫，我真的一頭霧水
english: I'm completely baffled by the sudden change in plans.

meaning: なくなった / 消えた
example: 我的手機不見了，我不知道是什麼時候不見的

meaning: なくしてしまった / 見失ってしまった / どこかへやってしまった
example: 你是不是把發票弄不見了？
english: Did you lose the invoice?

meaning: 頭の中にある～を頼りにして / 記憶の中の～をもとにして / 脳裏にある～に基づいて
example: 我只能憑著腦海中的記憶去找那家店。
english: I could only find that store by relying on my memory.

meaning: 推理する / 論理的に考える / 推測する（根拠あり）
example: 警察根據線索推理案件的經過
english: The police deduced the course of the case based on clues.

meaning: シナモンロール
example: 我很喜歡吃肉桂捲，但熱量太高，所以平常不太吃
english: I love cinnamon rolls, but they're too high in calories, so I don't eat them often.

meaning: キャラメルマキアート
example: 星巴克的焦糖瑪奇朵很貴，可是真的很好喝
english: Starbucks' caramel macchiato is expensive, but it's really delicious.

meaning: Facebook
example: 通常臉書的動態只有朋友可以看得到
english: Facebook posts are usually only visible to friends.

meaning: ありえない / 大げさ / 適当なことを言う / 話を広げる
example: 你也太扯了吧，我才不信
english: That's ridiculous! I don't believe it.

meaning: プロフィール写真 / アイコン
example: 很多人會用自拍當大頭照
english: Many people use selfies as their headshots.

meaning: どのあたり / どの辺
example: 你住在台北的哪一帶？
english: Which area of ​​Taipei do you live in?

meaning: 趣味というほどではない
example: 說不上是興趣，但我會定期去健身房運動
english: I wouldn't call it a hobby, but I go to the gym regularly.

meaning: どっちでもいい / どれでも同じ / 特に差はない
example: 去哪裡都沒差，只要大家方便就好
english: It doesn't matter where we go, as long as it's convenient for everyone.

meaning: 言い訳をする / 言い逃れする
example: 不要一直找藉口，先把事情做好再說
english: Stop making excuses and get the job done first.

meaning: とりあえず / ひとまず / 一応 / 仮に
example: 姑且先放著吧
english: Let's leave it for now.

meaning: とりあえず試してみる / ひとまずやってみる
example: 你就姑且一試，做不到就算了
english: Just give it a try, and if you can't do it, that's fine too.

meaning: とりあえず試してみる / まずやってみる
example: 你可以先試試看，不行再說
english: You can try it first, and then we'll see if it works.

meaning: けっこうよく使う / 割とよく使われる
example: 這個表達在日常會話裡蠻常用的
english: This expression is quite commonly used in everyday conversation.

meaning: 変える / 変わる / 変化する
example: 我想改變自己的生活習慣
english: I want to change my lifestyle.

meaning: もういいや / まあいいや / やめておこう / 気にしないで
example: 算了啦，小事而已
english: Never mind, it's nothing.

meaning: 危なかった！ / よかった！ / ギリギリ助かった
example: 好險，我趕上了捷運
english: Thank goodness, I made it to the MRT!

meaning: 禁煙する
example: 我十年前早就戒菸了
english: I quit smoking ten years ago.

pinyin: Huà bú yào shuō de tài mǎn
meaning: 言い切りすぎないほうがいい / 言いすぎないで
example: 話不要說得太滿，萬一做不到就尷尬了
english: Don't make promises you can't keep, or it'll be embarrassing.

meaning: オーツミルク
example: 請幫我把牛奶換成燕麥奶
english: Please replace my milk with oat milk.

meaning: 〜と見なす／見間違える
example: 我剛剛把老師寫的那個字看成另外一個字了
english: I just mistook the word the teacher wrote for a different word.

meaning: 関係なく / 気にしない / とにかく
example: 不管你去不去，我都會去。
english: Whether you go or not, I will go.

meaning: 思ったより
example: 他比我想像中還有精神
english: He was more energetic than I had imagined.

meaning: 浮き沈みがある / 上がったり下がったり / 波がある
example: 人生總是起起伏伏
english: Life is always full of ups and downs.

meaning: 対面授業 / オフライン授業
example: 我比較喜歡上實體課
english: I prefer in-person classes.

meaning: 編集作業 / 後処理
example: 這支影片的後製做得很好
english: The post-production of this film was very well done.

meaning: 運用する / 稼働する / 動かす / 運営する
example: 目前廣告運作還不錯
english: The advertising campaign is currently performing well.

meaning: アクセサリー / 装飾品
example: 我想買飾品送給她
english: I want to buy her some jewelry.

meaning: ポップアップストア / 期間限定ショップ
example: 這個品牌在台北開了快閃店
english: This brand opened a pop-up store in Taipei.

meaning: 見不到
example: 我朋友離婚後見不到小孩，覺得很難過
english: My friend is very sad because she can't see her children after her divorce.

meaning: それでも / たとえそうでも
example: 就算這樣，我還是會把這個專案做完，因為我已經投入很多時間了
english: Even so, I will still finish this project because I have already invested a lot of time in it.

meaning: 週末を過ごす
example: 怎麼度過週末？
english: How to spend the weekend?

meaning: 定住する、ある場所に長く住む
example: 我已經在這裡定居五年了
english: I have lived here for five years.

meaning: 泣き出す、泣いてしまう
example: 他壓力太大終於在朋友面前哭出來了
english: He was under so much pressure that he finally broke down in tears in front of his friends.

meaning:
（動）あげる / 与える
（前）〜に（対象）
example: 我給朋友打電話問他最近的情況
english: I called my friend to ask him how he was doing lately.

meaning: 太もも
example: 她在健身房做運動主要是訓練大腿和臀部
english: She mainly works out her thighs and glutes at the gym.

meaning: 次の瞬間 / 次の一秒
example: 生活充滿變化你永遠不知道下一秒會發生什麼
english: Life is full of changes; you never know what will happen next.

meaning: 端 / はし / 先端
example: 吃不完的菜可以幫我端走嗎？
english: Could you please take away any leftover food I can't finish?

meaning: ストレスを解消する / リラックスする
example: 很多人喜歡運動因為可以有效舒壓保持健康
english: Many people enjoy exercise because it effectively relieves stress and maintains health.

meaning: 逆にお金を出す／損をする
example: 做這筆生意實在很不划算，有時還要（倒）貼錢耶
english: Doing this kind of business is really not worthwhile; sometimes you even have to lose money.

meaning: 振り向く / こちらに向く
example: 趁朋友不注意，偷打朋友的屁股，結果轉過來是不認識的人
english: I secretly spanked my friend when they weren't looking, only to find out it was a complete stranger.

meaning: 向こうを向く / 後ろを向く
example: 我要幫你綁頭髮，你轉過去
english: I'm going to tie your hair up, turn around.

meaning: 彼女を作る
example: 趁在台灣旅行的時候，交到男朋友了
english: I met my boyfriend while traveling in Taiwan.

meaning: 言い間違える（逆に言ってしまう）
example: 我剛剛把星期三跟星期四說反了
english: I just mixed up Wednesday and Thursday.

meaning: 間違える / 勘違いする
example: 我搞錯時間了所以今天差點遲到
english: I got the time wrong, so I almost missed it today.

meaning: リバウンドする（体重が戻る）
example: 他減肥成功之後不注意飲食很快就復胖了
english: After successfully losing weight, he quickly gained it back without paying attention to his diet.

meaning: 人気がある / 重宝される / 需要がある
example: 男生的護理師很吃香
english: Male nurses are in high demand

meaning: 損をする / 不利な立場になる
example: 做生意不懂行情，很容易吃虧
english: If you don't understand the market, you're likely to suffer losses.

meaning: 看護師（台湾で一般的な言い方）
example: 她在醫院當護理師，每天都非常忙碌很辛苦
english: She works as a nurse in a hospital, and she is very busy and works very hard every day.

meaning: まあまあ大丈夫 / そこそこOK / それなりに
example: 這次考試的成績還算OK，我自己還滿滿意的
english: My exam results were pretty good; I'm quite satisfied with them.

meaning: 無駄足になる / 行ったのに意味がなかった
example: 我今天去銀行結果沒有帶證件只好白跑一趟
english: I went to the bank today but forgot my ID, so I had to make a wasted trip.

meaning: 全部無駄な努力だった／骨折り損
example: 我準備了一整天的報告結果沒有用上真的白忙一場
english: I spent all day preparing a report, but it turned out to be useless—it was all for nothing.

meaning: 往復の回数、ひとっ走り
example: 我來來回回走了好幾趟
english: I walked back and forth several times.

meaning: リスト / 一覧
example: 為了不忘記工作內容我每天都會整理一份工作清單
english: To avoid forgetting my work, I make a daily to-do list.

meaning: こうよく言う / 割とよく使う
example: 這個詞在工作上還蠻常講的所以你一定要記起來
english: This word is used quite often at work, so you should definitely remember it.

pinyin: Tiānxià méiyǒu bái chī de wǔcān
meaning: いい話には裏がある
example: 他以為可以輕鬆賺錢但其實天下沒有白吃的午餐
english: He thought he could make money easily, but there's no such thing as a free lunch.

meaning: 想像できない
example: 他會做出這樣的決定讓大家都想像不到
english: His decision was unexpected by everyone.

meaning: そんなことするなよ / いい加減にして
example: 你少在那邊緊張這件事情其實沒有那麼嚴重
english: Don't be so nervous, it's not that serious.

meaning: 曲がっている / 歪んでいる
example: 這幅畫掛得有點歪需要調整一下才會比較好看
english: This painting is hanging a bit crooked; it needs to be adjusted to look better.

meaning: 比較的太っている／やや太り気味
example: 這件衣服穿起來讓我看起來比較胖所以我不太喜歡
english: This outfit makes me look rather chubby, so I don't really like it.

meaning: 少し太った
example: 我最近吃太多甜食所以胖了一點需要控制一下
english: I've gained a little weight because I've been eating too many sweets lately, so I need to control it.

meaning: 比べてみると / 比較すると
example: 跟20幾歲的我比起來，我現在少吃很多
english: Compared to when I was in my twenties, I eat much less now.

meaning:
①できない（能力・状況）
②仕方がない（あきらめ）
③どうしようもない（コントロール不能）
example: 已經沒有火車了，沒辦法我只好走回家。
english: There were no more trains running, so I had no choice but to walk home.

meaning: 共働き家庭
example: 跟日本比起來，台灣的雙薪家庭比較多
english: Compared to Japan, Taiwan has more dual-income families.

meaning: ファッション / トレンド（やや上品）
example: 這本雜誌主要介紹最新的時尚趨勢
english: This magazine mainly introduces the latest fashion trends.

meaning: おしゃれ / センスがいい
example: 這家咖啡店的裝潢很時髦
english: This coffee shop has a very trendy decor.

meaning: 流行している / トレンド
example: 現在很流行喝蛋白質飲料
english: Drinking protein drinks is very popular now.

meaning:
（動）急ぐ
（形）詰まっている・忙しい（スケジュールが）
example: 星期五的課比較趕
english: Friday's classes are quite rushed.

meaning: 追いつく / 間に合う
example: 如果快一點我們還來得及趕上公車
english: If we hurry, we can still catch the bus.

meaning: 追い払う
example: 他把房間裡的蚊子全部趕走了
english: He chased all the mosquitoes out of the room.

meaning: 早く！急いで！
example: 你趕快準備不然等一下會來不及
english: You'd better get ready quickly, or it will be too late.

meaning: 時間がない / 急いでいる
example: 不好意思我現在趕時間等一下再跟你聊
english: Sorry, I'm in a hurry right now, I'll talk to you later.

meaning: スケジュール / 予定 / 旅程
example: 你可以幫我看一下明天的行程有沒有需要調整的地方
english: Could you please check if there are any adjustments needed to tomorrow's schedule?

meaning: 以前働いていた会社
example: 我之前待的公司雖然薪水不高但是學到很多東西
english: Although the salary at my previous company wasn't high, I learned a lot.

meaning: 落ち込む / がっかりする
example: 昨天語言交換講得不好所以我有點沮喪
english: I was a little frustrated because my language exchange didn't go well yesterday.

meaning: 寂しい / むなしい
example: 我以為我男友要跟我求婚，結果沒有，我好失落
english: I thought my boyfriend was going to propose, but he didn't. I'm so disappointed.

meaning: あらかじめ決めておく、約束しておく
example: 我們先講好，聊天的時候三十分鐘說日文，三十分鐘說中文
english: We agree beforehand that we'll spend 30 minutes in Japanese and 30 minutes in Chinese during our chat.

meaning: 認知症
example: 我的爺爺得了失智症，所以有時候會忘記家人的名字
english: My grandfather has dementia, so sometimes he forgets the names of his family members.

meaning: 使う必要がない / 使う機会がない
example: 雖然工作用不到中文，但是我還是每天學習一點點
english: Although I don't use Chinese at work, I still learn a little bit every day.

meaning: 提示する / ヒントを与える
example: 你可以給我一些提示嗎？
english: Can you give me some hints?

meaning: グラム（g）
example: 一天吃二十克的蛋白質
english: Eat 20 grams of protein a day

meaning: キログラム（kg）
example: 我想瘦三公斤
english: I want to lose three kilograms.

meaning: 食前 / ご飯の前
example: 飯前不要吃太多零食
english: Don't eat too many snacks before meals.

meaning: 食後 / ご飯の後
example: 請一天吃三次藥，每次都在飯後吃
english: Please take the medicine three times a day, each time after meals.

meaning: カルシウム（栄養素としての）
example: 為了避免鈣質的攝取不足，舉例來說可以多吃豆腐和深綠色蔬菜
english: To avoid insufficient calcium intake, you can eat more tofu and dark green vegetables, for example.

meaning: 下がる / 下降する
example: 如果長期熬夜，免疫力會下降
english: If you stay up late for a long time, your immunity will decrease.

meaning: 上がる / 上昇する
example: 最近運動變少了，所以體脂肪率慢慢上升
english: I've been exercising less lately, so my body fat percentage is slowly increasing.

meaning: すぐに〜する / やたらと〜する
example: 他動不動就生氣，讓大家都不太敢跟他說話
english: He gets angry easily, which makes people hesitant to talk to him.

meaning: 片道切符
example: 我要買一張單程票，從台北到高雄
english: I want to buy a one-way ticket from Taipei to Kaohsiung.

meaning: 往復切符
example: 如果已經確定回程時間，買來回票通常會比較划算
english: If your return date is already confirmed, buying a round-trip ticket is usually more cost-effective.

meaning: 身体・精神障害
example: 政府提供很多資源幫助身心障礙者，讓他們可以更方便地生活
english: The government provides many resources to help people with disabilities, enabling them to live more easily.

meaning: ちょっと調べた / 少し調べてみた
example: 我查了一下線上報稅系統，發現比我想像中還要簡單
english: I checked out the online tax filing system and found it to be simpler than I expected.

meaning:
（動）返答する / 対応する
（名）反応
example: 客戶的問題你已經回應了嗎？
english: Have you responded to the customer's questions?

meaning: 研究する / 迷う / 考える / 悩む
example: 我還在研究套餐要怎麼點
english: I'm still figuring out how to order the set meal.

meaning: 汗
example: 今天真的很熱，我走一下就流很多汗了
english: It's really hot today; I sweat a lot after walking around for just a short while.

meaning: お酒を飲みすぎる
example: 昨天我喝太多酒，所以今天頭很痛
english: I drank too much yesterday, so I have a terrible headache today.

meaning: 忙しい中で時間を作る / 合間をぬって
example: 感謝你抽空來參加今天的活動
english: Thank you for taking the time to attend today's event.

meaning: 低い給料 / 低賃金
example: 很多年輕人抱怨低薪，生活壓力越來越大
english: Many young people complain about low wages and increasing life pressure.

meaning: （副）依然として / 相変わらず
example: 對日本人而言，最受歡迎的職涯選擇依舊是當上班族
english: For Japanese people, becoming an office worker remains the most popular career choice.

meaning: 迷う / 戸惑う / 将来に不安を感じる
example: 面對未來的選擇，他感到非常迷惘，不知道該怎麼辦
english: Faced with choices for the future, he felt extremely lost and didn't know what to do.

meaning: 有酸素運動
example: 我每天早上都會做三十分鐘的有氧運動來保持健康
english: I do 30 minutes of aerobic exercise every morning to stay healthy.

pinyin: wǎn shàng cái xiǎng qǐ lái
meaning: 夜になってやっと思い出した
example: 他晚上才想起來忘了回你訊息
english: He only realized last night that he forgot to reply to your message.

meaning: 請求する / 支払いを請求すること
example: 這個月的費用還沒請款，需要盡快處理
english: This month's expenses haven't been requested yet; they need to be processed as soon as possible.

meaning: 前日（1日前）
example: 前一天吃拉麵的話，隔天很容易水腫
english: If you eat ramen the day before, you're more likely to experience water retention the next day.

meaning: 摂取する（栄養・水分などを体に取り入れる）
example: 運動之後要記得攝取水分，避免身體不舒服
english: Remember to drink water after exercise to avoid feeling unwell.

meaning: ソース、たれ、調味だれ
example: 這個醬汁味道很特別，吃起來有點甜又有點辣
english: This sauce has a very unique flavor; it's a bit sweet and a bit spicy.

meaning: （今）体調が悪い / 気分が悪い
example: 我今天身體不舒服，想請假
english: I'm not feeling well today and would like to ask for leave.

meaning: 体が弱い / 健康状態が良くない
example: 他從小身體就不好
english: He was in poor health since childhood.

meaning: 欠かせない / 必要不可欠な
example: 你覺得維持健康，不可或缺的事情是什麼？
english: What do you think is essential for maintaining good health?

meaning: 詳しくて細かい / 詳細である
example: 可以再說詳細一點嗎？
english: Could you elaborate a bit more?

meaning: マグカップ
example: 要用外帶杯還是馬克杯？
english: Do you want a takeaway cup or a mug?

meaning: すぐに〜する / あっという間に〜する
example: 昨天我跟他聊了一下之後很快就回家了
english: I talked to him briefly yesterday and then went home quickly.

meaning: 誰に習ったの？
example: 你跟誰學的日文？說得很好。
english: Who taught you Japanese? You speak very well.

meaning: 規律 / ルール / 規則（秩序を保つためのルール）
example: 規律的運動，跟均衡的飲食，對身體很有幫助
english: Regular exercise and a balanced diet are very beneficial to health.

meaning: 赤信号になる / 警告が出る（問題が起きるサイン）
example: 什麼樣的壞習慣，會讓身體健康亮紅燈呢？
english: What bad habits can cause health problems?

meaning: でんぷん（炭水化物）
example: 我覺得攝取太多精緻澱粉，沒有準時吃飯，常常熬夜，都是很大的壞習慣
english: I think consuming too much refined carbohydrates, not eating on time, and frequently staying up late are all very bad habits.

meaning: 煮込む（じっくり火を通す）
example: 他喜歡用蘿蔔燉排骨湯，非常好喝
english: He likes to stew pork ribs with radish, it's very delicious.

meaning: 夫 / 旦那
example: 我丈夫今天加班，會晚一點回來
english: My husband is working overtime today and will be home a little late.

meaning: お祓い（ただしもっとカジュアル）
example: 收驚完之後真的有比較好
english: It really does feel better after the ritual to calm the spirit.

meaning: よく効く / ご利益がある / 効果がある
example: 聽說這間廟很靈驗
english: I heard this temple is very efficacious.

meaning:
①的中する / 当たっている
②正確 / ズレてない
example: 這家算命很準，你要不要去看看？
english: This fortune teller is very accurate, do you want to go and have a look?

meaning: 天気予報
example: 最近的氣象真的很準
english: The recent weather forecast has been really accurate.

meaning: 頑張ってるのに評価されない / やっても得しない / 損な役回り
example: 我老是做一些吃力不討好的事情
english: #REF!

meaning: 割に合わない / コスパが悪い / 損
example: 這個案子花很多時間，但賺不多，我覺得有點划不來
english: I always end up doing things that are thankless and exhausting.

meaning:
①吠える / 叫ぶ
②呼ぶ
③（名前）～と言う
④呼ばれる
⑤注文する
example: 我叫了兩個燙青菜
english: I ordered two hot vegetable dishes.

meaning: 労をねぎらう / ご褒美をあげる
example: 累壞的時候，你想做什麼犒賞自己？
english: When you're exhausted, what do you want to do to reward yourself?

meaning: 罪悪感 / 後ろめたさ
example: 吃宵夜的時候，會有罪惡感
english: I feel guilty when I eat late-night snacks.

meaning: ため込む / 蓄積する / 買いだめする
example: 脂肪會囤積在肚子
english: Fat will accumulate in the belly

meaning: 削除する
example: 我想刪除這個服務的帳號
english: I want to delete my account for this service.

meaning: 予約する / 注文する / 決める / （ホッチキスで）とめる
example: 這份資料可以幫我訂一下嗎？
english: Could you please order this document for me?

meaning: 左上
example: 這份資料可以幫我訂在左上角嗎？
english: Could you please pin this document to the top left corner?

meaning: 右上
example: 我要右上角的商品
english: I want the item in the top right corner.

meaning: 封筒
example: 可以幫我把發票放進信封，寄到我的地址嗎？
english: Could you please put the invoice in an envelope and mail it to my address?

meaning: 私と比べると / 私に比べて
example: 跟我比起來，你的中文很好
english: Your Chinese is much better than mine.

meaning: ペアになる / カップルになる
example: 情人節的街道上，到處都是成雙成對的戀人
english: On Valentine's Day, the streets were filled with couples everywhere.

meaning:
①残す
②とどめる
③保持する
④（髪を）伸ばす
example: 我想留長頭髮，幫我修髮尾就好
english: I want to grow my hair long, just trim the ends.

meaning: ひげ
example: 我想試試看留鬍子
english: I want to try growing a beard.

meaning: 資格 / 免許 / ライセンス
example: 如果沒有證照，就不能正式上班
english: Without a license or permit, you cannot officially start working.

meaning: 地雷を踏む（＝相手のNG・タブーに触れる）
example: 我不小心踩到她的地雷，她突然就不跟我說話了
english: I accidentally stepped on her landmine, and she suddenly stopped talking to me.

meaning: 引き開ける / 引き離す / 間隔をあける
example: 他習慣與人拉開距離
english: He is used to keeping his distance from people.

meaning: 誤解を避ける / 疑いを持たれないように距離をとる
example: 我已經結婚了，為了避嫌，盡量不要跟男生兩人單獨去吃飯
english: I'm already married, and to avoid any appearance of impropriety, I try to avoid going out to eat alone with men.

meaning: 完全に閉店 / 営業終了
example: 欸，那家店歇業了你知道嗎？
english: Hey, did you know that store closed down?

meaning: 既読スルー
example: 他應該不是故意已讀不回
english: He probably didn't intentionally ignore the message after reading it.

meaning: 見た感じまさに〜 / どう見ても〜
example: 看起來就是詐騙的話，我當然已讀不回
english: If it looks like a scam, of course I've read it but won't reply.

meaning: 見ても分からない＝実は〜だった（意外・驚き）
example: 看不出來你就是老闆
english: I couldn't tell you were the boss.
